name: Nick Rathod, Beto for Texas
subject: The way that we will win this campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
[1]Beto O'Rourke

Hi, it’s Nick
— Beto’s campaign manager. This is important.

Donald Trump is putting on a rally in Austin tomorrow to try and spread
his cruel vision of division and hate. We set a goal to raise $250,000
before he takes the stage tomorrow night to show that Texans are ready for
a leader who has a positive, unifying vision for Texas.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-20220513-2?refcode=ema20220513-189193&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&refcode2=189193_444211_RDs7ra&akid=189193%2E444211%2ERDs7ra ]Make a $3 donation today to help us fight back against
Trump and Greg Abbott’s platform of hate and division.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-20220513-2?refcode=ema20220513-189193&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&refcode2=189193_444211_RDs7ra&akid=189193%2E444211%2ERDs7ra ]Trump is coming to Texas. Help us raise $250,000 to fight back.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-20220513-2?refcode=ema20220513-189193&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&refcode2=189193_444211_RDs7ra&akid=189193%2E444211%2ERDs7ra ]Contribute $3

Donald Trump endorsed Greg Abbott last summer. Their vision for Texas is
rooted in hatred and divisiveness, stripping away reproductive rights,
attacking immigrants, and harming the LGBTQ+ community.

Greg Abbott has prioritized mean, petty, and extreme fringe policies
instead of doing what actually matters — expanding health care, getting
people back to work, and ensuring our electricity grid doesn’t fail us
again.

Beto has a brighter vision for Texas. One where every Texan
can afford to see a doctor, has the opportunity to pursue the education
and the career of their dreams, and benefits from a government that will
never fail its people like Abbott did during the winter storm.

The way that we will win this race is with grassroots power — thousands of
people chipping in what they can afford because they believe in a better
future for Texas.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-20220513-2?refcode=ema20220513-189193&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&refcode2=189193_444211_RDs7ra&akid=189193%2E444211%2ERDs7ra ]Contribute $3 today and help us raise $250,000 before
Trump takes the stage in Austin tomorrow, and together we’ll send the
message that we’re rejecting Trump and Abbott’s hate and divisiveness.

Thank you for being with us,

Nick Rathod
Campaign Manager, Beto for Texas

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=1023&akid=189193%2E444211%2ERDs7ra

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

name: Republican Party of Wisconsin
subject: One week out!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Party of Wisconsin
body:
Updates on RPW Convention

## **The RPW Convention is a week away!**
Another election year is underway, and the importance of working together has never been clearer. We have laid the groundwork for success by growing our local elections effort, building our ground game operation, strengthening our county party organizations, and training our grassroots activists for the road ahead. Now, this year is about translating that infrastructure into action, and ultimately, to Republican victories in November. Republicans and like-minded conservatives will gather in Middleton for the Republican Party of Wisconsin Convention next week! **Our annual convention is the best way to meet fellow Republicans, get informed on Party updates, and most importantly have your voice be heard!** This is a phenomenal opportunity to get more involved with the Party. Some of the opportunities for county delegates include:
* Hear reports from Party leaders, elected officials, and other invited speakers
* Vote on endorsement for statewide offices
* Vote on and adopt rules & resolutions
* Transact any other business that may be necessary to gain the objectives of the RPW
* Meet and mingle with like minded conservative leaders

**_The convention will be held from Friday, May 20th to Sunday, May 22nd at the Madison Marriott West in Middleton._** This is shaping up to be one of the biggest conventions in modern history so make sure to grab a ticket! Visit the link below for event details _.**(Note: Please do not send checks to RPW via mail. | Far-left radical Katie Porter says the answer to inflation - a crisis created by Biden and Porter's own policies - is to have abortions. Yes, you read that right, Katie Porter using inflation to justify unlimited abortion.

For those that don’t know me, I’m a lifelong conservative running against Katie Porter to rid the D.C. swamp of this kind of disgusting logic, and with election day in just a few weeks, this is crunch time for our campaign.

**So I’m sending up a red alert: We’re still more than $25,000 behind funding our [Get Out The Vote](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=41018b8246&e=8a657725d1) operation. If we come up short now it will cripple our chances to defeat Katie Porter and flip this seat from blue to red. **

Our race has been named one of the most critical in the entire nation to take back the House for Republicans and send Nancy Pelosi into retirement. That’s why it’s absolutely critical that we have the resources needed to win.

**Please, will you help us ramp up our voter outreach efforts to ensure every voter knows about this disgusting statement from Katie Porter in this final stretch? **

| | | Peter,

Did you see today’s news? Kevin Mullin won the sole endorsement of the _San Mateo Daily Journal_! In their editorial, the _Daily Journal_ said:

‘’Mullin is the absolute crystal-clear choice. Serving this district will take someone with a deep understanding of both its unique challenges and tremendous opportunities...Now, it is incumbent on all of us in this district to choose the right person. And that person is Kevin Mullin.”

These words of high praise and recognition are a huge boost to our momentum in the final stretch before the June Primary —**just** **25 days away**.

Peter, as the clock ticks down to Election Day, we are facing **one more critical FEC deadline on Wednesday, May 18th at midnight. We need your help to continue our momentum and sustain our strong lead over the rest of the pack.** [**Can you rush a donation of $10, $25, or $50 right now to keep the #mullmentum strong? **](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=bccd0fec12&e=292fde286a)

Thank you so much for all your support. We couldn’t do this without you.

Brian Rogers

Campaign Manager

, Tomorrow, people from across the country are taking to the streets to send a historic, unmistakable message that we won't let anyone take away reproductive rights. Please, show up to a rally or march near you to show your support for Roe v Wade and Abortion Rights.
---
[ **FIND A LOCAL RALLY** ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDN_AKdF4M0u5pGQ87M_sP-eMEFI-FkjJSXtvuuLqvsAjwOjyRwtIOYqQ9vSytVtiHuKWgAQAZmhmAsQTQkGxFDD-Wg97BRN0BjaVmzW8CFxul6mVzglay1HTw65ghVjhPooIGEz4AQDQfi-5X5Dhr8_tA2SeJTe2kaBoK8xMixws3wusGfVLkarDkYLM6M3Wj4Rko9jhoZ_BDCQ82BKNvtwXKexytoj9MmTP32KnTWgc/3m1/xUN92sPCRkCHXiTmr4eHkw/h1/PP3MUb08H2u7dn_qlDUvwcgiPu9dVAi74qA69rRh_CI)
---
I've fought back every time Republicans have attacked our rights. In 2015, I introduced the Viagra Bill to expose the GOP's war on women's hypocrisy. When South Carolina Republicans passed the "Fetal Heartbeat" bill, effectively banning abortions after six weeks of pregnancy, I introduced the Pro-Birth Accountability Act, a ground-breaking proposal that would require the state to help cover the costs of pregnancy, childbirth, and child-rearing -- from conception to college. ** ** I've spent my career fighting to protect the right to choose, and I'm not backing down any time soon. ** ** In Solidarity, Mia
---
About Senator Mia McLeod: Senator Mia McLeod is a working mom, small business owner, and seventh-generation South Carolinian from Bennettsville, South Carolina. She is a former State Representative, current State Senator representing District 22, and is running as a Democratic candidate for Governor.

clean_body: Tomorrow, people from across the country are taking to the streets to send a historic, unmistakable message that we won’t let anyone take away reproductive rights. Please, show up to a rally or march near you to show your support for Roe v Wade and Aborti | | , Tomorrow, people from across the country are taking to the streets to send a historic, unmistakable message that we won't let anyone take away reproductive rights. Please, show up to a rally or march near you to show your support for Roe v Wade and Abortion Rights. I've fought back every time Republicans have attacked our rights. In 2015, I introduced the Viagra Bill to expose the GOP's war on women's hypocrisy. When South Carolina Republicans passed the "Fetal Heartbeat" bill, effectively banning abortions after six weeks of pregnancy, I introduced the Pro-Birth Accountability Act, a ground-breaking proposal that would require the state to help cover the costs of pregnancy, childbirth, and child-rearing -- from conception to college. I've spent my career fighting to protect the right to choose, and I'm not backing down any time soon. In Solidarity, Mia About Senator Mia McLeod: Senator Mia McLeod is a working mom, small business owner, and seventh-generation South Carolinian from Bennettsville, South Carolina. She is a former State Representative, current State Senator representing District 22, and is running as a Democratic candidate for Governor. | | | Please, disregard if you are a registered lobbyist. body:
Please watch and share with your friends. | | | | [ ](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=326dab899f&e=1090c5c412)
---
| | |
---
| Today on WFMZ TV-69, Anchor/Reporter Bo Koltnow ran a feature about the primary election race between Lisa Scheller and me. Except, Lisa Scheller refused to acknowledge that she is in a race. Here’s an excerpt from the interview:

“That's what I'm getting from you, is that you don't want to acknowledge him,” I said to Lisa Scheller about her opponent Kevin Dellicker, after our interview on running for the GOP primary in the 7th Congressional District.

“No,” she said.

“So you don't think he has a shot?” I asked.

“We are done here,” a campaign aide said.

For months, my primary opponent has dodged debates and avoided public scrutiny of her business dealings and policy positions. Now we are four days away from Election Day, and she still won't admit she has a primary opponent.

Please watch the WFMZ News 69 feature [here](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=8fe218adaf&e=1090c5c412).

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Safe homes & safe communities
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
Every single Washingtonian deserves this.

| [](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/qk8KM_N4a-f6/bEFNYlMxT2VmZlZpTWt4Wlh2QW44bGZUTUIwamhxTW1wbWo1Nm9pTy9lOE9oNjd0RUF0SVlXblpBeEZobFRRSG5MNGlsTklEcmRiYVdBYk41MjlSYU9WSDJxb1lpRXJsdTF3cHB5aXFrVzg9S0/cGpMTm5KdG9pVjJDb21lZFpxZTRuS0kwMFArV2syeUdxSEx1WWpEQmo5Zz0S1) Friend -- Every single person deserves to live in a safe home in a safe community. **It 's why I spent this past legislative session fighting to pass a historic nearly $300 million investment in new housing to reduce homelessness, paired with a massive investment in behavioral health and community policing reforms right here in Washington.** Make no mistake: Republicans are confident they can win this election cycle with divisive, hateful messaging that demonizes the most vulnerable among us. But I know that we can prove the talking heads wrong, defy the odds, and _win_ by proving how Democrats are building safe and healthy communities for us all. [_**Winning will require us to focus on what really matters to voters: their communities, their health, their future. We can do it, but only if we 're in it together. Will you chip in $10 right now ahead of our mid-month fundraising deadline?**_](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/z7qNFv9DV-JD/bEFNYlMxT2VmZlZpTWt4Wlh2QW44bGZUTUIwamhxTW1wbWo1Nm9pTy9lOE9oNjd0RUF0SVlXblpBeEZobFRRSG5MNGlsTklEcmRiYVdBYk41MjlSYU9WSDJxb1lpRXJsdTF3cHB5aXFrVzg9S0/cGpMTm5KdG9pVjJDb21lZFpxZTRuS0kwMFArV2syeUdxSEx1WWpEQmo5Zz0S1) _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$1 ->](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/LEePhN4vDqt-/bEFNYlMxT2VmZlZpTWt4Wlh2QW44bGZUTUIwamhxTW1wbWo1Nm9pTy9lOE9oNjd0RUF0SVlXblpBeEZobFRRSG5MNGlsTklEcmRiYVdBYk41MjlSYU9WSDJxb1lpRXJsdTF3cHB5aXFrVzg9S0/cGpMTm5KdG9pVjJDb21lZFpxZTRuS0kwMFArV2syeUdxSEx1WWpEQmo5Zz0S1)

Look, Democrats here in Washington and across the country should be darn proud of our record. Our state has weathered the COVID-19 pandemic better than many. And while COVID exacerbated the challenge of homelessness, we took on the challenge directly this legislative session. We invested in community-based policing to keep our neighborhoods safe. We put our families ahead of political games.
**But with Republicans focused on criminalizing abortion, demonizing our teachers and scientists, and pursuing a backwards agenda -- we 're up for a tough fight.**
To win, we must work together and make this election about the health and safety of our families. Thankfully, Democrats have the record to do just that.
[_**Please, chip in $10 right now ahead of our mid-month fundraising deadline, so we can continue building towards a Washington that is healthy and safe for us _all_.**_](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/z7qNFv9DV-JD/bEFNYlMxT2VmZlZpTWt4Wlh2QW44bGZUTUIwamhxTW1wbWo1Nm9pTy9lOE9oNjd0RUF0SVlXblpBeEZobFRRSG5MNGlsTklEcmRiYVdBYk41MjlSYU9WSDJxb1lpRXJsdTF3cHB5aXFrVzg9S0/cGpMTm5KdG9pVjJDb21lZFpxZTRuS0kwMFArV2syeUdxSEx1WWpEQmo5Zz0S1)
I'm so grateful for your support as we tackle this next challenge, together.
Very truly yours,
Jay

name: Shahid Buttar
subject: Happy Friday the 13th!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shahid Buttar for Congress Committee, 1390 Market St
body:
Friday the 13th brings to mind the horror that awaits the future if we don’t end the corporate corruption of Washington soon. | | |
---
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yRkW_Sw2xr1MvIXEt6jooTbMnsVYqhUO8Xwt4ORz78ORT8Pt3SALA3pMGVDypeKbyy2kgsjsCmnmy8k7FgsqB6wuCJ9K2SYervuUQSBWz0OzTA2se7-S4lMo3twa9LqS9hg866ge-kTj0Ss_H0ah5uF-cjbKriSlMYSuthbsv8tEalktgmxQNlkv1C3tt8TBuboPpNFTTwsdoEkpCxdLSGsAtAq7ujbsTtGZjev89dvf1J4-3K1wDiWtFF37U_T6WT3LQHN94QQf9pCf9ExqKAdVT4x9EpVVpm82JKCk2gaq7cD8tMc8mVGgcgdSjHLNQRaBvG5ytXd8M2cC1Z4VOk/3m1/DfSc4GCDQ-q0KLpBGWI_dQ/h0/oIYUs-Ys7LfE6hwZpEQn9KXofHBA8dV7cf-KHJT2CSY)
| | Dear Peter, Between the climate crisis, mounting medical debt sweeping the country, and attacks on fundamental rights from state legislatures to the Supreme Court, this political moment might feel overwhelming. I know how you feel. [**Frustrated? Angry? Sad? Disappointed? Give voice to your concerns by taking action and supporting the campaign to end the corruption of the Pelosi dynasty!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTCxhAMhTRXK4t_BbI_sQ5MKg4pgeW9Q06n9fWtv2HFEMh0_l1GGyCGIOF6-JoWB6oVEBFz6XsWYdD9wRhNelejrzmRh7x2AyzUEuUNo8HhlPw-x0Jiz6b8A-FPbmxZL-6ybXOfoxNKWgYV-M046cWPjfAWKwkyB0dGdkOv508K813GrNsuT7lsmrvO4xLSBLkL3t_E9bYHwYlb_kExzaLytimBi6TzTCEFEn8dhleXyd8E9XaHpuz04TiD1c9-S9rlzn2jCVzM95PRrhvaz4uvCKJ09UAwcw2Lyw7hTr5RFQ/3m1/DfSc4GCDQ-q0KLpBGWI_dQ/h1/_trOSUFwUjXQd0_kFXDECnhB1tysaCBzIE2R3OHSAro) Outrage is frankly charitable given the sheer hypocrisy of Democratic Party leaders. The very same day that many of us marched in the streets to defend _Roe_ , Pelosi was raising money for the last anti-choice Democrat in the House. Then, she sent a series of fundraising messages expressing outrage, even though she herself could have stopped this outcome in any number of ways. She could have codified _Roe_ when Democrats held the Senate—and had pledged to do so—but chose other priorities, instead. She could have stopped the Barrett nomination in the same way that the GOP stonewalled Merrick Garland, but she declined. [**Are you tired of Democrats who claim to care about your values but then abandon them in practice? We invite you to instead support a voice who has stood by our shared concerns despite facing attacks from all directions.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTCxhAMhTRXK4t_BbI_sQ5MKg4pgeW9Q06n9fWtv2HFEMh0_l1GGyCGIOF6-JoWB6oQB0S5gC4dLfA0nMEw9xQL_A0O0iXILlxM3KfwSSfLQ9JfzdanFFpW3cLFKXisVbhoa0sc06NkrkPMVVw46yteeloRc03fEdEuffSV4AsHYvAVutosznfWcYie6qmgOZpVl_MeMbK8IsIJClMjgdlMD9EhmUjxr-SE-X7tUr-FxFqFaXWnTUF_ROxs75gcQfAmZ7aMzL_HWoLMVRRUyqCOhoaCXOS4mZm33UkhWBG8U8/3m1/DfSc4GCDQ-q0KLpBGWI_dQ/h2/MWlEnaNkGieXJEa9itJcx_j7tsKsbbf4x-1bq6WKB54) Our jungle primary looms in under a month, yet the only broadcast or print outlet serving San Francisco to cover the race is a non-profit pirate radio station. That’s one reason your help can make such a big difference. We know that San Francisco shares our concerns from climate justice to human rights. If voters ever have a chance to hear the facts, we’re confident we'll make better choices. [**That’s why we’re asking for your support to help us reach every voter and offer the analysis—and the alternative—that news sources have done everything possible to silence.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTCxhAMhTRXK4t_BbI_sQ5MKg4pgeW9Q06n9fWtv2HFEMh0_l1GGyCGIOF6-JoWB6ofsEZGq4f9ThY7qevRCJt3NNUk7-O6uI-yMqjmK0bWT7oXPxOozTEyheWpO0CCm8EULgllYyIHX5_QkXokfj5JMHUWvD9mm5CXBl4UhjHz_52ZO5fDtR6eyFb4oKKysi9y24Y_GefjE-fYh_fOMnl2PSNwv4Ty4AeHCdrhe-KvTchz01xu9ZtUXh0YtuwwG-6marzLqNGSiKO3IKhjDNlYyC7KtWh2ftx2Q1z5rC22BR/3m1/DfSc4GCDQ-q0KLpBGWI_dQ/h3/hp-Mr099mCfP4mUAATRJkjiMCoKv0YYVPx4kuG2l7uE) Many voters today are concerned about hypocrisy among politicians. It was precisely that concern that drove me to run for office. And it’s only your support that keeps me on the field. Thanks for being part of our campaign to end the corporate corruption of Congress! Your voice,
Shahid PS – Want to do more, beyond donating to extend our reach? [Sign up to volunteer](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTNyy0c_kMvO1sM-_6WbdMUELUaWj_7LwLaWbfvP7JKlLP6_xQCIhbEtnJtOFmKq5nNTG6snRTX1y1KRXns8swjUjdF3QNKkGRo-ZJzBdVxGetGM9beGbGBuawkhHri-Z_-5xsQUo6ZAar34W7TQ2ZElRrk1UFSUwSU9lV1AHpwMdm-fcBcffejiRlttfBRr_cYkcZFlic8ar2C7FEnTyp62omhYU5qygifCUDxphJxMkt8_b0Tssf3vmnhxZlJ352A/3m1/DfSc4GCDQ-q0KLpBGWI_dQ/h4/izWbpUOvFddt48mNiGZexq28pDglkbtur6bRipa8Ft8) with us, or join us tomorrow to march to defend _Roe_! There are marches from Civic Center at 11am heading to the Ferry Building, and another from 1-4pm starting at 24th Street & Mission. We’re also mobilizing on Sunday in the Lower Haight and invite you to [join us](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkxX3ah5QHi27_S3hqiq7he0VO-1wH80a2iibCi9t7nX-IlkjuO4fqn_r1yZNkTVDNLteqh0DEuF3KArHxDcqxCNiNHbWk4OZyTF6RCquQ_25G-fAgx6gIRKsK6NKrbWm8ATJ169JnXsvdK5hOZolWVamCrfqKCAeE6d5xmYZHIJvrGU_RyTKTT15GMSMfrssMt50zbaqzpJIt9tlUtnGdMBYtkX2xafmAcUx6EOrU8zQSdjsLWk9gg8rYyMV3aWGUx2UiLSDOYdZiO0Kk09agz9TIw82mtlIg4vM-BdXPM8FKxuxRyxF4-2TZQuape85Q/3m1/DfSc4GCDQ-q0KLpBGWI_dQ/h5/gD5DLYWnEhsAba9fd9sKrH7OPnQcs7X2vo4s9eaD7LQ)! |

clean_body: Friday the 13th brings to mind the horror that awaits the future if we don’t end the corporate corruption of Washington soon. | | | | | Dear Peter, Between the climate crisis, mounting medical debt sweeping the country, and attacks on fundamental rights from state legislatures to the Supreme Court, this political moment might feel overwhelming. I know how you feel. Outrage is frankly charitable given the sheer hypocrisy of Democratic Party leaders. The very same day that many of us marched in the streets to defend Roe , Pelosi was raising money for the last anti-choice Democrat in the House. Then, she sent a series of fundraising messages expressing outrage, even though she herself could have stopped this outcome in any number of ways. She could have codified Roe when Democrats held the Senate—and had pledged to do so—but chose other priorities, instead. She could have stopped the Barrett nomination in the same way that the GOP stonewalled Merrick Garland, but she declined. Our jungle primary looms in under a month, yet the only broadcast or print outlet serving San Francisco to cover the race is a non-profit pirate radio station. That’s one reason your help can make such a big difference. We know that San Francisco shares our concerns from climate justice to human rights. If voters ever have a chance to hear the facts, we’re confident we'll make better choices. Many voters today are concerned about hypocrisy among politicians. It was precisely that concern that drove me to run for office. And it’s only your support that keeps me on the field. Thanks for being part of our campaign to end the corporate corruption of Congress! Your voice, Shahid PS – Want to do more, beyond donating to extend our reach? with us, or join us tomorrow to march to defend Roe! There are marches from Civic Center at 11am heading to the Ferry Building, and another from 1-4pm starting at 24th Street & Mission. We’re also mobilizing on Sunday in the Lower Haight and invite you to ! | ---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Shahid Buttar for Congress Committee, 1390 Market St., Suite 200, San Francisco, CA 94102 | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Shahid for Change, please .

body:
Peter,
As Democrats continue their destruction of
America, I'm proud to release my "America First Contract" to save
America.
My contract isn't just words on a piece of
paper…it's a rock-solid PROMISE to the American people to:

Restore our border security.
Stop Bidenflation & create American jobs.
End the Biden crime wave.
Implement election security.
Put parents back in control of their
kids' education.
Stand WITH law enforcement.
Investigate and get to the bottom of the
origins of COVID-19, Hunter Biden's financial affairs, and abuses
of the Democratic-led Jan. 6 witch hunt.

My contract will finally put an end to the
Biden reign of terror.
If you want to send Pelosi and The Squad
running for the hills, chip in $25, $50, $100, or any amount you
can afford to make my America First Contract a reality for
America.
Nancy Pelosi will be apoplectic when she
reads my America First Contract because it will highlight her and
her liberal colleagues' failures and draw a stark contrast with
their America Last policies.
But none of this will be possible without
your support.
That's why I'm reaching out to patriotic

put America First.

DONATE
$25 TODAY

DONATE

America First…America always,

Andy Biggs

name: Sarah Palin
subject: Why I'm running for Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand for America PAC
body:
| | Patriot,

I am running for Congress because I am sick and tired of what's happening in D.C. My special election is in less than 2 months, and I'm facing 47 other candidates!

Yes, you read that right...47 other candidates!

That's why I'm reaching out to you right now. I need your help; I need your family's help; I need your neighbor's help. I've seen firsthand the power of grassroots support, and that's why I'm reaching out to you today. _**[I'm not afraid to put up a fight. Are you?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60385589:6X7TKJocN:m:1:3299561967:EE101B0F45171E30306003E3E99E0957:r "I’m not afraid to put up a
fight. Are you?")**_

---
| | | [Join My Team](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60385589:6X7TKJocN:m:1:3299561967:EE101B0F45171E30306003E3E99E0957:r)
---

If I win, I am ready to roll up my sleeves on day one and get to work slashing budgets, cutting taxes, standing up to liberal special interests, and standing up for the American people. However, I need every single person reading this to immediately step up and take action to make this possible.

We have less than 2 months until my election, which is why your immediate support is especially important. _**[I'm ready to fight for you and I need your help.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60385589:6X7TKJocN:m:1:3299561967:EE101B0F45171E30306003E3E99E0957:r "I’m ready to fight for you and I need your help. ")**_

---
| | | [Donate Now](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60385589:6X7TKJocN:m:1:3299561967:EE101B0F45171E30306003E3E99E0957:r)
---

Washington D.C. is full of out-of-touch politicians who want to tax and spend their way out of every problem.

With skyrocketing inflation, out-of-control spending, and crippling national debt, our country can't afford two more years of Democrats controlling DC.

That's why I'm running for Congress.

I'm ready to fight for America by slashing budgets, cutting taxes, and standing up for ALL people.

Washington will never change if we keep sending the same big-spending, status quo politicians to Congress. I'm ready to bring commonsense policies and actions to Washington, but I can't do it without you.

_**[So I have just one question: Will you join me?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60385589:6X7TKJocN:m:1:3299561967:EE101B0F45171E30306003E3E99E0957:r "So I have just one question: Will you join me?")**_

Thank you and God Bless America,

Sarah Palin

---
| | | [Join My Team](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60385589:6X7TKJocN:m:1:3299561967:EE101B0F45171E30306003E3E99E0957:r)

subject: Now They Want To Subpoena Me!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60385207:6BQiKJoNT:m:1:3253819041:EB2C162DB28ABD0BF797CC98812C8038:r "Headline") Peter: The Cheney and Romney RINOs just won't stop coming after me... Their attacks are unrelenting! First, they're going all-in on my primary opponent. Then they filed suit to kick me off the ballot. Now Never-Trumper Adam Kinzinger wants to subpoena me (after calling me "insane") and force me to testify in front of the "Unselect" J6 Committee... taking me away from campaigning for re-election so Kinzinger's chum, Liz Cheney can "question" me. Oh, isn't that convenient? **[These RINOs are doing all they can to hinder my campaign and keep me from winning re-election. That's why I desperately need your donation of $25, $50, or $100 today so that I can bypass these hurdles and continue fighting for America First principles.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60385207:6BQiKJoNT:m:1:3253819041:EB2C162DB28ABD0BF797CC98812C8038:r "These RINOs are doing all they can to hinder my
campaign and keep me from winning re-election. That’s why I desperately need your donation of $25, $50, or $100 today so that I can bypass
these hurdles and continue fighting for America First principles.")** You may be asking yourself why Kinzinger and Cheney want me to testify in front of the J6 committee now and not in the past several months they have been holding their hearings? Right now, the most Never-Trumper of Senators and Congressmen, including a former Mitt Romney advisor, are donating to my opponents. **It 's a brilliant plan if it wasn't otherwise directed at me. You see, my election is in mere days, and the RINOs hope to force me into a runoff in June--which "coincidentally" is when Never-Trumper Kinzinger wants me to testify.** And if the money they spend against me can keep me under 50% of the primary vote, they know the whole RINO herd will descend to my district in full force to try to defeat me this Summer. The same RINOs who capitulated during the 2020 election heist and ushered in Biden's moral and economic catastrophe are using all the tools in their kit to see that I never succeed with my plans to stop our nation's slide towards socialism and expose their role in it. **[That's why I need you to stand with me and help me defend my seat from the RINOs onslaught with your $50, $100, or $1,000 donation today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60385207:6BQiKJoNT:m:1:3253819041:EB2C162DB28ABD0BF797CC98812C8038:r "That’s why I need you to stand with me and help me defend my
seat from the RINOs onslaught with your $50, $100, or $1,000 donation today.")** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60385207:6BQiKJoNT:m:1:3253819041:EB2C162DB28ABD0BF797CC98812C8038:r "Conservatives")We're seeing more and more America First Trump conservatives getting elected across this country. I was thrilled to see my fellow defender of Liberty, J.D. Vance, win his primary. **But his victory along with Trump conservatives all across the country are scaring these feeble, conniving RINOs to death. We 're becoming a force to be reckoned with... to the point that Washington can no longer ignore America First principles.** That's why they're throwing everything AND the kitchen sink at me - funding my primary opponent, suing to remove me from the ballot, and now subpoenaing me in front of the J6 committee. **[TAKE ACTION NOW. I urgently need your help with a donation of $100, $500, or $1,000 TODAY so that I can prove to the Never Trumpers and radical left that Americans nationwide want to defeat socialism and impeach Joe Biden!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60385207:6BQiKJoNT:m:1:3253819041:EB2C162DB28ABD0BF797CC98812C8038:r "TAKE ACTION NOW. I urgently need your help with a donation of

name: Herschel Walker
subject: “A white insult to black people”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---

Peter,

**I'm sad to be writing to you - _yet again_ - about racist attacks against our campaign for U.S. Senate. **

First, a liberal commentator began his barrage of attacks against me by writing in _The Nation_ :

| _**" Herschel Walker's candidacy is a white insult to Black people."**_
---

Then he went on MSNBC to say:

_**" I make a hard distinction between Black conservatives and these tokens" - referring to Senator Tim Scott (R-SC) and me - "who are out here right now, shucking and jiving for their white handlers."**_
---

Now, _The Washington Post_ has published new attacks from other detractors:

_**" Walker has positioned himself into being a useful fool for those who don't have the best interests of Black people or this democracy at heart."**_
---

and

_**"[Herschel Walker's] irrelevant to the Black community, and we should treat him as such." **_
---

**[The fact of the matter is this: the racist attacks are not going to stop anytime soon.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60386422:JSFldJoNh:m:1:3317145305:D8CC80837938AA0EFA95EF066948A71D:r)** We need your help to fight back against them. We need to show the voters in Georgia how low some folks are willing to go to defame me and poison my image ahead of November's election.

If you reject the LIE that Black and Brown Americans are required to be Democrats, as some mistakenly believe, **[would you chip in $4, $10 or maybe even $25 right now to help our campaign set the record straight?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60386422:JSFldJoNh:m:1:3317145305:D8CC80837938AA0EFA95EF066948A71D:r)**

President Biden believes this lie. You'll recall that he told a Black radio host in 2020 that, "If you have a problem figuring out whether you're for me or Trump, then you ain't Black."

**I categorically reject that mindset. It's garbage.**

_**Nobody tells me what to think or how to vote. I study the issues and make up my own mind informed by my faith and values.**_

The simple truth is that the people making these racist attacks against me believe I pose a threat to the Democrat Party's hold over Black voters. They're attacking because they're scared.

**[Please help our campaign fight back against these racist attacks by chipping in whatever you can right now.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60386422:JSFldJoNh:m:1:3317145305:D8CC80837938AA0EFA95EF066948A71D:r)**

Thank you for helping us defeat these lies and win this critical Senate race.

Respectfully,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60386422:JSFldJoNh:m:1:3317145305:D8CC80837938AA0EFA95EF066948A71D:r)

Herschel Walker
PROUD AMERICAN

[** Donate Today -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60386422:JSFldJoNh:m:1:3317145305:D8CC80837938AA0EFA95EF066948A71D:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60386423:JSFldJoNh:m:1:3317145305:D8CC80837938AA0EFA95EF066948A71D:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60386424:JSFldJoNh:m:1:3317145305:D8CC80837938AA0EFA95EF066948A71D:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60386425:JSFldJoNh:m:1:3317145305:D8CC80837938AA0EFA95EF066948A71D:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60386426:JSFldJoNh:m:1:3317145305:D8CC80837938AA0EFA95EF066948A71D:r)

| | NORTHERN, Mich. — We say this with love to our fellow Democrats. Over the past decade, voters in rural America feel abandoned. The message rural voters have heard is "You don’t matter." The future of the Democratic Party — and indeed our democracy — demands we revive our relationship with rural communities. [This New York Times article](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45292450/345321237/-1788836983?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTZlZTA4Mi02Y2QzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OgtWAvfDodThyYFscImf3TVnOANmmSOlm8aFIhT-Y_0=&emci=733550ee-5dd3-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=116ee082-6cd3-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=15167427) highlights what many in Northern Michigan and the UP feel. Here are paraphrased excerpts of that full article.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45292451/345321238/-1788836983?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTZlZTA4Mi02Y2QzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OgtWAvfDodThyYFscImf3TVnOANmmSOlm8aFIhT-Y_0=&emci=733550ee-5dd3-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=116ee082-6cd3-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=15167427)
---
Democrats can still win conservative rural districts if they take the time to drive down the long dirt roads where we grew up, have face-to-face conversations with moderate Republican and independent voters and speak a different language, one rooted in values. It worked for a 25-year-old climate activist with unabashedly progressive politics. Chloe Maxmin was an unlikely choice to be competitive — let alone win — in a conservative district that falls mostly within the bounds of a rural Maine county with the oldest population in the state. But in 2018, she won a State House seat with almost 53 percent of the vote. Two years later, she ran for State Senate, challenging the highest-ranking Republican in state office, the Senate minority leader. And again, in one of the most rural districts in the state, voters chose the young, first-term Democrat. It was proof the governing dogmas of American politics should be challenged. Over the past decade, many Democrats seem to have stopped trying to persuade people who disagree with them, counting instead on demographic shifts they believed would carry them to victory — if only they could turn out their core supporters. The choice to prioritize turnout in Democratic strongholds over persuasion of moderate voters has cost the party election after election. But Democrats can run and win in communities the party writes off — and they do not need to be a 'Joe Manchin' to do it. Since 2008, residents of small towns have fallen behind cities on many major economic benchmarks, and they watched helplessly as more power and wealth were consolidated in cities. We saw up close the loss, hopelessness, and frustration. Ceding rural America leaves a narrow path to victory even in the best circumstances. The party establishment doesn’t understand that rural life is rooted in shared values of independence, common sense, tradition, frugality, community, and hard work. **Rural folks vote on what rings true and personal to them: Can this person be trusted? Are they authentic?** Something has to change. The Democrats need a profoundly different strategy if they are to restore their reputation as champions of working people, committed to improving their lives, and undaunted by wealth and power. The only way for Democrats to regain traction in rural places is by running strong campaigns in districts that usually back Republicans. Even though it’s hard work with no guaranteed outcome, it is necessary. Through the simple act of listening, we almost always catch a glimpse of common ground if we focus on values, not parties. As Democrats, we feel every day the profound urgency of our times, the existential necessity of racial justice, the impending doom of the climate crisis, the imperative to reform our criminal justice system, and so much more. Yet, as a party, we’ve made some big mistakes as we walk down the road to a better world. Abandoning rural voters could be one of the costliest. It’s not too late to make amends, to rebuild our relationship with the quiet roads of rural America. We have to hit the ground running, today, this cycle, and recommit ourselves to the kind of politics that reaches every corner of our country.
---

My family, friends, and staff have put everything we have into turning our vision of this great state into a reality, and we will continue to work towards achieving that objective. Every day, we build and strengthen partnerships with voters and citizens alike who align with the vision we want to bring to the United States and Northern Michigan. I particularly love meeting and working with the younger generations. They are the voice of the future and are very active and enthusiastic in learning how to be involved. The United States is divided economically, politically, and culturally more than ever before. So, it's time to unite, and it's time to come together and push for government solutions that reflect the best of Northern Michigan's values and priorities. Blake is _**exactly**_ the type of conservative warrior we need fighting for our America First values in the Senate. _**He'll take on Big Tech, investigate Fauci and his cronies, and is committed to draining the swamp.**_

We can't show any weakness as the radical Left is attempting to destroy the American way of life. _Blake is tough, smart, and will take the fight DIRECTLY to his America Last opponents._

**[SUPPORT BLAKE MASTERS>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60386531:J0oZhJoNY:m:1:3299561967:06C32EAECA0A10AB36EBC2BECCBFCE99:r)**

I'm supporting Blake because he isn't a politician. He's a conservative fighter who will always put _**YOUR**_ interests _**FIRST**_ and never give in to the corrupt establishment.

_Blake is taking on far-Left socialist Mark Kelly, who already has a massive war chest, and it's critical that he keeps pace.**I need you to step up and help Blake Masters take back the Senate TODAY.**_

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zr4ft90lhcukou19nhcp6jfvfl57h4cjr0igltmo_rp22sh2s8i66pb2clh64ob6c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tdmc3in4cb0e3h3asdkcdqj2djlemrb4olgeprbcslncjjbcd74mmrm8pbim4rrfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1p34phhm2pm2pti6dj3ao5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zok7bva0bn53nbmodnibdovkl1j86go4lef7be5o_rp22sh2s8i66pb2clh64ob6c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbf7cbk0r5qhpuf40quhf8hrfalng47h8ub87q6g_rp22sh2s8i66pb2clh64ob6c5h2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zehsnu0j9fk8rdpet85sb4nh92afqk2qjcjg8jog_rp22sh2s8i66pb2clh64ob6c5h2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)? The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn’t just another alphabet soup political committee. We’re the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. subject: They’re still fighting for you
body:

Fellow conservative, America wouldn’t exist without our veterans. They were willing to make the ultimate sacrifice for the freedoms we take for granted too often. _And when you have a love of your country like that, you won’t sit idly while its enemies try to destroy it._ **Jeremy Hunt, Hung Cao, and Pat Harrigan all put their lives on the line for our country, and now they’re working to TAKE BACK THE HOUSE and defeat socialism on Election Day.** **Their****America First Veterans Initiative****is supporting conservative veterans who will give their all to MAKE AMERICA STRONG, but they can’t finish their mission without your help.** **[Join the America First Veterans Initiative today and TAKE BACK THE HOUSE with conservative veterans who LOVE America!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zau54v28pe6h32he96omuj9ha6eiiji75s0joqmg_rp22sh2s8i66pb2clh64ob2c3h2bs)** [**PITCH IN $25**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zamijrd5gi30050ahac7kfr7ein95as155bf655g_rp22sh2s8i66pb2clh64ob2c3h2bs) [**PITCH IN $50**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zb3dc9m9b8p7h88g63g83vv2aapvao8etklskl38_rp22sh2s8i66pb2clh64ob2c3h2bs) [**PITCH IN $100**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3s3iu11icfki177sj4r7etsk26q9ltlqekmbcvo_rp22sh2s8i66pb2clh64ob2c3h2bs) [**PITCH IN $250**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zacats97abt8cahgaceoj6n4tndd6t1koqbbvhj8_rp22sh2s8i66pb2clh64ob2c3h2bs) [**PITCH IN OTHER AMOUNT**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6lq8s9bdssuk7l0org8n048vdondafvnr0n25go_rp22sh2s8i66pb2clh64ob2c3h2bs) Conservative veterans are the key to taking back the House, Fellow conservative. After so many lies and so much disloyalty, we need to know who we can count on. Please take 2 MINUTES to respond to this one-question poll: Thank you, OFFICIAL GOP ALERT Sent via Team Scalise Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. 320 First Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. name: Great America Update
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6990%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=cvvpVWdcR2PtZ0PZe1NAbQ&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61081%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EdHNESR1%2bzy8N%2fUW%2fLAT2A&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61082%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0tP8vTFT8MQA4SA0GnijdQ&sysid=1)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61082%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0tP8vTFT8MQA4SA0GnijdQ&sysid=1)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6990%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=cvvpVWdcR2PtZ0PZe1NAbQ&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6990%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=cvvpVWdcR2PtZ0PZe1NAbQ&sysid=1)

name: Brian Burley
subject: Baugh Committed Election Fraud
body:
Let me be blunt - there is a better chance of raining pigs in November than of a Scott Baugh victory against Katie Porter.
| | | |
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NTD3vVpUzIXysb70UyZphxvOT_3_stT2JiSgMnwP-G-x0NhiFzLPhFjCvw5vCD578zON_dO1dE078T5AnJ0QAWQFX36voE5aJXnypJE4EzuSo2qfui6_lwAcV1LmlSOdnRVh90-bqTh9a3zrQSsVwLYUpgn8sZ5g-RSE2eBOb0eS5rYn2amFXQ8E-DJHRAh2hyZAXcnwNp2nU9x9iwgDJQ==&c=7rgqF-lHhx8iHjtupxNY9LxjXkw9LLRbMaHHVpySvVeDVMO4SEFzKg==&ch=y3Myy2xwDV7GwMJL1whvkcwF9W0_4SAnK9JwQBa29FL99HGMbByMmA==)
---
---
| "Voters are going to look for somebody with a clean background, who has no personal indiscretions".
Those are the words uttered by my opponent Scott Baugh decades ago. Baugh ran as a Democrat decoy against our incumbent Dana Rohrabacher in 2018. Scott cost us this seat four years ago and now he has come back to do it again.
Integrity matters. I don't have baggage - I don't even have a speeding ticket. I can win in November against Katie Porter.
I can win because I understand the struggles of everyday people in our district.
Baugh on the other hand is a career politician and out of touch lobbyist. He was indicted on election fraud and then later plead guilty to 11 violations of our state election law. Baugh was ordered to pay a fine of $48k - one of the biggest fines ever doled out out by State of California for election violations.
Most people would be banned from running for elected office in California for this track record.
But not Scott Baugh. Crooked and criminal career politicians like Scott play by their own rules.
Most voters unfortunately do not research their candidates. They go based off name recognition, party establishment endorsements or fall for distraction tactics.
Voters get emails or postcards like this and assume it's purely politics.
It is not purely politics and I am not mudslinging. This is the truth and the facts can be read at [vote4integrity.org](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NTD3vVpUzIXysb70UyZphxvOT_3_stT2JiSgMnwP-G-x0NhiFzLPhO5dxlG7jMhXp0a-7M36XcsP4tZ6tIxKtHWfjffaeCJrBr7zYSsSljk-gXR4lu-FOhNvdaTmH4dRT9E2OtygZ6qmGS9RHOT-Fg==&c=7rgqF-lHhx8iHjtupxNY9LxjXkw9LLRbMaHHVpySvVeDVMO4SEFzKg==&ch=y3Myy2xwDV7GwMJL1whvkcwF9W0_4SAnK9JwQBa29FL99HGMbByMmA==)
This is the future of our country that is at stake. Watch the below video which documents every step of the corruption and backroom deals that Scott Baugh is known for.
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NTD3vVpUzIXysb70UyZphxvOT_3_stT2JiSgMnwP-G-x0NhiFzLPhO5dxlG7jMhXrkQPDlOKpWW3MXQmMLjSwL3m1Dah81npPu12KrE2C2kwqoZfH3O5dpwbUVdzskaoO3Nw8esoB6Ngj1346Dy0XZPkZafyygvKFvb-e3Fhe3qrVCI-v67Wrw==&c=7rgqF-lHhx8iHjtupxNY9LxjXkw9LLRbMaHHVpySvVeDVMO4SEFzKg==&ch=y3Myy2xwDV7GwMJL1whvkcwF9W0_4SAnK9JwQBa29FL99HGMbByMmA==)
---
| | [HELP BRIAN FINISH THE JOB AGAINST THE ESTABLISHMENT](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NTD3vVpUzIXysb70UyZphxvOT_3_stT2JiSgMnwP-G-x0NhiFzLPhFjCvw5vCD578zON_dO1dE078T5AnJ0QAWQFX36voE5aJXnypJE4EzuSo2qfui6_lwAcV1LmlSOdnRVh90-bqTh9a3zrQSsVwLYUpgn8sZ5g-RSE2eBOb0eS5rYn2amFXQ8E-DJHRAh2hyZAXcnwNp2nU9x9iwgDJQ==&c=7rgqF-lHhx8iHjtupxNY9LxjXkw9LLRbMaHHVpySvVeDVMO4SEFzKg==&ch=y3Myy2xwDV7GwMJL1whvkcwF9W0_4SAnK9JwQBa29FL99HGMbByMmA==)
---
| Let me be blunt - there is a better chance of raining pigs in November than of a Scott Baugh victory against Katie Porter.
Baugh's special interest donors do not like him - behind closed doors they admit that they owe him their support this time around for past favors.
Scott Baugh's campaign staff do not even like him - they leaked their defense letter to my campaign months ago when Baugh first announced his run. A letter from former OCDA Tony Rackauckas is supposed to be Baugh's defense from taking any responsibility.
[Rackauckas was fined $21k for failing to report payments to Baugh's non-profit.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NTD3vVpUzIXysb70UyZphxvOT_3_stT2JiSgMnwP-G-x0NhiFzLPhO5dxlG7jMhXmiPKrZhid2zJz3vZW-Iz2bMKO5O5KbrUjj_E4xqPvib1rqCtCvITPoCXQNnsBAwOF9jTY9UYiEyeumSLyfymDhwxXZile8gxB5JdMksMpHBgbVaf8hMHM9CEL5BJIk5_i77BSB5dGN_ZG7bwdOYIQy6Qpy8-1zGr4EpeguBa844HpyfjSgU6-gOCkj11gDv4sog_8q_Bpft86jzD_fo-yHGKUqR4HSoW&c=7rgqF-lHhx8iHjtupxNY9LxjXkw9LLRbMaHHVpySvVeDVMO4SEFzKg==&ch=y3Myy2xwDV7GwMJL1whvkcwF9W0_4SAnK9JwQBa29FL99HGMbByMmA==) Isn't it interesting that Scott would pick such a impartial character to write his defense?
If we want to win in November it won't happen with the failed corrupt leaders of yesterday. It is time to give voters options that they can believe in.
Porter's dream is to go against a flawed candidate with baggage like my opponent. Porter has over $17 million in the bank - a huge fundraising haul. Imagine the hay day Porter would have attacking Baugh. Why would we essentially hand over this conservative district to her without a candidate who can put up a fight?
I am the fighter that will beat Porter in November. My campaign represents A New Conservative Movement in California that we ALL can rally behind.
Baugh represents the old guard politics of the establishment OCGOP. An establishment that has lost us nearly every seat over the past decade. An establishment that has pushed Republicans out of the state as they have prioritized liberal candidates like Baugh that disguise themselves as Republicans.
But the establishment is worried. Recent polling shows that their corrupt and criminal Yes-Man is in trouble.
No one has put in the work that my team has but I need your help to get across the finish line with a victory.
Do you want to win in November? If so, then I am you're candidate. I will always fight on behalf of you and on behalf of what is right.
We must win this seat and use it as a building block to Start A New Conservative Movement in California!
Donate your best gift at the link below!
California is worth fighting for. Help me save our district and then our state!
---
| | [LET'S SAVE OUR STATE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NTD3vVpUzIXysb70UyZphxvOT_3_stT2JiSgMnwP-G-x0NhiFzLPhFjCvw5vCD578zON_dO1dE078T5AnJ0QAWQFX36voE5aJXnypJE4EzuSo2qfui6_lwAcV1LmlSOdnRVh90-bqTh9a3zrQSsVwLYUpgn8sZ5g-RSE2eBOb0eS5rYn2amFXQ8E-DJHRAh2hyZAXcnwNp2nU9x9iwgDJQ==&c=7rgqF-lHhx8iHjtupxNY9LxjXkw9LLRbMaHHVpySvVeDVMO4SEFzKg==&ch=y3Myy2xwDV7GwMJL1whvkcwF9W0_4SAnK9JwQBa29FL99HGMbByMmA==)
---

Today on The Doug Collins Podcast, I am joined by Aaron Withe, CEO of Freedom foundation. We take a look at the way the teacher unions have played a part in hurting our education system over the past couple of years during the pandemic. They show that their emphasis is there groups not the kids the are supposed to serve. A hard hitting episode that you don’t want to miss. ### _Wednesday, May 11, 2022_
Today on The Doug Collins Podcast, I sit down with John Bachman. John is the Host of John Bachman Now on Newsmax. We have an in depth discussion on the state of news in our country and how it might be turned around. He shares about is own training and why local news is often the most important journalistic work that is often the least covered. Tune in for a great time. body:
| | Peter,

It's Herschel Walker, and I'm reaching out to you with an urgent message. Our Senate race in Georgia is one of the toughest races in the country, so I'm asking if you can help.

In the first three months of this year, my Democrat opponent raised a record-breaking $13.6 MILLION! That's $151,000 PER DAY or $105 PER MINUTE - both day and night!

_**[I know it may seem like a lot, but we can close the gap if enough PATRIOTS will stand with us. I’m humbly
asking you to give a donation of $3 or more today.")**_

Democrats know we have the chance to flip this Senate seat in Georgia from BLUE to RED. They see that we're virtually TIED in the polls, so they are FREAKING OUT. They know that Republicans will fight tooth and nail to keep Georgia from going BLUE AGAIN, so they are pouring resources into the state like crazy.

**In fact, Chuck Schumer 's Super PAC just announced they are going to spend $23 million in attack ads against me! That proves how scared they are!**

If we're going to win the critical Senate race in Georgia, we need your help.

In the 60 seconds it has taken you to read this short email, my Democrat opponent has raised another $105! Can you believe that? _**[Would you be one of 5 people to give $21 this very minute (for a combined $105) and help us close the fundraising gap?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60386831:64QMiJotN:m:1:3317145305:ED1EF76D07DEFAA3BC6336A66C68E97C:r "Would you be one of 5 people to
give $21 this very minute \(for a combined $105\) and help us close the fundraising gap?")**_

When you donate, you'll be helping us win in Georgia, take back the Republican majority in the U.S. Senate, stop the Biden-Harris agenda, and get America back on track!

To victory,

Herschel Walker

name: Hillsdale College via CIntel
subject: Your thoughts on American Education
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWj0yANhNN

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWj0yANhNN

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Good day,
fellow American.

You are
an informed citizen-I believe that wholeheartedly.

You love
this country. You make an effort to understand what the U.S.
Constitution says and what it means, and you aren't afraid to
stand up for America's founding and the principles of liberty
that define our nation.

Your
leadership and knowledge are needed today…

Do you
believe the American education system is failing millions of
young Americans?
YES
NO

We need
more citizens like you-informed citizens-because America is at a
turning point. Dangerous left-wing ideologies are taking hold
thanks to a decades-long campaign by progressives to attack the
Constitution and undermine liberty and patriotism.

The
country you and I love will be lost forever if we fail to restore
knowledge about the Constitution among our fellow citizens. We
can't let that happen!

That's
why I am writing to you today and asking you to be part of
Hillsdale College and our new, nationwide initiative-the CAMPAIGN
FOR INFORMED CITIZENS.

We are
the foremost educational institution committed to reaching and
teaching millions about freedom and limited government. The goal
of this new campaign is to build generations of knowledgeable
Americans who understand:

WHAT
the Constitution says
HOW
it relates to current issues and events
WHY
the preservation of constitutional principles is essential to
liberty

If this
campaign is successful, we will spread knowledge about the
Constitution among millions of citizens, especially young people,
that our education system failed.

These are
young people that "educators" deliberately deceived or who just
haven't learned about a proper understanding of American history
in school.

You are
essential to the success of this effort to make America more
knowledgeable.

That's
because we're seeking 1,000 people in each state to help us teach
the Constitution and its underlying principles of liberty to
10,000,000 Americans in the coming year, and this initiative
starts with you-YOUR knowledge and YOUR insights.

And we
must do this work without ONE PENNY of federal or state taxpayer
support, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student
grants and loans. Instead, we put our trust in citizens like you
who want what's best for the country.

So
please, share your opinions by completing the National Survey on
the State of American Education today at the link below. Thank
you for reading my email!

https://lp.hillsdale.edu/survey-informed-citizen/

For our
children,

Bill Gray
Class of
2001
Associate
Vice President of National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale
College

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 18, 2022.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWj0yANhNN

JUDICIAL WATCH BOOK _A REPUBLIC UNDER ASSAULT_ GOES ON SALE IN
PAPERBACK ON MAY 17

Our _New York Times_ bestseller book, _A Republic Under Assault, The
Left’s Ongoing Attack on American Freedom_, will be available for
sale in paperback on May 17. The paperback edition features a new
introduction that takes on the current DC corruption crisis:

Here is the truth: The Biden administration is corrupt but weak. His
party barely controls Congress. President Biden has a personal
corruption problem, has obvious health challenges, must manage
internal warfare between his party’s corrupt corporate wing and its
rising Communists, and his moral claim on the presidency is rejected
by a massive number of voters.
This is our third _New York Times_ bestselling book. The first two,
_The Corruption Chronicles_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58891&L=19602&F=T&]
and _Clean House_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58891&L=19603&F=T&],
revealed what Judicial Watch uncovered in our battles against Obama
secrecy. _A Republic Under Assault_ is a hard-hitting, fast-paced look
at how the Radical Left and the Deep State tried to destroy the Trump
presidency.

The Left spent years targeting President Donald J. Trump--but anyone
who believes in the U.S. Constitution, believes the United States must
have clearly defined and protected borders, believes in the need for a
strong military, believes in the value of hard work and faith, and
believes in the rule of law and American exceptionalism could be next.

This book reveals many secrets that the government and corrupt media
tried to cover up. Readers will learn how the Left continues to
assault our Republic on every front – from undermining election
integrity, to illegal spying on Americans, to suppressing free speech,
to destroying our borders and the rule of law.”

_A Republic Under Assault_ debuted at #14 on the _New York Times’s_
combined print and eBook list and spent two consecutive weeks on the_
NYT’s_ Hardcover Nonfiction list. The book also spent three
