That’s not even all of them – 27 Secretary of State races are on the ballot this year, and in nearly every single one a Big Lie supporting extremist stands a non-zero chance of winning. [] I’ve never been more worried for the future of our democracy, folks. [] Trump and his fat-cat friends are pouring tons of cash into electing these crazies and defeating our Democratic Secretaries of State. Folks, we can’t risk waking up in 6 months’ time to an America where voting is run by election deniers. But that’s what’s on the table here if we don’t step up for our Democratic secretaries right now. [] DASS has a critical mid-quarter deadline coming up Monday they can’t afford to miss. Can I count on you to rush $10 now and help DASS save our democracy from the far-right’s agenda this fall? >> [] CHIP IN $5 >> [] CHIP IN $10 >> [] CHIP IN $25 >> [] CHIP IN $50 >> [] ANOTHER AMOUNT >> [] Thank you, James Carville [] DASS is a national organization supporting the election of Democratic Secretaries of State who are committed to protecting and preserving voting rights and ballot access for all Americans through fair, honest, open, and accurate elections. Help us fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda by pitching in today! Donate Now []

name: Mike Huckabee
subject: 🚨Emergency Pro-Life Update
body:
The leak of Justice Alito’s draft majority opinion overturning Roe v. Wade was a blatant attack on our entire judicial system meant to intimidate the justices and every single American who believes in protecting unborn babies in the womb. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6908%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=%2fsquHFpOl%2bkPUUjxC2Hhng&sysid=1)
| | | | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61095%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mUdpRDuSBTZ1Lndrzs6qAA&sysid=1)
---
|
---
Friend,

The leak of Justice Alito’s draft majority opinion overturning _Roe v. Wade_ was a blatant attack on our entire judicial system meant to intimidate the justices and every single American who believes in protecting unborn babies in the womb.

Already the progressive Left’s political machine has ramped up the rhetoric and is threatening to end the filibuster, pack the Court, create a federal right to abortion-on-demand, and pour money into the states to make this the #1 voting issue in November.

**For those of us who believe in protecting life, we must not blink.** We must stand united because the lives of untold millions of our fellow human beings are worth fighting for.

As one of the largest and most influential Christian voter organizations in America, My Faith Votes will now be doubling down our efforts at the state level, and going on the offensive in Washington, D.C. with a focus on the U.S. Senate.

**[Please stand with us right now by making an EMERGENCY DONATION of whatever you can afford.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61096%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=icaAd%2b%2fGEhdIx7Laa%2b2cKw&sysid=1)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61098%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DpYmQRGZeWIRIoluudn%2fpA&sysid=1)
|
---
For many of us, this is the moment we’ve been praying for for much of our lives.

For decades, the pro-abortion extremists gained ground at the detriment of 62 million lives. But not anymore.

The whole ground just shifted, and we cannot get comfortable or let them intimidate us.

**[Thank you for your time, and I hope you will help with an emergency donation of any amount right now.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61099%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CVDKGlaRH7g7vZ%2fTDNV4sA&sysid=1)**
|
---
**United We Stand.**
Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
My Faith Votes

name: Sen. Raphael Warnock
subject: I'm asking you, here and now
body:
| | |
---
Friend – my team just let me know that we're falling incredibly short of our critical mid-month fundraising goal. If you have a second, I'd like to tell you why it's so essential to our campaign – and our progressive future – that we reach this goal and raise what we need _now_.
The truth is that the odds are against us. With the Senate split 50-50, the GOP needs to flip just one seat to retake control for Mitch McConnell, and experts report that I'm the most vulnerable Senate Democrat in the entire country. Republicans are coming after me as their top target for defeat – and they've already started launching attack ads to try and crush our people-powered movement.
I won't let them – but I need your help. I'm not taking a cent of corporate PAC money – and unlike GOP megadonors, I don't have millions to sink into my campaign. I've got this grassroots team – and right now, the only way I can fight back against these attacks and defend my seat is with your urgent support. That means hitting critical fundraising goals like this one.
**So I'll be direct, friend: I'm asking you to make a contribution – here and now – toward our mid-month fundraising goal before it's too late. This will be one of the most competitive Senate races of the cycle, and we simply can't afford to fall behind before we even get started.**
[**Please, I need folks like you by my side: Will you give $5 or more right now – as much as you can spare before our crucial mid-month deadline – to me and Kirsten Gillibrand to keep Georgia blue and defend our Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45296304/345333880/-82461949?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3427-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTdjNmY4MC04NmQzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DYIKhT-2U8sWZv6a8g5Ig4oWtV-HSIYW4TD1ETJwWHs=)

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: Remaining true to my word.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
I have every intention of winning this race ...
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45296688/345335327/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1027-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzdjNmY4MC04NmQzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A1MI_XZA7xaf6g3Bep-CDpeLc4PVSush4yMXDeiQu34=)
---
Peter,

When I first launched this campaign for Iowa's U.S. Senate seat, I told you that nobody will work harder than I will to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley and give Iowa’s working families a voice in Washington. **I'm someone who remains true to my word, and I have every intention of winning this race.**
Unfortunately, the fact of the matter is that Iowa's Senate race was one of the most expensive in the country last time around. And this time, with Senate control on the line, the GOP Senate campaign arm already has a war chest of $44 million to tap into. We need to be prepared for them to spend heavily to protect their seven-term incumbent, Sen. Chuck Grassley.
But here's what I know, Peter. Iowans are ready for change. I hear it when I'm out on the campaign trail every day. The people of our state are sick and tired of a senator who turns his back on our interests _and_ on our democracy. **It's probably no surprise then that a Des Moines Register poll reported only 27% of Iowans want to reelect Sen. Grassley.**
This is our moment. We can flip Iowa blue and protect our Democratic Senate majority, but only if we have the resources it takes to compete. **That's why I need to raise $75,000 before the biggest FEC reporting deadline of our campaign – every dollar from grassroots supporters like you. This is what it will take to win, Peter, so can I count on your donation?**
**[Please, rush a gift of $5 or more now – whatever you can spare to help us close in on this fundraising goal – so we can defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley in Iowa and expand our majority in the Senate.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45296689/345335328/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1027-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzdjNmY4MC04NmQzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A1MI_XZA7xaf6g3Bep-CDpeLc4PVSush4yMXDeiQu34=)**

body:

This is important, friend, so I’ll get straight to it:
**Donald Trump****has already come to Georgia TWICE to rally the GOP base for my potential opponent, Herschel Walker (R). They know Senate control could be decided by our race, so they're pulling out all the stops to defeat me.**
The good news is that we just launched a TV ad to fight back against GOP attacks and reach millions of Georgians with our people-powered message. **But if we fall short of our critical midnight goal, our ad could go dark – and we could end up ceding the airwaves to the GOP.**
**This means I'm fully relying on grassroots folks like you to power our movement to victory – and with polls showing me 1 point down, we have zero room for error.**

body:

You know me.
I'm not the kind of person to beat around the bush. President Trump and I have that in common.
**So I hope you 'll listen to me when I tell you that I'm devastated:**
The Democrats pulled in over a BILLION dollars online last year with one express purpose: to wipe out each and every ally of President Donald J. Trump. It's more cash than any of us could have imagined. This is bad. VERY bad.
_So I 'll cut to the chase:_
I know it's a lot to ask, but we need a [**surge of donations**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60386965:JnRNPJoKN:m:1:3253819041:94338D10D5634154F83C83C8CC2255BA:r) ASAP if we're going to save President Trump's closest allies... tomorrow will be too late.
I'm hoping you'll rise to the occasion right now before the end of the day.
[**Help Save President Trump 's Top Allies >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60386965:JnRNPJoKN:m:1:3253819041:94338D10D5634154F83C83C8CC2255BA:r)
Please think carefully about the consequences of what you do next.
**The way I see it, you only have two choices:**
You can either delete this email, wave the white flag, and let the Democrats overwhelm ALL of President Trump's most loyal allies in Congress with their massive fundraising advantage...
[**... OR YOU CAN STAND WITH US, FIGHT BACK, AND WIN!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60386965:JnRNPJoKN:m:1:3253819041:94338D10D5634154F83C83C8CC2255BA:r)
I've made my decision. I'm standing with President Trump. _What about you?_
For freedom,
Jim Jordan

name: United Rural Dems HQ
subject: Want to sign up to work with me, Peter?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY UNITED RURAL DEMOCRATS
body:
We still have open slots.

| |
---
Hey Peter – I know for me, and many of you, the events of the past few weeks have been difficult. The United Rural Democrats team and I have been throwing ourselves into countering the Republican movement – one call, door knock or drive at a time. [**__We wanted to open up more opportunities for you to get involved in helping Democrats, Peter. You can check out more info here →__**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/45299471/345347259/538953130?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkzMDg1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNjNWI5MWQ2LThhZDMtZWMxMS1iNjU2LTI4MTg3OGI4YzMyZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=12jPBYQUGqbJEaxR8b86gwWtw2hDYRVgqCIyByBNJ2Q=&emci=d678a4f2-2cd2-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=cc5b91d6-8ad3-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=9364878) We're reaching out to rural voters in as many competitive races as we can to elect more Democrats and turn the tide on a Republican takeover of Congress. The recent draft majority decision by the conservative-run U.S. Supreme Court is just one terrible example of what will happen to our country if right-wing leaders take over. **We need all hands on deck to stop this Republican movement.** Rural voters will feel the brunt of the GOP attacks on our democracy and on basic human rights. It's time for us to chip in and revive the Democratic movement in rural communities. [**Are you ready to join me? I'll be helping out at our volunteer opportunities this week, and we still have virtual or in-person slots open. The United Rural Democrats team and I have been throwing ourselves into countering the Republican movement – one call, door knock or drive at a time. We're reaching out to rural voters in as many competitive races as we can to elect more Democrats and turn the tide on a Republican takeover of Congress. The recent draft majority decision by the conservative-run U.S. Supreme Court is just one terrible example of what will happen to our country if right-wing leaders take over. We need all hands on deck to stop this Republican movement. Rural voters will feel the brunt of the GOP attacks on our democracy and on basic human rights. name: Patriot Marketplace
subject: C.S. Lewis on Christianity
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.patriotmarketplace.)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, Young people today grow up being told that their perception of reality is a matter of perspective. Recently, they are even told that women can choose to be men and men women. This denial of objective reality-including a denial of an objective good-is destructive of proper education, of religious faith, and of free government. Largely as an antidote to this destructive force, Hillsdale College is releasing its latest free online course,**"C.S. Lewis on Christianity."** Taught by Michael Ward, a visiting distinguished fellow at Hillsdale and a professor of theology at Oxford University, this seven-lecture course covers Lewis's philosophical defense of an objective good and his demonstration of its fulfillment in Christianity. **I am writing today to ask if you would consider****pre-registering for this free online course. You can do so at this secure link:********[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/cs-lewis-christianity-preregister/](http://trk.patriotmarketplace.)********After pre-registering for****"C.S. Lewis on Christianity," please help us****meet our goal of raising $500,000 by midnight on May 16 to promote this new online course effectively, especially to young people.****** Hillsdale produces its free online courses, as it does all its work, while refusing to accept government funding-not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. We are entirely dependent on private donations. With your tax-deductible gift today, we can enroll tens of thousands of young people in this new free online course and expand Hillsdale's other outreach efforts. Thank you for your friendship and support. Warm regards, Larry P. ArnnPresident, Hillsdale CollegePursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Are the Biden administration’s energy policies affecting you?
body:
| | | [](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyFkEtrxDAMhH9NckvwK69DDgtlb1tKKfQYVFlJzCaOsZ2W_fd1ulvorSB0GH0DmtG9Rg0cc9MLJgSruGJdpaQox6bFppUNalGNkqlMMVjIx9KT2z8Wg2AjhOu4eaQStzWfe4V1wzuQiiN0muuWq1oCw7plIDvg-ftluIBZjJ2eYaXex3HwYbAwxHksyJKfbkNVcFUIMYh86ecYXcjkKRPnNIFw96TLmbyJMFG5-SnJd19hrCZHaVmkIuz-k26HTZ73uA4IqwMz2Uw-3fG_dCbqgwnbnqIkwvktOMKY3nycVtJmXw_zmt5_iLjZSDYm9eVUvL6di98Cc99r92WWxYS6SbVNh-mnovhP5G-wvoSg)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. disclaimer_text: Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer
body:
I know that this race will be a challenge. We are up against insider candidates who are more concerned with seeing their names and faces on billboards than with bettering our state.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45301916/345357535/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220514-b2_fr_nd-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220514-b2_fr_nd-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220514&&&&utm_content=b2_fr_nd&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=15&refcode2=68374d30-8ed3-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODM3NGQzMC04ZWQzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8PxGn6Z0uYCceKmHDVTT9WsDnX4AMYVSmqbT7eHDfTY=)
---
| Peter, When I worked in the Obama administration, I saw firsthand what could happen when building a strong team. When you’re surrounded by a diverse group of people who share your motivation for progress, you experience healthy collaboration and positive results. The same lessons are evident in the classrooms I’ve taught in. When a group of students feels enthusiastic about what they’re learning, there is a vibrant, contagious energy. MAGA Republicans are obsessed with pushing our country back in time by stripping women of their right to make health care decisions.

In the last week, we’ve heard plans for a national ban on abortion, outlawing the Plan B pill, and making all contraception illegal unless you are married. I’m sure there’s more to come.

**And here in Kansas, abortion is on the primary ballot this August — voters will soon decide on an amendment to remove abortion rights from the Kansas Constitution.**

He has dedicated his life to the service of others, as a father, pastor, community leader, elected official, and non-profit leader. Mark is the co-founder and executive director of Mainstream UMC, a global advocacy organization dedicated to greater inclusion in the church. He has served the Church in Kansas for over 25 years, most recently as the Senior Pastor of Trinity Community Church in Kansas City, Kansas for 19 years.

Indeed, SCOTUS has become so politicized by its six ultra-conservative justices that it’s losing its legitimacy, and Justice Alito’s leaked draft opinion only bears that out.

So what do we do now? Our answer at the NDRC is this:**We keep fighting for our democracy – no matter what SCOTUS does.

Because our strategy to secure fair elections, and thereby make sure an extreme minority can’t impose their laws on the rest of us, never depended on one court.

We’ll keep fighting. And we’d love to have you with us.

If you can, please make a donation to the NDRC today.**

So what do we do now? Our answer at the NDRC is this:We keep fighting for our democracy – no matter what SCOTUS does. Because our strategy to secure fair elections, and thereby make sure an extreme minority can’t impose their laws on the rest of us, never depended on one court. We’ll keep fighting. And we’d love to have you with us. If you can, please make a donation to the NDRC today. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = – Team NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 700 13th Street NW, Suite 600 Washington, DC 20005 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

name: Charlie Crist Finance Dept.
subject: If we fail to reach this goal, our chances of defeating Gov. DeSantis will plummet
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
and we’re still falling short! |
---

| | Hi there, it’s Charlie Crist’s finance team.

By now, you’ve probably heard that we set an aggressive mid-month goal of raising $50,000. We’re reaching out to let you know that while we’ve made significant progress toward this goal, we’re not there yet.

**_[To close the gap, we’re asking everyone to pitch in a few dollars by tomorrow at midnight. Can you do that now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45303457/345362889/1828376163?amount=25&refcode=20220514_f_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTg5ODQ5Ni04ZmQzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sC1iXZStGGDfDAMGjuU4YZHK0fe-gK39CdI72SmsVAo=)_ If we fail to reach this goal, our chances of defeating Gov. Ron DeSantis will plummet.**

Unlike Gov. DeSantis, Charlie doesn’t rely on right-wing, billionaire donors and their deep pockets. He depends on his incredible grassroots team, and that’s why we're coming to you today.

This is our first major deadline since the initial draft decision on _Roe v. Wade_ was released. That means we need to show everyone — including DeSantis — that we have what it takes to defeat his extremist agenda and protect reproductive freedom.

We wouldn’t ask if we didn’t need your help, friend. **If you can spare any amount, we know Charlie would be very grateful._[Please contribute by tomorrow at midnight!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45303458/345362890/1828376163?amount=25&refcode=20220514_f_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTg5ODQ5Ni04ZmQzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sC1iXZStGGDfDAMGjuU4YZHK0fe-gK39CdI72SmsVAo=)_**

We profoundly appreciate your support!

— Finance Department, Team Crist

subject: Dave Beckwith for Congress - Primary is SATURDAY MAY 21!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE DAVE BECKWITH FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE**
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/davebeckwithforcongress.com/dave-beckwith-for-congress-fighting-for-americas-future-9020259?e=70e89e3dc3)
---
| | [ ](https://davebeckwithforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fae606123cc47ee5c50436c39&id=2daa0115b8&e=70e89e3dc3)
---
| |
---
# THE BECKWITH BRIEFING

#### News & Notes
from the Campaign
---
| **VOTE SATURDAY, MAY 21st**
---
| | **Don't miss out, !**
---
| **This is no ordinary mid-term primary election...
The District 10 GOP Firehouse Primary is on SATURDAY, May 21st!
I can’t get to work for you if I don’t get your vote!**
---
|
* Voting is on **Saturday** , not Tuesday
* There are**_only_ 11 polling places** and they are not the “normal” sites
* Polls are open from **9AM to 4PM only**

**Have you marked your calendar? Set a reminder?** I know Saturdays are busy for everyone, but **this is your chance** to vote for me – the candidate that can **beat Jennifer Wexton** this fall _and_ get our District and nation **back on track** to prosperity, security, and freedom. **Tell your friends and neighbors and help me Fight for Virginia’s Future!**

See the info below and check out my [website](https://davebeckwithforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fae606123cc47ee5c50436c39&id=74c09a1596&e=70e89e3dc3) to make sure you don’t miss your chance to vote for me! (Some websites say the primary is June 21st, but the _VA10 GOP Primary is May 21st!_ Don’t miss out!)
---
|
---
| | Voting Information
---
| **Don’t miss your chance to vote for Dave!**
* **Congressional Districts have changed!** You may now be in District 10! Check out my [website](https://davebeckwithforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fae606123cc47ee5c50436c39&id=1bac74db11&e=70e89e3dc3) for an interactive district map, list of polling places, and registration info.
* **Find me on your ballot!** Candidates have been randomly placed on the ballot. Voters will rank the candidates in order of preference. **My name will be the 11th name listed – but I need your #1 vote!**

---
| [Click to Receive a Reminder to Vote!](https://davebeckwithforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fae606123cc47ee5c50436c39&id=533455634a&e=70e89e3dc3 "Click to Receive a Reminder to Vote!")
---
|
---
| | Events
---
| Join me on the campaign trail and bring a friend!
* **14 May, 2PM** Darshana Hindu Community Exhibition, South Riding Community Center
* **14 May, 5PM** Virginia Federation of Republican Women Convention, Westin Old Town Alexandria
* **17 May, 5:45PM** American Life and Liberty Candidate Forum, Unity Braxton MS, Manassas
* **18 May, 12PM** Alliance Defending Freedom building dedication, Landsdowne
* **19 May, 6PM** Bull Run Republican Women's Club, Guiseppe’s Italian Restaurant, Haymarket
* **19 May, 6:30PM** Loudoun County Republican Committee Spring Jamboree, location TBD
* **21 May, 9AM - 4PM** VA10 GOP Primary voting! See my [website](https://davebeckwithforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fae606123cc47ee5c50436c39&id=c9acfb6329&e=70e89e3dc3) for more info!

**Interested in attending or hosting a Meet & Greet in a local home with Dave? Email [dave@davebeckwithforcongress.com](mailto:dave@davebeckwithforcongress.com) for more information!**
---
| | How You Can Help
---
| _Dave Beckwith for Congress needs your support!_
* **Tell your friends and neighbors about my plans for a prosperous, secure, and free America! Urge them to vote on Saturday, May 21st.**
* Check me out on [Facebook](https://davebeckwithforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fae606123cc47ee5c50436c39&id=ded379559e&e=70e89e3dc3), [Twitter](https://davebeckwithforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fae606123cc47ee5c50436c39&id=b23e60480a&e=70e89e3dc3), and [Instagram](https://davebeckwithforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fae606123cc47ee5c50436c39&id=047694d06f&e=70e89e3dc3) – like, follow, comment, save, and share!
* [Donate](https://davebeckwithforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fae606123cc47ee5c50436c39&id=e0cba91ea2&e=70e89e3dc3)! Every dollar you donate goes directly to help put a Conservative, servant leader in Congress. Invest in our nation’s future!
* Visit my [Campaign Store](https://davebeckwithforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fae606123cc47ee5c50436c39&id=211afd614c&e=70e89e3dc3) for great Dave Beckwith for Congress merchandise – drinkware, shirts, stickers, and more! All proceeds directly support the campaign.

---

body:
I am furious.
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60388195:6WIlfJouN:m:1:3299561967:B198EE6EF3B6D3E0A116AD22EABBCF1C:r)
I am furious.
After TWO ENTIRE YEARS, radical Democrats in blue states are "suddenly" coming around to ending lockdowns, mandates, and masking kids in schools. They claimed the science changed...
**But let me say this loud and clear: the science didn 't change -- THE POLITICS DID!**
Democrats are panicking as Joe Biden's approval ratings hit all-time lows. The polls are against them. And free states like Florida are thriving while lockdown states are still masking their kindergarteners.
_But I know you -- the American People -- see right through their lies. _
**If Democrats win in November, they will re-establish lockdowns, mandates and masks. **
I won't let them get away with it. They must be punished at the ballot box in November.
[**That 's why I'm rushing to you now. I need at least 2,500 Patriots to help hold these Democrats accountable for playing political games with our freedoms, our businesses, AND our children.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60388195:6WIlfJouN:m:1:3299561967:B198EE6EF3B6D3E0A116AD22EABBCF1C:r)
**[STAND WITH RON DESANTIS >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60388195:6WIlfJouN:m:1:3299561967:B198EE6EF3B6D3E0A116AD22EABBCF1C:r)**
This is the most important thing any of us will ever do.
If these radical Democrats get away scot-free, they'll know they can walk all over the American People without suffering any political consequences.
**But today, you have the power to be their judge and jury.**
[**Will you join my mission to hold these radical Democrats to account, or will you give them a free pass?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60388195:6WIlfJouN:m:1:3299561967:B198EE6EF3B6D3E0A116AD22EABBCF1C:r)
I hope you're with me on this.
For America,

body:
But it's going to take hard work and dedication
| | |
---
Friend, I have a few spare minutes in my schedule. I know that doesn’t sound like much, but between giving my all to representing Florida's 10th District in Congress and running a Senate campaign, these free moments don’t happen very often.
I just grabbed a cup of coffee (black with two sugars) and checked in with my husband Jerry (he’s doing great by the way!), and now I want to spend the rest of my time telling you why this race is so important to me. **[But first, will you rush a donation to my campaign for Senate? It's going to take all of us, working together, to win this race and defeat Marco Rubio.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45304005/345365188/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3184-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MGM5YWM0Ny05MGQzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pcNf_zhCl39OMmSahJuqKyVc1PDd-pgJKazgFd9L3to=)**
| | [Contribute ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45304006/345365189/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3184-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MGM5YWM0Ny05MGQzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pcNf_zhCl39OMmSahJuqKyVc1PDd-pgJKazgFd9L3to=)
---
Growing up poor and Black in the 1960s South was not easy. My parents worked long hours to keep food on the table, but their faces still lit up with delight the moment they walked through the door and saw me and my six brothers and sisters.
In a way, this campaign is all about making them – the people who raised me, loved me and gave my dreams enough space to grow – proud. My dedication to public service has required sacrifices from everyone, and I hope they all see how hard I’m working to do good and give every Floridian the resources they need to follow their own dreams.
**I truly believe that together, we CAN make a difference for our country.** But it's going to take hard work and dedication to do it. I'm almost out of free time and must get back on the campaign trail now, but before I do, I have to ask:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45304007/345365190/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3184-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MGM5YWM0Ny05MGQzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pcNf_zhCl39OMmSahJuqKyVc1PDd-pgJKazgFd9L3to=)
I’m quickly closing the polling gap between me and Marco Rubio, and I need this amazing and supportive community to help me surge ahead. If you believe in me, please give here: _[**https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vd_senate-fr-email**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45304008/345365191/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3184-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MGM5YWM0Ny05MGQzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pcNf_zhCl39OMmSahJuqKyVc1PDd-pgJKazgFd9L3to=)_
Gratefully,

Val Demings

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you’re critical to this grassroots campaign. My dedication to public service has required sacrifices from everyone, and I hope they all see how hard I’m working to do good and give every Floridian the resources they need to follow their own dreams. I truly believe that together, we CAN make a difference for our country. But it's going to take hard work and dedication to do it. I'm almost out of free time and must get back on the campaign trail now, but before I do, I have to ask: = I’m quickly closing the polling gap between me and Marco Rubio, and I need this amazing and supportive community to help me surge ahead. If you believe in me, please give here: = Gratefully, Val Demings | | Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you’re critical to this grassroots campaign. To make sure you’re the first to get important updates, or text “JOIN” to 77076 to receive text updates. & . I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. So, please consider =. You can also click here to or click here to . Val Demings for U.S. Senate P. O. Box 536926 Orlando, FL 32853 United States Paid for by Val Demings for U.S. Senate

name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: You’ve stood by my side since the very beginning.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
Friend —

The Pennsylvania Senate primary is in just three days, but before we begin this energizing week, I'd like to take a moment to tell you how important you are to this campaign.

When I think about this campaign and how far we have come, I don’t think of the folks who have donated the most money, but the people who have supported me in numerous ways, whether that be knocking on a neighbor's door or even opening an email. Thank you. My name would not be on the primary ballot this Tuesday without you.

But it's so important — now more than ever — that Pennsylvania has Senators they trust and that they are proud of.

So please:

Can you please make an online contribution to my campaign before our primary this Tuesday? We'll put your contribution to work immediately.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mk_em_q22022?refcode=em220514-1-pt

Thank you for being a part of this team.

Onward,

Malcolm Kenyatta

PO Box 3254
Philadelphia, PA 19107
United States

body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45304571/345368032/-74008005?refcode=20220513_Demings&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjI5ZjRmNi05MWQzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y20CCnoFMWZlijBYuHWInsL7m8z-e_kF1GRqZP-WsiA=) Friend, I'm Val Demings, and I'm running for the U.S. Senate to defeat Marco Rubio and win better, stronger leadership for the people of Florida. Just 10,033 votes (0.2 percentage points) decided Florida's last Senate race – so I'll tell you the plain truth: **I cannot win this without you.** [**That's why I'm asking you to become one of the donors to my campaign for Senate by splitting a contribution between me and Serve America right now. Every dollar you can spare will help us build the strongest grassroots operation to defeat Rubio, flip Florida blue and defend our Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45304572/345368033/-74008005?refcode=20220513_Demings&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjI5ZjRmNi05MWQzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y20CCnoFMWZlijBYuHWInsL7m8z-e_kF1GRqZP-WsiA=) Every day, I carry with me that I am a descendent of enslaved people, people who knew that they would not make it, but dreamed and prayed that one day I would. Their prayers carried me to this day – carried me through a life of public service as a social worker, as a law enforcement officer, the first Black woman to serve as Orlando's police chief, and as the proud representative of Florida's 10th Congressional district. **So hear me when I say this: Only in America can a little Black girl, the daughter of a maid and a janitor growing up in the South in the ’60s, have an amazing story of opportunity like mine.** The prayers of my parents propel me forward, even now, giving me the strength and courage it takes to do what's right. To impeach and prosecute a corrupt president. To never stop fighting for gun safety reform. To push for truth, accountability, justice. [**I stand on the side of our democratic institutions, on the side of everyday working Floridians – but I need your help to win this race. Will you split a contribution of $20 or more to Serve America and me to defeat Marco Rubio, win in Florida and defend our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45304573/345368034/-74008005?refcode=20220513_Demings&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjI5ZjRmNi05MWQzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y20CCnoFMWZlijBYuHWInsL7m8z-e_kF1GRqZP-WsiA=) In my decades of public service, I've worked with some truly incredible individuals – champions of civil rights like my friend John Lewis, who said, "Each generation must do its part to create an even more fair, more just society." We're at an inflection point for our democracy that will decide if we live up to John Lewis' dream, friend. The modern-day Republican Party is committed to the exact opposite of what Congressman Lewis stood for. Marco Rubio and Senate Republicans grow more extreme by the day, more committed to a dangerous, anti-democratic agenda. Putting party over the future of our democracy, over the wants and needs of Florida's working families. You have my word, that when it comes to winning this race and delivering better leadership for Florida, I will fight like never before. Because when your friends and neighbors put their trust in you to be their voice, you work for them – and that's just not what we're seeing from Sen. Rubio. But it's only together that we'll have a shot at winning – so here's what I'm counting on: **6,112 donations, before 11:59 p.m. tonight. Are you in, friend?** [**Split a contribution between Serve America and me of $20 or more right now – whatever you can spare to fuel our battleground Senate race – so we can defeat Marco Rubio, flip Florida blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45304574/345368035/-74008005?refcode=20220513_Demings&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjI5ZjRmNi05MWQzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y20CCnoFMWZlijBYuHWInsL7m8z-e_kF1GRqZP-WsiA=) From the bottom of my heart, friend, thank you for being on my team. —Congresswoman Val Demings body:
Last week, we asked members of this community in Georgia to share their stories about their voting experiences.

Fair Fight |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45304884/345369159/1793776944?refcode=em_20220514_f_f_stories_s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmRlOTdiZS05MmQzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4CP8FfnGM4kyWerJTdmbxT3QPhcfT77sybxuiK9ETMM=&emci=cfcaaeb7-92d3-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=a2de97be-92d3-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=1037277)

| | Last week, we asked members of this community in Georgia to share their stories about their voting experiences — and stories poured in — from tales of voting at the same polling place their whole lives to feeling excited to cast their very first ballot this year.

People are fired up and ready to vote in the Georgia primary on May 24. But we also heard stories about barriers some voters have faced. So Fair Fight Action is on the case — and with your support, we can work to make sure everyone’s voice gets heard. [_**Please make a donation of $20 or whatever works for you today to help end voter suppression and empower all voters in Georgia.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45304885/345369160/-554492492?refcode=em_20220514_f_f_stories_s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmRlOTdiZS05MmQzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4CP8FfnGM4kyWerJTdmbxT3QPhcfT77sybxuiK9ETMM=) We heard a whole range of stories, and they made us even more determined to fight for free and fair elections — where it’s easy for every eligible voter to cast a ballot — so that everyone can exercise the freedom to vote. We’re seeing ongoing attempts to suppress voters of color in particular because some anti-democracy extremists are scared of losing their power if every eligible voter is empowered to make their voice heard. But the good news is that we can make voting accessible for everyone — if we all pitch in and do the work. **At Fair Fight Action, we work to empower voters to share their stories and fight back against voter suppression efforts. We cannot achieve our work without support from dedicated community members like you.** [_**Your contributions make our goals possible — can you chip in $20 today to help ensure free and fair elections for all?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45304886/345369161/-554492492?refcode=em_20220514_f_f_stories_s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmRlOTdiZS05MmQzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4CP8FfnGM4kyWerJTdmbxT3QPhcfT77sybxuiK9ETMM=) Thank you for your support, The Fair Fight Action team

name: Tim Ryan
subject: I'm pissed
body:
Derek, I’m sick and tired of this BS.
FIRST : It was leaked that the Supreme Court would vote to overturn Roe v. Wade.
THEN : Twenty-four hours later, JD Vance officially became my Republican opponent. This is the same guy that called pregnancy from rape “inconvenient” and said overturning Roe would be a “victory.”
NOW : Thanks to Senate Republicans’ abuse of the filibuster, we once again failed to pass the Women’s Health Protection Act to codify Roe into law. Right-wing politicians in states across the country—including Ohio—will ban abortion when Roe is officially overturned next month.
A 50/50 Senate isn’t working. We just can’t get a damn thing done right now to protect reproductive rights, expand voting protections, or cut workers in on the deal. And frankly I’ve had enough of it.
It has never been more important to win here in Ohio to expand our Democratic Senate majority. Folks, with all that’s on the line we can’t afford to lose. name: Deroy Murdock
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z9b2nqjh8gv1o2h108jrjtnfmusrff6mb4g390vg_rp22sh2s8i66pb2clj61or5c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2d9ieuqfbdbie4rrcdljkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbrr2or4edi7ec326ipn8c7669gratr1mtir0t30etgbepdle8pb0ob0s6pmeptgcv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj666ob6p1geao6cs9kmmq6fc5lclp2bs)
This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z662cfb3o3ar6su5rf45slh8ff2u5v4sn1epureo_rp22sh2s8i66pb2clj61or5c3h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z5fghfeqaitllvb90pve7re3rgo147a7mnb80j4g_rp22sh2s8i66pb2clj61or5c3h2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2znr6g416uehou1lt4g4uolct0neq881khgiqqio0_rp22sh2s8i66pb2clj61or5c3h2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Deroy Murdock, [please use this preferences page](http://e.deroymurdock.com/prefs/9z2zrn6pi8q9rtj6b5oks07mddt55f8j5msqd0644ho).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zp51m1ue6kt5ft0dckvi6klfb11u3l585vqtmlr8_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or5c9imco73clge49fg)

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45305345/345370870/1297369852?refcode=051422-es-roe-survey-ina&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NWMzZTU1YS05M2QzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KlKeHBpvTr2Ihubi5hzMLgSwwFURJEQZP2nbONDEXFc=&emci=8169b540-93d3-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=75c3e55a-93d3-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=9814644)

We are looking forward to reading your response to this quick survey, so we know where you stand on this important issue.
Friend —

Today, we protest the United States Supreme Court’s draft decision indicating they will overturn the precedent set by _Roe v. Wade_ , ensuring the American people have the right to receive an abortion without government intrusion and we stand with the millions of people of Florida and our nation who support this fundamental right.

**Private medical decisions made between a patient and their doctor should be just that — private. And the Supreme Court should not overrule the majority of the people of this country that believe _Roe v. Wade_ should be the law of the land.**

**[Friend, you know where we stand on this issue, but now we want to hear what you think. Do you stand with us?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45305347/345370872/1173618475?contactdata=rEGkByqECd5jaqHp8ElvcqBdy66kl7hepMyHOAADW41YrYlrxMYcLhoN5MPfUSDU7SP9BU0%2BR86%2BybQKdj9N%2F0PLiYmXX3tgpOk1%2FCMs6S2RUG7WJpTpX2t2%2BS7ugYWSobMcld1RJNHlH8vPub3QRA%3D%3D&refcode=051422-es-roe-survey-ina&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NWMzZTU1YS05M2QzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KlKeHBpvTr2Ihubi5hzMLgSwwFURJEQZP2nbONDEXFc=&emci=8169b540-93d3-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=75c3e55a-93d3-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=9814644)**
**_Do you think Floridians should have access to abortion care?_**

**[YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45305349/345370874/1173618475?contactdata=rEGkByqECd5jaqHp8ElvcqBdy66kl7hepMyHOAADW41YrYlrxMYcLhoN5MPfUSDU7SP9BU0%2BR86%2BybQKdj9N%2F0PLiYmXX3tgpOk1%2FCMs6S2RUG7WJpTpX2t2%2BS7ugYWSobMcld1RJNHlH8vPub3QRA%3D%3D&refcode=051422-es-roe-survey-ina&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NWMzZTU1YS05M2QzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KlKeHBpvTr2Ihubi5hzMLgSwwFURJEQZP2nbONDEXFc=&emci=8169b540-93d3-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=75c3e55a-93d3-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=9814644)**

[NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45305351/345370876/1173618475?contactdata=rEGkByqECd5jaqHp8ElvcqBdy66kl7hepMyHOAADW41YrYlrxMYcLhoN5MPfUSDU7SP9BU0%2BR86%2BybQKdj9N%2F0PLiYmXX3tgpOk1%2FCMs6S2RUG7WJpTpX2t2%2BS7ugYWSobMcld1RJNHlH8vPub3QRA%3D%3D&refcode=051422-es-roe-survey-ina&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NWMzZTU1YS05M2QzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KlKeHBpvTr2Ihubi5hzMLgSwwFURJEQZP2nbONDEXFc=&emci=8169b540-93d3-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=75c3e55a-93d3-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=9814644)
While Florida Republicans refer to pregnant people as “**[host bodies](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45305353/345370878/-315129960?refcode=051422-es-roe-survey-ina&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NWMzZTU1YS05M2QzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KlKeHBpvTr2Ihubi5hzMLgSwwFURJEQZP2nbONDEXFc=&emci=8169b540-93d3-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=75c3e55a-93d3-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=9814644)** ,” we believe in people having control of their own bodies and their own future. This is one of the major reasons our voter registration and mobilization efforts are so critical ahead of the upcoming midterm elections — to elect more Democrats up and down the ballot, so they can help protect this freedom.

We are looking forward to reading your response to this quick survey, so we know where you stand on this important issue.

In solidarity,

— Build Local Power

body:
If you believe in ONE PERSON, ONE VOTE -- this is the petition for you.
**[DEFEND ELECTION INTEGRITY >> ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60390662:JcX1MJoSN:m:1:3317145305:9523920AB0F421854E1DFB9D125FEFE7:r)**
Peter,
Dinesh D'Souza's new documentary -- _2000 Mules_ \-- just sent shockwaves through the nation.
**He shined a spotlight on our need to defend election integrity.**
The shady processes like ballot harvesting, not requiring an ID to vote, and Democrats trying to force through H.R. 1 all undermine the election system that makes our country great.
Here's how YOU can help defend election integrity: we're asking every patriotic American to sign their name in support of election integrity. [**We 're hoping to collect 100,000 signatures before our Mid-Quarter deadline on 5/15/2022.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60390662:JcX1MJoSN:m:1:3317145305:9523920AB0F421854E1DFB9D125FEFE7:r)

If you believe in the principle of ONE PERSON, ONE VOTE -- this is the petition for you. Signing on means you believe in the rule of law and securing our elections.
Thanks,
Election Integrity Alerts

| Fellow activist, [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/45307060/345379599/-1015736156?refcode=EM_FR_220514GOTV3_GOTV_KK_90DO_6_G_N_G1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYyNDBjMjhiLTk3ZDMtZWMxMS1iNjU2LTI4MTg3OGI4YzMyZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ye4XMGWfVV1ZqSos87VEFMSCFADd3BxUQgzbiCSjtGU=) Registering often ignored and neglected communities of color and the youth in Pennsylvania is a core part of our work, but it means nothing if we don’t also get them to show up and vote in every election — twice a year.

Too many of Pennsylvania’s youth and voters of color are neglected from the democratic process as a result of lack of engagement with non-voters and those who inconsistently vote. Neglecting these communities is a self-fulfilling prophecy, as constituents who are not engaged tend not to exercise their right to vote. **Newly registered voters are the least likely to go out and vote, but that is where our work is different from others**. We are conducting year-round, consistent engagement, following up to be sure these new voters have the necessary information to make their voices heard.

**[That’s why we set a goal to raise $2,500 by midnight tonight to help us fund full-scale organizing in our communities. But as things stand, we’re not on track to hit it. Can you make a contribution today to help us reach our goal and organize to our fullest capacity through the 17th?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/45307061/345379600/-1015736156?refcode=EM_FR_220514GOTV3_GOTV_KK_90DO_6_G_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYyNDBjMjhiLTk3ZDMtZWMxMS1iNjU2LTI4MTg3OGI4YzMyZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ye4XMGWfVV1ZqSos87VEFMSCFADd3BxUQgzbiCSjtGU=)**
[DONATE NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/45307062/345379601/-1015736156?refcode=EM_FR_220514GOTV3_GOTV_KK_90DO_6_G_N_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYyNDBjMjhiLTk3ZDMtZWMxMS1iNjU2LTI4MTg3OGI4YzMyZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ye4XMGWfVV1ZqSos87VEFMSCFADd3BxUQgzbiCSjtGU=) With our democracy and our rights in peril, we need to ensure that Black, brown and young voters are able to make their voices heard and get their needs met.

We must engage and empower these communities in order to expand the electorate in Pennsylvania for it to reflect our demographically changing population.

**[Fellow activist, with so much at stake in this primary, it’s crucial we give Black, brown, and young voters the support they need to have an equal say in the candidates and values we vote in. Hello,
2016 was the first year I ran for Senate – and it was a bad year for Democrats. My race wasn’t called until late the next day, after my Republican opponent called me to concede.
We had flipped New Hampshire’s Senate seat from red to blue by just 1,017 votes.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45307212/345380104/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk1001-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjgwYzM0NC05N2QzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mZaORsCLsbX4LWy6Iq5IFZZ3b7NtiLz-1hoYPWQi8wA=)
I say “we” flipped because no one wins by 1,017 votes on their own. My staff, volunteers, and family will tell you that after we won, I thanked them for the part they played in winning one of the closest Senate races in history. We truly wouldn’t have persevered without them.
**If each and every person who helped by donating, knocking doors, or calling voters hadn’t done what they did for our campaign, I would have lost.**
Unbelievably, the stakes are higher now than they were six years ago. The most recent public poll shows me down by two points to an anti-choice opponent, and political experts from Rachel Maddow to Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight are saying I have a difficult reelection fight ahead of me. Knowing what the margins in my last race were, I can’t win – and protect Democrats’ Senate majority – without you. Yes, __you__ , and our grassroots supporters.
It’s not hyperbole to say that this election could come down to what you do right now. **I’m counting on you.**
**[Please donate $3 or any amount that works for you before our upcoming deadline to help us win in purple New Hampshire and stop Mitch McConnell from regaining a Republican majority in the Senate. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45307213/345380114/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&amount=3&refcode=mh-jtk1001-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjgwYzM0NC05N2QzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mZaORsCLsbX4LWy6Iq5IFZZ3b7NtiLz-1hoYPWQi8wA=)**

clean_body: | | | = Hello, 2016 was the first year I ran for Senate – and it was a bad year for Democrats. My race wasn’t called until late the next day, after my Republican opponent called me to concede. We had flipped New Hampshire’s Senate seat from red to blue by just 1,017 votes. = I say “we” flipped because no one wins by 1,017 votes on their own. My staff, volunteers, and family will tell you that after we won, I thanked them for the part they played in winning one of the closest Senate races in history. We truly wouldn’t have persevered without them. If each and every person who helped by donating, knocking doors, or calling voters hadn’t done what they did for our campaign, I would have lost. Unbelievably, the stakes are higher now than they were six years ago. The most recent public poll shows me down by two points to an anti-choice opponent, and political experts from Rachel Maddow to Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight are saying I have a difficult reelection fight ahead of me. Knowing what the margins in my last race were, I can’t win – and protect Democrats’ Senate majority – without you. Yes, you , and our grassroots supporters. It’s not hyperbole to say that this election could come down to what you do right now. I’m counting on you. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = With every good wish, Maggie Hassan | If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, =. = If you’re reading this from your phone, to automatically sign up for our SMS list. body:
Come help Bill McSwain get across the finish line, today 5/14! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/billmcswain/tomorrow-mcswain-for-governor-phone-banking-8989437?e=b1ec95759b)

##
Bill McSwain for Governor: Final Day of Action is TODAY!
May 14, 2022 Good morning, McSwain supporters!

**Today, May 14,** Bill McSwain will be having his final Day of Action!

Please join us today from 9:00 AM-2:00 PM to reach out to the voters of Chester County. We will be gathering from 9:00 AM-10:00 AM to hear from Bill and distribute materials to give to voters throughout the day!

---
|
---
| Thank you,

Derek Rockey
Field Director
Bill McSwain for Governor
717-706-2719

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: Bold faced lie
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DAN CRENSHAW FOR CONGRESS
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mUzRLpe5YAOstGnvHkMCeDOHNQwa13OZGUGhQBnBTK3tRDaE6q8UhTHrz1CbehYm1c7r3IxCiDcprUPfnLm6DMrwH1RnSgddR55LRpuTM6ME3CXLkCukeP1kRpA9VY0tApyzjAoM7LP0ulxmvKhToBXHHJWBLjDsZTpS6pTHL1q94mJ2BZ4IJwp6x-VuKCu7ex2UdVA3frLOdu9-WnfT9ftAzpb4zs91iZJBhtuym4jXxqXKmQeMj4bAjULUF9_GgxvMp2lK8utOFdxxpYgYZK2p7voBR0_F6sZEbrQuoUJ8BO34FHsvd5x0Hpwa3pEfD1MPVnBp10Qkv5DhHmPKZOXEvV4ZVHui&c=pwZlj6diZ4DoIABLmItwFgKN7R5Rh-SNRMhqS--7bMCOYIZ2R2wM8g==&ch=9a0O07FUaOpUmrqvc5YuPs-3l2XyJp9nP4xGUx6D89Fe4PrnUpD-jg==)
---
|
Peter-
Dan Crenshaw here.
This week, I called out the Biden Administration's new "Ministry of Truth" for ignoring blatant propaganda and lies about President Trump's Operation Warp Speed. I also continued to demand that Joe Biden take action to stop the border crisis he created and stop attacking America's oil and gas industry.
Thank you for your support. Now, here's your brief:
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| Ministry of Truth? Or Ministry of Propaganda?
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mUzRLpe5YAOstGnvHkMCeDOHNQwa13OZGUGhQBnBTK3tRDaE6q8UhTHrz1CbehYm_9m2sWBzJyR_3CUb38L3YeB7gvOTXAY_wIIrsnZQn_JE5EX-Yqw5aLRWR0kZqp4zfUqdTUwQrgySfDHv8X-oLEkc8LyKreTbewuuqYACKjOAUy1yB8Ft3bzDcj-hw6SO6aOPj8bfKxg=&c=pwZlj6diZ4DoIABLmItwFgKN7R5Rh-SNRMhqS--7bMCOYIZ2R2wM8g==&ch=9a0O07FUaOpUmrqvc5YuPs-3l2XyJp9nP4xGUx6D89Fe4PrnUpD-jg==)
---
| |
---
| Joe Biden established a new "Ministry of Truth" at the Department of Homeland Security in order to "combat disinformation that poses a threat to the homeland."
We all know what that means: targeting speech from conservatives that the left disagrees with.
And we all know that this new ridiculous department won't fact check all "disinformation," especially not the blatant lies coming from the White House.
The White House this week claimed that, when Biden took office, NO VACCINES WERE AVAILABLE. That couldn't be further from the truth. We all know that President Trump's Operation Warp Speed had delivered millions of vaccines by the time Joe Biden took office. Even the Washington Post told the White House to delete this tweet because it is a bold faced lie.
Another lie the "Ministry of Truth" won't fact check? The lie from the Secretary of Homeland Security - which will oversee this new Orwellian department - that our border is secure, as he claimed during sworn Congressional testimony recently.
Maybe Joe Biden and the Department of Homeland Security should focus more on the border crisis they created instead of silencing political speech they don't like.
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| The Border Crisis is Fueling a Drug Crisis
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mUzRLpe5YAOstGnvHkMCeDOHNQwa13OZGUGhQBnBTK3tRDaE6q8UhTHrz1CbehYm5lHaOawMyS6xPstKCHZVJ86x4EzyoykKYrwOYoUS_YFrDV0MKHe6gKz-UJKQuePZ6i4LGk3fHyUSbAm3VNiSScA4s2m5t9J7QM2rmVs31oZc-XFJbVskE1Eqzj3cGir-QXYFkz8ezmk9Nl0tEGy7oe-1nzdTb54pG1mVhaRP_HgZoXciemPIP8foBAmaDVXZ&c=pwZlj6diZ4DoIABLmItwFgKN7R5Rh-SNRMhqS--7bMCOYIZ2R2wM8g==&ch=9a0O07FUaOpUmrqvc5YuPs-3l2XyJp9nP4xGUx6D89Fe4PrnUpD-jg==)
---
| [CLICK HERE OR ON THE IMAGE ABOVE TO READ THE ARTICLE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mUzRLpe5YAOstGnvHkMCeDOHNQwa13OZGUGhQBnBTK3tRDaE6q8UhTHrz1CbehYm5lHaOawMyS6xPstKCHZVJ86x4EzyoykKYrwOYoUS_YFrDV0MKHe6gKz-UJKQuePZ6i4LGk3fHyUSbAm3VNiSScA4s2m5t9J7QM2rmVs31oZc-XFJbVskE1Eqzj3cGir-QXYFkz8ezmk9Nl0tEGy7oe-1nzdTb54pG1mVhaRP_HgZoXciemPIP8foBAmaDVXZ&c=pwZlj6diZ4DoIABLmItwFgKN7R5Rh-SNRMhqS--7bMCOYIZ2R2wM8g==&ch=9a0O07FUaOpUmrqvc5YuPs-3l2XyJp9nP4xGUx6D89Fe4PrnUpD-jg==)
---
| Joe Biden's open-border policies aren't just fueling an illegal immigration crisis, they're fueling an overdose crisis as well.
This week, it was reported that more than 107,000 Americans died from overdoses last year, two-thirds from synthetic opioids like fentanyl, which drug cartels smuggle across our southern border and into our communities.
Biden's border crisis is a direct threat to our national security and the safety of all Americans.
Joe Biden could do something very simple to secure our border: Reimplement the Trump policies that discouraged illegal immigration. Policies like the Remain in Mexico Program, asylum cooperation agreements from Northern Triangle countries, and basic enforcement of our immigration laws.
But Joe Biden refuses to do this because he cares more about what radical immigration groups want than the interests of the vast majority of Americans.
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| No Leases. No Energy.
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mUzRLpe5YAOstGnvHkMCeDOHNQwa13OZGUGhQBnBTK3tRDaE6q8UhTHrz1CbehYmif4YtaDFnNTQOeT96L4jL-5eJiZenDL6nftnI-QLKo1pXPaP_rLk0RMpR5OdfvyblIhU3RlmRxN_XTondd5rjT2tmqamJMrYODIEIrcyyVGRsmr92iaKkFlCmnHnhDRUC3E9rEtwZ04=&c=pwZlj6diZ4DoIABLmItwFgKN7R5Rh-SNRMhqS--7bMCOYIZ2R2wM8g==&ch=9a0O07FUaOpUmrqvc5YuPs-3l2XyJp9nP4xGUx6D89Fe4PrnUpD-jg==)
---
| Joe Biden has been in office for almost 500 days and has yet to lease one acre of land to drill oil in America. It's very simple: if you don't lease land to oil companies for drilling, you will never fix the energy crisis we currently face.
Joe Biden declared war on American oil and gas since the first day of his administration. Biden canceled an American pipeline (while approving a Russian one). Biden outlawed new oil and gas projects on federal land and water. And Biden implemented new regulations that make it harder for oil and gas companies to get the investment they need to deliver energy to Americans.
This is unacceptable. I've introduced legislation that would require Joe Biden to resume the same pace of oil and gas lease approvals that President Trump maintained. It's a simple bill that would be a better step in the right direction for America's energy industry and the American people. But Nancy Pelosi refuses to bring the bill to the floor.
With Nancy Pelosi as Speaker of the House, we will never address the serious problems our country faces. That's why I'm working every single day to take back the House from Nancy Pelosi and her radical caucus.
But I can't do this alone. I need your help if we want to fire Nancy Pelosi and put our country back on the right path. [Are you in?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mUzRLpe5YAOstGnvHkMCeDOHNQwa13OZGUGhQBnBTK3tRDaE6q8UhTHrz1CbehYm1c7r3IxCiDcprUPfnLm6DMrwH1RnSgddR55LRpuTM6ME3CXLkCukeP1kRpA9VY0tApyzjAoM7LP0ulxmvKhToBXHHJWBLjDsZTpS6pTHL1q94mJ2BZ4IJwp6x-VuKCu7ex2UdVA3frLOdu9-WnfT9ftAzpb4zs91iZJBhtuym4jXxqXKmQeMj4bAjULUF9_GgxvMp2lK8utOFdxxpYgYZK2p7voBR0_F6sZEbrQuoUJ8BO34FHsvd5x0Hpwa3pEfD1MPVnBp10Qkv5DhHmPKZDTKANJ_T_pCSLBROxXfDVuWI_0TvZiDoA==&c=pwZlj6diZ4DoIABLmItwFgKN7R5Rh-SNRMhqS--7bMCOYIZ2R2wM8g==&ch=9a0O07FUaOpUmrqvc5YuPs-3l2XyJp9nP4xGUx6D89Fe4PrnUpD-jg==)
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mUzRLpe5YAOstGnvHkMCeDOHNQwa13OZGUGhQBnBTK3tRDaE6q8UhVxJ5Ah7ipGhOvDUVCVC2yZcMpAZjhPcbljsKqu6dLdHhdGAKj-ZK9lfyx7piYgO-0fxifzrHfEFeSy-fQ3PsNSRrA9XjNFZmw==&c=pwZlj6diZ4DoIABLmItwFgKN7R5Rh-SNRMhqS--7bMCOYIZ2R2wM8g==&ch=9a0O07FUaOpUmrqvc5YuPs-3l2XyJp9nP4xGUx6D89Fe4PrnUpD-jg==)
---
| |
---
| Our EPIC Independence Day party is BACK by popular demand. This year, we're bringing the celebration of our great country to Starshine Texas - a 25-acre outdoor, recreational venue located in the heart of Humble, Texas. Starshine is home to a hillside concert arena, a lake, picnic areas, a luxurious clubhouse, and a playground for kids.
Join us for fireworks, floating on the lake, slip n' slides, beach volleyball, mechanical bull riding, inflatable axe throwing, and a live concert featuring country music star Chris Janson (with hits like "Good Vibes" and "Buy Me a Boat") and rising singer/songwriter Shane Profitt.
All ages welcome. There is a large field in front of the stage where you're free to set up lawn chairs, umbrellas, and picnic blankets. You can also bring your own floats and inflatable rafts for the lake. After the concert and fireworks, those who want to keep the party going will move inside for a live DJ show.
[CLICK HERE TO BUY EARLY BIRD GENERAL ADMISSION AND VIP TICKETS](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mUzRLpe5YAOstGnvHkMCeDOHNQwa13OZGUGhQBnBTK3tRDaE6q8UhQhTYLsN3D709ZrmUSHzEpMiSumlX4jX_ZVvhad0PfTcSD3gaXEWSyBIukUbF4xTVobY3CVoOTvhjGIEb-7wYTTaEzXZof_b8ydEFuwTCfDxYFYichE1ctUe3ak4ty3cZYLBXweih9NCHvA2RPSRk2vS1HLH5Rc3YAbVVuNqkqMJuLIoXbDZi3lABKhfRb81fQ==&c=pwZlj6diZ4DoIABLmItwFgKN7R5Rh-SNRMhqS--7bMCOYIZ2R2wM8g==&ch=9a0O07FUaOpUmrqvc5YuPs-3l2XyJp9nP4xGUx6D89Fe4PrnUpD-jg==)
---
| Thank you for reading! Have a great weekend.
In Service,
---
|
---
| Dan Crenshaw
---
| |

It will be put to immediate use electing strong Republican candidates in swing districts across the country, exposing the truth about the Biden-Pelosi radical agenda to millions of voters, and building the next generation of the conservative movement with events like Dan Crenshaw's annual youth summit. name: Kathy's iPhone
subject: Quick update
body:
---
| | | | | | Peter,
We are in the absolute heat of this race and we've got just three days to go until election day.
The establishment is attacking us non-stop from every angle, but I have not stopped for a second. I'm actually on my way to yet another campaign event to keep getting my message directly to the people.
I just wanted to thank you again for all your support and tell you how much your support has meant to us. We've been shattering fundraising records - on a fully grassroots level!
We're going to be the campaign that makes history and shows Pennsylvania and the entire country that the people DEMAND America First.
If you want to ensure that we win this race, I need you to pitch in to our campaign right now at this link: [www.barnetteforsenate.com/victory](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xsu8QC9cyntTb7ffFuHnmCKqpbcXnHj7KxUJniQAvnRCvC_FoT_7SbgzFA_kQ78Ngj2JOqd3yZInyJTd9D_1X_FpVL5zycj7S3g264D6Yr0z0fbH0KXWP7yNNBToZEdyxiU66bx_ingOSvljQU3EpZlDTGslJE8V-RZ0rjX1l8uA9bhVWCs9Ww==&c=c1KAesvp8m8c2ZCnXdHbFPXxNjXbwTkvF3X78rZehT54_b_KibteBg==&ch=FjS27wViSx-NgE63NfzzQ8IajZzR1yrDj_zkVqFYpHCB6JLlI_-WHA==).
My team said we are falling slightly short of our daily goal so far today and we MUST keep that momentum up!
We are going to win and show the establishment once and for all that America First is what the people demand.
Blessings,
Kathy Barnette
Sent from my iPhone

name: =?utf-8?Q?Richard=20Painter?=
subject: In case you didn't see
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY RICHARD PAINTER FOR CONGRESS**
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend, We just wanted to make sure you saw Richard’s press release he sent out this week on price fixing. [If you can chip in $5, $10 or $25 today to help get Richard’s message out to the voters, it will be greatly appreciated! Every dollar makes a difference.](https://gmail.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b5e28d948d577e19f5422e846&id=eb0f875058&e=8914b14955) Thank you, -Team Painter

**For Immediate Release** **Richard Painter today called for the U.S. Department of Justice to open investigations of price fixing by giant meat packing companies in pork, poultry and beef.** Meat prices are sky high in the grocery store. The GOP blames President Biden for inflation. Here’s what is really going on:
* The Trump Justice Department for four years did not enforce antitrust laws, including Section 1 of the Sherman Act, a criminal statute with lengthy prison terms for corporate executives who engage in price fixing.
* Federal prosecutors finally brought criminal charges against price fixing executives in the poultry industry.
* Federal civil lawsuits are pending against the largest pork packaging companies, including Hormel Foods alleging a price fixing scheme going back to 2009 in violation of Section 1 of the Sherman Act. Two of the defendants, JBS and Chinese owned Smithfield Foods have entered a $102 million settlement agreement, returning some of their pork price fixing profits to consumers, but the other defendants including Hormel Foods refuse to settle the lawsuit or admit to wrongdoing.
* Similar lawsuits have been filed against the beef industry. As in the poultry and pork price fixing litigation, the plaintiffs include wholesalers, grocery chains and sandwich restaurants such as Subway and Jimmy Johns. These businesses all pass the higher cost of meat on to consumers, so the real victim of meat packers’ price fixing is the American consumer.
* Farmers also are victims of price fixing by meat packers. Just yesterday, May 11 President Biden said in a speech in Kankakee, Illinois: “Only four big companies, by the way, control more than half the markets for beef, pork, and poultry. Without meaningful competition, our farmers and ranchers have to pay whatever the four big retailers are saying they’ll pay for their chickens, their hogs, and their cattle. These big companies can use their position as middlemen to overcharge grocery stores and, ultimately, families.”
* The pork packing monopolists are among the worst offenders. As President Biden said yesterday in his speech: “Fifty years ago, hog farmers got 40 to 60 cents for each dollar the family spent raising that hog. Today, it’s about 19 cents. And as big companies made massive profits, the prices you see at the grocery stores have gone up and the prices farmers receive has gone down. This reflects a market distorted by the lack of competition.”

Richard Painter has been writing, speaking, and teaching about business ethics since 1993. Section 307 of the Sarbanes-Oxley Act of 2002 is based on language Richard proposed to Congress requiring lawyers for corporations to report illegal conduct, including price fixing, up the ladder to corporate boards of directors. CEOs, directors, and senior officers of meat packing companies must have known about price fixing schemes. Congress needs to fix our antitrust laws so they are easier to enforce and price fixing corporate officers are held personally responsible for ripping off American consumers and farmers. Richard recognizes that persons and corporations are innocent until proven guilty. However, the evidence in these cases - including the $102 million JBS/Smithfield pork price fixing settlement -- is sufficiently strong that the Justice Department should expand its criminal investigation of the poultry industry to include pork and beef. Congress also should hold hearings and subpoena witnesses and documents. Eating at Subway or Jimmy Johns should not be a luxury just for the wealthy. The time to defend American consumers and farmers against price fixing in food, gasoline, and other goods, is NOW. Richard Painter is a business ethics professor, not a corporate CEO, he’s on the side of the consumer, and he’s determined to go to Congress to get this done.
---

But with so many candidates running in this heated primary, we can’t let up for one second. These next two months will be absolutely critical to winning the primary and moving our campaign forward to the competitive general election in November, which is why we need to ensure we have the financial resources to stay aggressive. **[Wes and I have set a mid-month fundraising goal of raising $20,000 by midnight on Monday, May 16. clean_body: Hello, In just 4 days, Chuck Grassley and I are facing a federally-mandated fundraising deadline. By law, we’ll both be required to file another report with the Federal Election Commission saying how much we’ve raised and from how many donors. In the last FEC report, Chuck Grassley just barely outraised us... But only because he took hundreds of thousands of dollars from corporate PACs and special interests. This report, we have an opportunity to outraise Grassley for the first time, purely with the help of grassroots donors, and shock Mitch McConnell and all the Republicans. The polling shows this will be one of the closest races in the country. Grassley’s approval ratings are lower than they’ve ever been, and the latest head-to-head matchup has us only three points down – and closing! But with Senate control at stake, McConnell and his Super PACs are already raising millions to attack me – and their lie-filled ads are about to start. This is our most important opportunity to show Grassley, McConnell, and the Democratic establishment that we are going to turn Iowa blue this November. We’ve set a goal of raising another $400,000 before this critical FEC fundraising deadline, but I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give now if we’re going to hit it. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = After this deadline, all of our fundraising numbers will become public. We cannot afford to fall short now. Thank you for being a crucial, indispensable part of this campaign, Mike Franken, U.S. Navy (ret.)
