name: Tim Scott
subject: I’m all for #34
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60390689:JjP7zJoGN:m:1:3317145305:4209C8A46EC2E82E2D35CEC55B12F896:r)

---
Peter,

For me, the Senate race in Georgia is personal. _**Herschel and I have a lot in common.**_

We were both born and raised in the South in lower income families that worked hard to make ends meet. We both were taught faith in God and a strong work ethic. And we both did ok in sports. (Well, I did ok in sports. Herschel was a little better than ok.)

Along the way, we both embraced conservative values - personal responsibility, smaller government, the sanctity of life, a free-market economy, and a strong military. And we dared to run for public office as a Republican.

The Radical Left is _really_ concerned about losing the Senate race in Georgia, so they're _really_ coming after Herschel. They are calling him all the nasty names they've called me - just because we don't fit the Left's definition of what a Black candidate should be. I know what it's like because I've been in his shoes.

_**But Herschel won't let the Left push him around.**_

I appreciate how Heschel inspires young people, brings people together from all walks of life, and fights to ensure the American Dream is available for future generations. I hope you'll agree he deserves our support.

**Herschel's race could be the _most expensive Senate race in the country_ this year. He needs our immediate help to ensure he has adequate financial resources to win this race! **

**[I've set a personal goal of raising $34,000 for #34 (Herschel's old jersey number) in the next 48 hours, and I'm asking for you to chip in $5, $10, $34, or even $100 right now to help us surpass our goal.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60390689:JjP7zJoGN:m:1:3317145305:4209C8A46EC2E82E2D35CEC55B12F896:r)**

[** Chip in $5 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60390690:JjP7zJoGN:m:1:3317145305:4209C8A46EC2E82E2D35CEC55B12F896:r)
[** Chip in $10 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60390691:JjP7zJoGN:m:1:3317145305:4209C8A46EC2E82E2D35CEC55B12F896:r)
[** Chip in $34 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60390692:JjP7zJoGN:m:1:3317145305:4209C8A46EC2E82E2D35CEC55B12F896:r)
Polls in Georgia show the race is a dead heat. In fact, Herschel has a slight edge in most of them! But we all know that a lot can change when tens of millions of dollars of attack ads are flying.

Herschel may have the current polling advantage, but he's facing a significant fundraising gap against a Democrat incumbent who had a two-year head start. **[Will you join with me in making a gift to Herschel's campaign today?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60390689:JjP7zJoGN:m:1:3317145305:4209C8A46EC2E82E2D35CEC55B12F896:r)**

With your help, Herschel will win in Georgia and help us flip the Senate Majority back to Republican control.

Thank you,

Tim Scott
United States Senator

[** Donate Today -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60390689:JjP7zJoGN:m:1:3317145305:4209C8A46EC2E82E2D35CEC55B12F896:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60390693:JjP7zJoGN:m:1:3317145305:4209C8A46EC2E82E2D35CEC55B12F896:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60390694:JjP7zJoGN:m:1:3317145305:4209C8A46EC2E82E2D35CEC55B12F896:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60390695:JjP7zJoGN:m:1:3317145305:4209C8A46EC2E82E2D35CEC55B12F896:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60390696:JjP7zJoGN:m:1:3317145305:4209C8A46EC2E82E2D35CEC55B12F896:r)

Kat is leading the charge exposing Biden’s baby formula crisis.

| Friend
Kat is leading the charge exposing Biden's baby formula crisis. The Biden administration is one massive dumpster fire. This is typical of this administration: no plan, no contingencies, no way to backfill 43% of our nation's baby formula supply.
Watch her interview on Hannity here:
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_1V5Q6LcbUEhRSQfkjB26OrwtIBBGyXPL9hnR_teFXtfL0FzrQeWlIAy5BnTsKpNTCqF7IdIfOCE6OhN5zI8nlNWP5vT4xqObphNLiayDSDrqY3CdcmUmLGRtiWrGmbqYIYpPZsZPLuMWbrQIaIFdtKDC48lFQ8X1ysveusaf-MUyZdGZo7iYI-DamaSVG3md6t1PIBM_KrqL_nXFKmjw8EtUBCSk8ykXM0Rgfv1pPc=&c=wIqASTGgn7T6jHBx6U9OxfRdzgkccYqjQ1MKzl6IWaeAYNVPiUXS3A==&ch=_3c5aSxNdK5_AAsOiDIR3Bj-fjJNf2E-nYZTmKqFOppfzyKjQQQzPg==)
---
| The Left can't hide the horrible reality that Biden forced on mothers across the nation. None of this would have happened if Biden hadn't shut down the number one manufacturer of baby formula in America.
Of course, the Democrats will never admit that. They'll continue to blame everyone under the sun except themselves while they watch us suffer. It's insane.
Kat is working overtime to bring accountability to the Biden Administration for their America Last agenda. [Can you show her today that you support her fight to end this disastrous agenda?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_1V5Q6LcbUEhRSQfkjB26OrwtIBBGyXPL9hnR_teFXtfL0FzrQeWlIAy5BnTsKpNLvr3T-29JXc51TfNWS-jTuiQBQcz4ngke3rxJ6h8Yz4xphsOEK0LYmZQ15moWo6Dd6Mxc2pExBXPlMrHCByJ2hawQ9qIgFFFC5mhq24Q89GMz2TuODKg4J0ZQiZkKg4rFoxypbmJX-0=&c=wIqASTGgn7T6jHBx6U9OxfRdzgkccYqjQ1MKzl6IWaeAYNVPiUXS3A==&ch=_3c5aSxNdK5_AAsOiDIR3Bj-fjJNf2E-nYZTmKqFOppfzyKjQQQzPg==)

name: Jon Kaiman
subject: We MUST protect a woman's right to choose
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Kaiman for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/ga0JF3of_lLj4J_CVRaw1g4qW-uTYafcEj3rpELWIH4=/1eJWHm0ARGKZZvChvjmfaJx1mhoVAk-FZRC6p9X7PB4=)
Peter,
The Supreme Court of the United States cannot be trusted to stem the ongoing assault on a woman's right to choose. Our voices MUST be heard.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/ga0JF3of_lLj4J_CVRaw1g4qW-uTYafcEj3rpELWIH4=/bL0qMaPIUJ7AvQlx9xAsimrIkCwzMdzY9UF2e5_rwnA=?refcode=website-)
Two days after Justice Alito's decision was leaked to the public, I went to the Supreme Court in Washington D.C. to stand with activists in opposition to this attack on choice, on women's rights, and on human rights. That day, I stood outside the U.S. Supreme Court making my voice heard. Once elected to Congress, I will stand inside the Capitol Building making sure that all of our voices are heard.
We MUST restore people's confidence in our government. We MUST act now. We MUST codify Roe v. Wade. As your next U.S. Representative, I pledge to support the federal Women's Health Protection Act. I cannot do it without your support.
**[Click here to sign up to volunteer with my campaign](https://act.myngp.com/el/ga0JF3of_lLj4J_CVRaw1g4qW-uTYafcEj3rpELWIH4=/tNV8MCeYGVL_S0yePDnDvg-hYpzzzbuSVjpVLxxm7pA=).**
**[Click here to make a contribution to support our efforts](https://act.myngp.com/el/ga0JF3of_lLj4J_CVRaw1g4qW-uTYafcEj3rpELWIH4=/NPBeATpjZMdj2d57IO5pEshhzT46URxrmyoJrdxGUHc=?refcode=website-).**
Join me in the fight to protect a woman's right to choose.
\- Jon

Paid for by Jon Kaiman for Congress
---
Jon Kaiman for Congress
P.O. Box 222061
Great Neck NY 11022 United States

clean_body: Ted Budd Will Secure Our Southern Border Ted Budd Will Secure Our Southern Border | BORDER ALERT: IT’S STILL WIDE OPEN | Friends, When I decided to endorse Ted Budd, the choice was simple. He is the candidate in this race committed to Closing Our Southern Border for GOOD. I will be honest - if Ted misses his next fundraising goal, it could be detrimental to his campaign. To keep his crucial race in our favor, please chip in anything that you can below. Without Ted Budd in the Senate, we risk a Democratic Majority and a continued wide-open Border Crisis of Chaos. I hope I can count on you to join me in supporting Ted Budd. In Liberty, Senator Ted Cruz Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate Copyright © 2021 Ted Budd for Senate, All rights reserved.

A major way folks can show support for Gabe is by putting a yard sign on their lawn or in their window, letting their neighbors know who they’re voting for on June 7. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45310488/345395345/1399367573?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220514mm2_cm_90da_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTAxMDk1YS1hMGQzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xHMkJv1wfjNr3Nt3daoMR7YKVea0kz0--OyXVrbRBms=)

We are only halfway through the month – but so much has happened. In the past two weeks, The Atlantic reported my opponent as one of the most dangerous Republican candidates running for office and that he was **placed on probation** for carrying a _loaded_ gun in an airport. On top of that, a Supreme Court leak revealed that SCOTUS intends to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ , instantaneously stripping millions of women of their reproductive freedom.

The hard truth? Derrick Van Orden only lost by 10,000 votes in the last election – and he's outraised me every month so far. We know he is not someone who would ever confirm another Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson to SCOTUS.

Do you want him in Congress? **_No. Of course not. Neither do we._**

That’s why it’s critical to hit our goals every month. And here’s the thing: as Brad’s finance director, I know when we’re there and we are nowhere near close to where we need to be for May.

So much is on the line – and we know more bad news is coming down the pipe, so we’ve got to have enough funds to mobilize and respond as quickly as possible. We’re just over $2,000 short. **[Will you chip in $5 right now or whatever you can do to defeat extremism by midnight tomorrow and help us hit our mid-month goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45311089/345397968/-774467154?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2022.05.14_b1_mm1-sam_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=5&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.05.14_b1_mm1-sam_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTA2ZmIyNi1hM2QzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bDS_TX28O-I5NB1Sldy89FIxCDCJOvaDDPF-OIOTU-M=)** | [GIVE $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45311090/345397969/-774467154?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2022.05.14_b1_mm1-sam_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=5&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.05.14_b1_mm1-sam_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTA2ZmIyNi1hM2QzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bDS_TX28O-I5NB1Sldy89FIxCDCJOvaDDPF-OIOTU-M=)

clean_body: & the news about our opponent keeps getting worse | = We are only halfway through the month – but so much has happened. In the past two weeks, The Atlantic reported my opponent as one of the most dangerous Republican candidates running for office and that he was placed on probation for carrying a loaded gun in an airport. On top of that, a Supreme Court leak revealed that SCOTUS intends to overturn Roe v. Wade , instantaneously stripping millions of women of their reproductive freedom. The hard truth? Derrick Van Orden only lost by 10,000 votes in the last election – and he's outraised me every month so far. We know he is not someone who would ever confirm another Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson to SCOTUS. Do you want him in Congress? No. Of course not. Neither do we. That’s why it’s critical to hit our goals every month. And here’s the thing: as Brad’s finance director, I know when we’re there and we are nowhere near close to where we need to be for May. So much is on the line – and we know more bad news is coming down the pipe, so we’ve got to have enough funds to mobilize and respond as quickly as possible. We’re just over $2,000 short. = | = = = = = = Even with the recent news stories destroying our opponent, Van Orden still has plenty of funding from dangerous super PACS to potentially win this November. That’s terrifying, folks. We can win this election, but only with your help. We need to turn this month around and finish strong, because when things get hard – we fight harder. With your help, we will keep one of the most dangerous extremists out of office and keep Wisconsin’s Third District in the hands of a Representative who truly cares about it. = = Thanks for being a part of the team, Sam Langheim Finance Director, Pfaff for Congress | | Paid for by Pfaff for Congress This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com Pfaff for Congress PO Box 3606 La Crosse, WI 54602 United States If you would like to receive only our most important emails, If you no longer wish to receive emails please .

name: Patty Murray
subject: Not now, not ever
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
We can’t let Republicans undermine the right to safe, legal abortion care.
#
Peter,
The leaked Supreme Court opinion jeopardizes _Roe v. Wade_ in a way we’ve never seen before.
And earlier this week, Senate Republicans voted to send us back to a time when women lacked the opportunity to make personal medical decisions about their pregnancies, bodies, and futures.
I’m furious. And I’m sure many of you are feeling similarly.
But this fight is far from over. Today, people from all over the country are participating in a National Day of Action to make one thing very clear: we won’t stand for the shameful and extreme attempts to legislate our bodies and undermine our rights.
**[Please, join us and take action today with a contribution of $5 or whatever you can spare. Mitch McConnell only needs to flip one seat to retake the Senate and they’re coming for seats like this one in Washington state.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45311347/345399045/-1502580297?refcode=pm_em_220514_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODUwZmQzZi1hNGQzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zhqw6E-ym1pAt7vsHPOnY_xFa6DkFehG7TDO1hzkOs4=)**
The people of Washington state have made it clear that they overwhelmingly support _Roe_ and constitutionally-protected reproductive rights. But my opponent, Tiffany Smiley, would be a rubber stamp in the GOP’s push to ban abortion nationwide. And with the Senate split 50-50, we’ve got to defend every single seat to keep the Senate out of Mitch McConnell’s control.
I’m never going to stop fighting to protect reproductive rights. Not now, not ever. But it’s going to take all of us standing together like never before to overcome this challenge. So please, Peter:
**[Rush in $5 to defend Washington state and abortion rights across the country.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45311348/345399046/-1502580297?refcode=pm_em_220514_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODUwZmQzZi1hNGQzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zhqw6E-ym1pAt7vsHPOnY_xFa6DkFehG7TDO1hzkOs4=)**
Thank you,
Patty

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Jackson crime out of control – update from Mississippi’s free market think tank
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/jxncrime?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,

Last weekend there were six homicides in Jackson. How many more will there be this weekend?

**Last year Jackson had the highest homicide rate of any city in America, with 155 homicides.** To put that grisly statistic in perspective, that was about the same number of homicides as happened in Atlanta, a city with almost four times the population.

---
|
---
| **A recent arrival in the city, what shocks me is not the murder rate, but the attitude of those that make endless excuses for it.**

Some officials invoke that catch-all excuse for every failure, Covid. Homicide rates did increase at the same time that there was a pandemic, but correlation is not causation. I am unconvinced that the virus somehow made people more violent.

**The progressive media seems desperate to avoid attributing any of the blame to Jackson’s city leadership.** Rather like the failure to provide the city with running water, everyone but the city leadership is held responsible. Why? It does a disservice to Jackson residents.

There is a lot of wishful thinking when it comes to crime. If only, some imply, we had one more rehabilitation program or enacted another bill that purported to help ex-offenders all would be okay. Sadly, good intentions don’t cut crime. Being honest about the causes of crime might.

**Responsibility for crime lies with criminals. Responsibility for failing to deal with criminals rests with those public officials mandated to run the criminal justice system.**

Next time there is another killing, Jackson’s leaders will do what they always do. They will emote about it. What we need to hear instead is what they will actually do.

Here are five specific actions they could take that would cut crime in Jackson:
1. **More police:** Despite the often heroic efforts of individual law enforcement officers, there are simply not enough of them.

1. **Prosecute:** No matter how effective the police are at chasing suspects through the streets, there are serious failings when it comes to pursuing them through the courts. Who in Jackson has not heard stories of suspects being allowed to walk free?

1. **Detention:** The failure to have enough detention capacity in Hinds County is outrageous. Build it.

1. **Clear the courts:** The bureaucratic backlog in the courts is perhaps the single biggest impediment to effective justice. Clear the backlog of cases. If those that administer the court system can’t cope, bring in administrators that can.

1. **Work with the state:** Every city likes to manage its own affairs. I get that. But the state capital ought to be able to team up with state-wide officials, police forces and prosecutors to tackle a problem that impacts us all.

**I live and work in Jackson – and I love to call this city home.** Jackson might seem caught in downward spiral, but every city has the power to regenerate itself.

New York in the early 80s seemed caught in a spiral of decline. But the city revived once it got a grip on crime. **The key to Jackson’s future is to get a grip on crime.**

That can only happen if we are honest about crime and recognize the changes needed.

I wish you a peaceful weekend!
---
| |
---
Warm Regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
Ps. On a lighter note, tens of thousands of people have tuned into our YouTube channel since we built this little studio in our office. Have a click on the image below to see more.
---
| | [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=5e3967e4d9&e=5703353baa)
---

clean_body: | | | | | | Dear Friend, Last weekend there were six homicides in Jackson. How many more will there be this weekend? Last year Jackson had the highest homicide rate of any city in America, with 155 homicides. To put that grisly statistic in perspective, that was about the same number of homicides as happened in Atlanta, a city with almost four times the population. | | A recent arrival in the city, what shocks me is not the murder rate, but the attitude of those that make endless excuses for it. Some officials invoke that catch-all excuse for every failure, Covid. Homicide rates did increase at the same time that there was a pandemic, but correlation is not causation. I am unconvinced that the virus somehow made people more violent. The progressive media seems desperate to avoid attributing any of the blame to Jackson’s city leadership. Rather like the failure to provide the city with running water, everyone but the city leadership is held responsible. Why? It does a disservice to Jackson residents. There is a lot of wishful thinking when it comes to crime. If only, some imply, we had one more rehabilitation program or enacted another bill that purported to help ex-offenders all would be okay. Sadly, good intentions don’t cut crime. Being honest about the causes of crime might. Responsibility for crime lies with criminals. Responsibility for failing to deal with criminals rests with those public officials mandated to run the criminal justice system. Next time there is another killing, Jackson’s leaders will do what they always do. They will emote about it. What we need to hear instead is what they will actually do. Here are five specific actions they could take that would cut crime in Jackson: 1. More police: Despite the often heroic efforts of individual law enforcement officers, there are simply not enough of them. 1. Prosecute: No matter how effective the police are at chasing suspects through the streets, there are serious failings when it comes to pursuing them through the courts. Who in Jackson has not heard stories of suspects being allowed to walk free? 1. Detention: The failure to have enough detention capacity in Hinds County is outrageous. Build it. 1. Clear the courts: The bureaucratic backlog in the courts is perhaps the single biggest impediment to effective justice. Clear the backlog of cases. If those that administer the court system can’t cope, bring in administrators that can. 1. Work with the state: Every city likes to manage its own affairs. I get that. But the state capital ought to be able to team up with state-wide officials, police forces and prosecutors to tackle a problem that impacts us all. I live and work in Jackson – and I love to call this city home. Jackson might seem caught in downward spiral, but every city has the power to regenerate itself. New York in the early 80s seemed caught in a spiral of decline. But the city revived once it got a grip on crime. The key to Jackson’s future is to get a grip on crime. That can only happen if we are honest about crime and recognize the changes needed. I wish you a peaceful weekend! | | Warm Regards, Douglas Carswell President & CEO | Ps. On a lighter note, tens of thousands of people have tuned into our YouTube channel since we built this little studio in our office. Have a click on the image below to see more. | | | | |

subject: I will fight to keep our elections safe and secure!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BENDA FOR CONGRESS](https://bendaforcongress
body:
| | | |
---
| | | Dear Peter,
### I am the strongest candidate on election integrity!
* I believe our constitutional republic is under grave threat due to the Democrats’ vote rigging schemes including ballot harvesting, the expansion of ballot drop boxes, loosening absentee ballot requirements, expansion of early voting and, in some cities, allowing non-citizens to vote!
* I know that government officials are not the only ones qualified to establish, administer, report, and self-audit our elections. I believe citizens need to engage in this critical process and demand transparency.
* I have collaborated with a prominent Republican election law attorney and Republican election technology expert to learn our system’s vulnerabilities from experts in the field.
* I have filed data practices requests in Olmsted, Fillmore, Rice, Blue Earth and Nobles counties seeking information on voting systems, technologies, and practices.
* I will continue to hold election officials accountable to ensure voters have faith in our system going forward.
* My Republican competitors have for years been part of the legislative, political party and bureaucratic process that should have been used to build accountability in our election system. On their watch, the election system has been infiltrated by these influences and now we are seeing the results of their complacency.

### I will fight to keep our elections safe and secure!
---
|
---
| Matt Benda
507-383-4679
[matt@bendaforcongress.com](mailto:matt@bendaforcongress.com)
---
|
---

name: Lavern Spicer
subject: Sunny keeps talkin trash
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spicer for Congress |
body:
| | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60390651:6AB4nJoNB:m:1:3317145305:C25C91958519D40EB6FDC27DABD082E6:r)
---
Peter, Last week, Sunny Hostin made a ridiculous remark on "The View," saying she thought it was "an oxymoron" for a Black person to be a Republican.
Since she was _so confused_ about how anyone could _possibly_ be Black _and_ Republican, I offered to explain it to her.
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60390651:6AB4nJoNB:m:1:3317145305:C25C91958519D40EB6FDC27DABD082E6:r)
---
[**WATCH THE CLIP**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60390651:6AB4nJoNB:m:1:3317145305:C25C91958519D40EB6FDC27DABD082E6:r)
---
**I even told Sunny to stop talking trash and to call me when she wants to debate a _real_ Black Republican woman. **
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60390651:6AB4nJoNB:m:1:3317145305:C25C91958519D40EB6FDC27DABD082E6:r)
---
She must be scared because her _only_ response was to block me.
---
[**JOIN LAVERN SPICER**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60390651:6AB4nJoNB:m:1:3317145305:C25C91958519D40EB6FDC27DABD082E6:r)
---
So I'll say what I would have told her directly to her face. Sunny, it's not necessarily the politics we appreciate. It's the conservative values that we love.
---
[**FIGHT FOR CONSERVATIVE VALUES**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60390651:6AB4nJoNB:m:1:3317145305:C25C91958519D40EB6FDC27DABD082E6:r)
---
We believe in... \- getting Big Government out of our lives and unlocking prosperity for _all_ Americans, regardless of the color of their skin. \- obeying the rule of law and respecting other people.
**But Sunny, you obviously don't mind crime and drugs destroying the Black community, but**** _we_****do, ****_and that's the difference!_**
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60390651:6AB4nJoNB:m:1:3317145305:C25C91958519D40EB6FDC27DABD082E6:r)
---
[**SAVE BLACK AMERICA**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60390651:6AB4nJoNB:m:1:3317145305:C25C91958519D40EB6FDC27DABD082E6:r)
---
**Democrats have tricked you into thinking they care about you when you can plainly see they don't. ** _And it's the same mistake so many other Black folks continue making._
---
[**STOP THE DEMOCRATS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60390651:6AB4nJoNB:m:1:3317145305:C25C91958519D40EB6FDC27DABD082E6:r)
---
I worked my way up and out of poverty by becoming a proud, independent businesswoman, **_and I lifted my community up along the way._** Let me tell you a little bit about myself.
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60390651:6AB4nJoNB:m:1:3317145305:C25C91958519D40EB6FDC27DABD082E6:r)
---
**My name is Lavern Spicer. I'm a proud patriot, business owner, and someone that believes in giving back to my community.** Twenty years ago, I started Curley's House of Style, a food bank in Miami, where we feed the people that the Democrats let starve.
Every month, we feed and clothe over 5,000 families, making us one of South Florida's _largest_ food banks.
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60390651:6AB4nJoNB:m:1:3317145305:C25C91958519D40EB6FDC27DABD082E6:r)
---
[**SUPPORT LAVERN SPICER**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60390651:6AB4nJoNB:m:1:3317145305:C25C91958519D40EB6FDC27DABD082E6:r)
---
We're feeding them real food, not the same tired, broken promises. And it doesn't matter to us if you're white, Black, straight, gay, Republican or Democrat. We help __everyone__ in need. **No one gets turned away.**
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60390651:6AB4nJoNB:m:1:3317145305:C25C91958519D40EB6FDC27DABD082E6:r)
---
[**SAVE OUR NATION**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60390651:6AB4nJoNB:m:1:3317145305:C25C91958519D40EB6FDC27DABD082E6:r)
---
Peter, the Democrats constantly dupe Black people into believing we can't _possibly_ be conservatives or Republicans. My life and my story prove that Black conservatives can, and DO, exist! **I'm running for Congress because I'll tell it like it is and I will****NEVER****stop fighting for the conservative values I hold dear.** [**Will you join me in showing the Democrats that being a Black Republican is not an "oxymoron"?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60390651:6AB4nJoNB:m:1:3317145305:C25C91958519D40EB6FDC27DABD082E6:r)
---
[**DONATE $100**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60390652:6AB4nJoNB:m:1:3317145305:C25C91958519D40EB6FDC27DABD082E6:r)
---
[**DONATE $75**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60390653:6AB4nJoNB:m:1:3317145305:C25C91958519D40EB6FDC27DABD082E6:r)
---
[**DONATE $50**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60390654:6AB4nJoNB:m:1:3317145305:C25C91958519D40EB6FDC27DABD082E6:r)
---
[**DONATE $25**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60390655:6AB4nJoNB:m:1:3317145305:C25C91958519D40EB6FDC27DABD082E6:r)
---
[**DONATE ANY AMOUNT**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60390651:6AB4nJoNB:m:1:3317145305:C25C91958519D40EB6FDC27DABD082E6:r)
---
Thank you for fighting alongside me,
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60390651:6AB4nJoNB:m:1:3317145305:C25C91958519D40EB6FDC27DABD082E6:r)
---
Lavern Spicer Candidate, FL-24

name: Casey Kulla
subject: It’s go(tv) time!
body:
It’s time to GET OUT THE VOTE! Hi, With voter turnout statewide under 10%, we need your help this weekend to get ballots returned for Casey’s campaign for Labor Commissioner. We have phone and text ba | | | It’s time to GET OUT THE VOTE!
---
|
---
Hi, [With voter turnout statewide under 10%](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=627fe036b5357b57565a8213&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.oregonlive.com%2Fpolitics%2F2022%2F05%2Fturnout-in-oregon-primary-election-stands-below-10-could-end-up-lowest-in-modern-history.html&w=605f96f8c17ee25104ffec43&l=en-US&s=flnzcNBR4Z63A2AA417E9Ty1poc%3D), we need your help this weekend to get ballots returned for Casey’s campaign for Labor Commissioner. We have phone and text banking options available now through Tuesday at 8pm. Your help could make all the difference for us right now. Please respond to this email if you’re ready to help and which form of outreach you prefer!Thanks, _Team Kulla_
---
|
---
| | Kulla for Oregon

name: Team Franchot
subject: Upcoming fundraising deadline tomorrow
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]
Hi Peter,
Yesterday, Peter reached out to tell you about our critical mid-May fundraising deadline. Thanks to the efforts of our generous grassroots supporters, we’re making progress towards our $10,000 goal – but we need to pick up the pace if we’re going to meet our target!
CHIP IN $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/midmonthmay_0514?amount=10]
CHIP IN $20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/midmonthmay_0514?amount=20.22]
CHIP IN $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/midmonthmay_0514?amount=50]
CHIP IN $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/midmonthmay_0514?amount=100]
CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/midmonthmay_0514]
The Washington Post has said that this election could be the most expensive in the history of our state. That means that the impact of grassroots donations cannot be overstated. The Republican Party does not want to lose the Maryland Governorship – and we can expect them to flood our state with millions of dollars to prevent the seat from flipping in November. If you are able, we are humbly asking for your support to help fight back. We can’t risk getting outspent by our Republican opponents in this critical election.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/midmonthmay_0514?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/midmonthmay_0514?amount=20.22]
From combating climate change, to lowering the costs of healthcare and housing, to protecting abortion rights, the stakes are too high to sit out on the sidelines. We need your help NOW to continue scaling up our statewide operation, so that we can decisively win this primary and enter the general election with a truly formidable war-chest.
Peter Franchot is the Local Candidate for Governor in 2022 – the overwhelming majority of our donations come directly from supporters within Maryland, and it is thanks to grassroots supporters like you that we are the FRONTRUNNER in this crowded field.
We can’t thank you enough for your continued support. Click here to help secure our victory in this race. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/midmonthmay_0514?amount=20.22]
T hank you,
Team Franchot
CHIP IN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/midmonthmay_0514?amount=20.22]

name: Matt West
subject: This is for all of the marbles.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Matt West for Congress
body:
WE HAVE TO WIN! | | **URGENT: We’re less than 72 hours away from the Primary Election!** **_[If you’re ready to send a progressive scientist to Congress, chip in $25 or whatever you can toward Team West’s final GOTV effort to reach every voter we can across our district>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45313029/345403262/2035722763?amount=25&refcode=em_MW_FR_Pre-Primary-FR_051422_op_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTI0Yjc1My1hN2QzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xDIrQ_d_Ll-57k58Vd0xYpBcVOl8ZeqoZcUOyrcdtqQ=)_** _**[RUSH $25 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45313035/345403264/2035722763?amount=25&refcode=em_MW_FR_Pre-Primary-FR_051422_op_b1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTI0Yjc1My1hN2QzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xDIrQ_d_Ll-57k58Vd0xYpBcVOl8ZeqoZcUOyrcdtqQ=)**_
---
No second chances. No slip-ups, team.
We’re going ALL OUT to win on May 17th, and that takes a considerable amount of last-minute grassroots support to use every tool and resource available. I am talking about phone calls, door-to-door canvassing, digital media, and more.
We’ve fought too long and hard to let our new district fall into the hands of an establishment puppet. But that’s what the D.C. elite are aiming for.
**Billionaire investors and D.C. elites are pumping millions of dollars to bolster my opponent’s campaign — and getting away with it.**
I refuse to let them buy this seat. **_[And I hope you’ll help me stop them, friend. Every vote is going to matter in this primary, so I am counting on 500 grassroots donors to help our people-powered campaign with last-minute voter outreach. Can you chip in whatever you can ASAP?>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45313038/345403267/2035722763?amount=25&refcode=em_MW_FR_Pre-Primary-FR_051422_op_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTI0Yjc1My1hN2QzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xDIrQ_d_Ll-57k58Vd0xYpBcVOl8ZeqoZcUOyrcdtqQ=)_**
This election isn’t about me. It’s about the future of our planet. It’s about taxing the rich, holding far-right extremists accountable, and defending reproductive freedom.
I am the ONLY candidate on the primary ballot who is fighting for progressive priorities. That’s why I desperately need your support, right now. With your help, we can gather every vote we can and pull an incredible upset win.
So what do you say? Are you ready to shake up the system and send this progressive scientist to Congress?
_**[DONATE $25 NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45313042/345403271/2035722763?amount=25&refcode=em_MW_FR_Pre-Primary-FR_051422_op_b2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTI0Yjc1My1hN2QzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xDIrQ_d_Ll-57k58Vd0xYpBcVOl8ZeqoZcUOyrcdtqQ=)**_
Thanks for your support,
Matt West

clean_body: WE HAVE TO WIN! | | URGENT: We’re less than 72 hours away from the Primary Election! = = No second chances. No slip-ups, team. We’re going ALL OUT to win on May 17th, and that takes a considerable amount of last-minute grassroots support to use every tool and resource available. I am talking about phone calls, door-to-door canvassing, digital media, and more. We’ve fought too long and hard to let our new district fall into the hands of an establishment puppet. But that’s what the D.C. elite are aiming for. Billionaire investors and D.C. elites are pumping millions of dollars to bolster my opponent’s campaign — and getting away with it. I refuse to let them buy this seat. = This election isn’t about me. It’s about the future of our planet. It’s about taxing the rich, holding far-right extremists accountable, and defending reproductive freedom. I am the ONLY candidate on the primary ballot who is fighting for progressive priorities. That’s why I desperately need your support, right now. With your help, we can gather every vote we can and pull an incredible upset win. So what do you say? Are you ready to shake up the system and send this progressive scientist to Congress? = Thanks for your support, Matt West = = = PAID FOR BY Matt West for Congress Matt West for Congress PO Box 1926 Beaverton, OR 97075 United States Click here to

name: Marisa Wood
subject: Will you personally endorse my campaign to unseat Kevin McCarthy?
body:
We are the Democratic frontrunners in this race, and the ONLY campaign endorsed by the California Democratic Party to oust Kevin McCarthy. | _We are alerting Democrats about Marisa Wood -- a public school teacher and Democrat running a historic campaign to unseat GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy. To support Marisa Wood's campaign, [chip in here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45313645/345404486/883924314?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGI1YTEwOS1hOGQzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QZL-70h8K_RiNiIgEuFoHu40ELteR1NdgyJIzYI0910=) We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/54vQjwqOs0S94s4JEtZ-gw2?unsubscribedata=01nqnM0Tmh82Syeq6Tnpb4FEWBdozisfjvCW84rXeSs%2BkOd6x%2Fh%2FfyBXi4slX9qMpimGtlI10qiyCepFy8LzsdjUu87XptMOhY3gmyOJRBZZ1XMNzdG%2BvbS5oradTDcAVy%2FtF9IQhYNQZv82ngjttOvMSL6SEZyA2jYIDBYL3XFJ%2BFL8N2WJHdcP0iPF18nzQs6KaHWBtwWC1bjA9Iex3D2Ua622SibFYL1cQp%2B%2FVDI7FfcvLDM9REJKGNoWcwLVextUKVdy%2B1%2FAPitKSLCxt3tgJA4fvXgj08drpzeIT63tuD8dYwGyE9VbEglNEP4CEzujY39JMulR68BuCV%2BAOTHRjSC9lYoVLZVt9lSMwwR3m7lNDShN0RELt%2BJtn%2B%2BVL0U2OzEK2%2FC%2BTBMkwKmFR2mWSCnFHLF1hXlcVSY3YhUJR9JVZattIOqtKmHbm7Ug)._ Friend,

**[I'm going to ask you to officially endorse my campaign to unseat Kevin McCarthy in California's 20th District.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45313646/345404502/-270480565?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGI1YTEwOS1hOGQzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QZL-70h8K_RiNiIgEuFoHu40ELteR1NdgyJIzYI0910=&emci=73913a04-99d3-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=e4b5a109-a8d3-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=21170704)** We have just entered critical weeks before the Primary Election, so I hope you'll let me explain why your endorsement is so critical -- especially right now.

**Mail-in ballots ahead of the June Primary are hitting voters' mail boxes across our district in CA-20. As a reminder, we are the Democratic frontrunners in this race, and the ONLY campaign endorsed by the California Democratic Party to oust Kevin McCarthy.**

We have an uphill climb, friend, but there's a reason why folks believe in our campaign. Our district has been left behind for too long while McCarthy does Trump’s bidding and jockeys for the Speaker's gavel. After he was caught lying in the aftermath of Jan 6th, even Republicans are beginning to grow frustrated with his complete lack of leadership.

There's no more powerful way to hold McCarthy accountable than by challenging him at the ballot box, and as we enter the next stage of this campaign, I need to know you're with me:

**[Will you click here to say you officially endorse my campaign? With the primary approaching, I'd love to see your name alongside hundreds of other endorsements we've received from grassroots supporters across the country.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45313647/345404515/-270480565?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGI1YTEwOS1hOGQzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QZL-70h8K_RiNiIgEuFoHu40ELteR1NdgyJIzYI0910=&emci=73913a04-99d3-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=e4b5a109-a8d3-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=21170704)** | **[Endorse Marisa](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45313648/345404516/-270480565?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGI1YTEwOS1hOGQzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QZL-70h8K_RiNiIgEuFoHu40ELteR1NdgyJIzYI0910=&emci=73913a04-99d3-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=e4b5a109-a8d3-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=21170704)**
---

This goes without saying but I'm not a politician, and I never dreamed of running for Congress, especially after being a teacher for more than two decades.

But I need you to understand something: Kids and their families are hurting. I had to do something to leave this community better off for everyone -- and that starts with taking on Kevin McCarthy.

I need to know you support this campaign. body:
Our final mid-month deadline is next week. Here's where things stand:

**FIRST:** It was reported Rick Caruso has already spent $25 million of his own personal funds to buy the race for Los Angeles mayor.

**THEN:** An _LA Times_ poll showed this race is neck-and-neck. Caruso's spending is unprecedented, and — what's worse — it's already helped him climb in the polls.

**NOW:** We launched our first TV ads to get Karen's message out to Angelenos! By going up on the air, we're sharing Karen's vision for L.A. to help get out the vote before the primary.

**BUT:** We took a huge risk going up on the air. TV ads are _expensive_ , and we need grassroots support to make sure we can keep our ads running through the primary.

clean_body: Our final mid-month deadline is next week. Here's where things stand: FIRST: It was reported Rick Caruso has already spent $25 million of his own personal funds to buy the race for Los Angeles mayor. THEN: An LA Times poll showed this race is neck-and-neck. Caruso's spending is unprecedented, and — what's worse — it's already helped him climb in the polls. NOW: We launched our first TV ads to get Karen's message out to Angelenos! By going up on the air, we're sharing Karen's vision for L.A. to help get out the vote before the primary. BUT: We took a huge risk going up on the air. TV ads are expensive , and we need grassroots support to make sure we can keep our ads running through the primary. Let's go, Karen Bass for Mayor Our first TV spot is officially LIVE, and we need your help keeping it running through the primary. Rush a donation today to support Karen's historic campaign for Los Angeles mayor: Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 (ID # 1441328) Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 777 S Figueroa St STE 4050 Los Angeles, CA 90017 United States Additional information is available at . | | ---|---|--- We rely on this email to communicate with this grassroots team, but if you no longer want to receive our emails, please .

name: Fetterman HQ
subject: Donald Trump’s Official Endorsement™️ in Pennsylvania
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
He could endorse a ham sandwich and Super PACs would still dump loads of money behind it.
#
Derek,
Did anyone predict that a celebrity TV doctor was going to run for Senate in 2022?
You know, we wouldn't believe you if you said you did.
But here we are. And **Dr. Mehmet Oz has Donald Trump’s Official EndorsementTM in the Republican primary for U.S. Senate in PA** 🤯
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47516?refcode=em20220514-5809&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5809%2E434096%2EudtMQL)
Frankly, this is a *big* deal. **Trump’s endorsement is a blaring green light for MAGA Super PACs to hit PA with an avalanche of dark money, the likes of which have never been seen before in our state.**
Look, Dr. Oz is a self-funding millionaire.**1** He’s already spent a profoundly gross amount of personal wealth in the GOP’s record-breaking $43 million primary.
Meanwhile, Donald Trump could endorse a ham sandwich for U.S. Senate and Super PACs would still dump loads of money behind it. 🙄
Trump’s endorsement means Dr. Oz — who is already self-funding his campaign by the million$ — will have an unprecedented amount to spend against us in this race.
**That’s why, to counter Donald Trump’s Official EndorsementTM, our campaign is looking for 5 folks from 18326 to chip in the next 24 hours.**
We need your help to defeat the weirdo celebrity TV doctor who has the FULL backing of Donald Trump + his own personal wealth. Let's show them what we're made of.
**_[Can you rush your very first donation of $5 to help our grassroots movement take on the MAGA money machine? We need as many individual donations as possible to overpower Donald Trump’s endorsement in this race.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47516?refcode=em20220514-5809&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=5809%2E434096%2EudtMQL)___**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47516?refcode=em20220514-5809&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=5809%2E434096%2EudtMQL)**
John and Gisele are committed to running a clean, people-powered campaign with no dirty corporate PAC money.
You’re an important part of that, and we seriously can’t thank you enough for your support during a critical moment like this.
Thank you, thank you, THANK YOU!!! 🙏
Fetterman HQ
**1** He’s actually from New Jersey. Not even from PA. As John’s kid Gracie says: “Like, ew.” [**_Donate now to ensure we have the resources to defeat Dr. Oz._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47516?refcode=em20220514-5809&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=5809%2E434096%2EudtMQL)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220514-5809-footer&t=23&refcode2=5809_434096_udtMQL&akid=5809%2E434096%2EudtMQL)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

subject: An inexcusable vote and a dangerous candidate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kermit Jones for Congress
body:

Friends, voters in California’s third District are about to face an**important choice in this TOSS UP seat:** do we want an **anti-choice politician** , or a **pro-choice doctor** representing us in Congress? Dr. Kermit has helped families make these difficult decisions. He knows the government has no place in that conversation. He’s running against two anti-choice Republicans, including **Assemblyman Kevin Kiley, who voted to allow employers to retaliate against employees who use birth control, have abortions, or parent while unmarried.** **[Can you help us send a pro-choice doctor to Congress to protect the Democratic Majority and our reproductive rights? name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Is there ANYTHING we can say?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends —
Is there ANYTHING AT ALL we can say to convince you to make a $3 contribution to Mark Kelly’s campaign before our mid-month fundraising deadline ends at MIDNIGHT tomorrow?
What if we told you that in 2020 Mark won by 2.4% of the vote and that a recent poll showed Mark is down by TWO POINTS in Arizona?
What if we told you that’s why the NRSC just spent $1,000,000 in attack ads against Mark in just ONE WEEK to defeat us — and that they’ve committed about $1,000,000 more in the coming days?
And what if we told you that we missed our fundraising goals for the last two months in a row?
Time is definitely running out. So, we’re asking:
[**Can you PLEASE make a $3 contribution to Mark Kelly’s campaign before our mid-month fundraising deadline ends tomorrow at midnight? He needs your help to reach our goals.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may22?refcode=em220514-1-7&t=1&refcode2=2834_6688874_-AOLWU&akid=2834%2E6688874%2E-AOLWU)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

It isn’t even about how MUCH you can give today. It’s about how MANY people are chipping in. That’s how we reach these goals.
Thanks,
Team Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=26&akid=2834%2E6688874%2E-AOLWU).

name: Max Steiner
subject: Let's talk about fire fighting.
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45317010/345408665/390307162?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDU1ZDU4NS1hYmQzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=flxuk1jI3s5_KuA15PhChg0brvtEEaz2uIXvuEoHRHM=)
Friend,

Lately, the focus of our emails has been on our outreach efforts and on the outrageous conduct of Republicans -- ranging from Doug LaMalfa here or the Republican Supreme Court in Washington.

Sometimes though, it's good to step back and take a longer-term view. So we're going to start sending out policy emails on Saturdays to talk about what I hope to accomplish for this district if elected.

**Today we'll talk about Fire Fighting.** Rule #1 of fighting forest fires is that it's always cheaper to properly manage a forest than to fight a fire once it starts. Rule #2 of fighting forest fires is that we will always have fires, that climate change will make this worse, and that more people are going to be moving into rural areas and the Wildlands Urban Interface as remote-work becomes permanent.

Rule #2 means that we're going to need firefighters, but the Forest Service is facing a critical lack of personnel willing to work the long, tough, and erratic hours for low pay. CalFire also pays more, billets fire crews in hotels, and has a more flexible hiring process. It's time for the US Forest Service, and other federal land management agencies, to change the way they staff crews. My plan calls for a significant reform of federal firefighting personnel, to one based less on trying to save money, and more on ensuring sufficient personnel numbers to do their job. In many ways, it copies the military personnel system: salaried work, with good benefits, and an Active/Reserve component split. **#1: Salary.** We need to shift away from the current system based on hourly pay to one based on salary. Yes, it's possible for firefighters to earn respectable wages if they do enough overtime, but it's hard to recruit or retain people for a job with a low hourly pay wage. Employees want the security of a middle-class wage. This is why the US military uses the salary system: because just like firefighters, we have highly-varying hours on little warning. The government doesn't know if it's going to have a war or a fire next month - but we've figured out that trying to nickle-and-dime soldiers with an hourly wage is a terrible approach. The same is true for firefighters. They deserve the security of a salary.

**#2: Benefits.** It's time for the federal government to increase firefighter benefits. That means education grants (like the GI Bill) after a set period of service, better healthcare, and a generous retirement after 20-25 years of service. If this sounds like the military system, again, that is intentional. We are asking firefighters to risk their lives to protect us doing physically demanding work on irregular schedules. That wears on bodies and it wears on families. We can do better as a nation. And, when we do better, we'll be able to hire more firefighters as well.

**#3: Active and Reserve Systems.** Federal firefighting forces have full-time firefighters, term firefighters for the summer, and ad hoc volunteers. Our federal fire agencies lack a dedicated reserve system, like the one that works so well for the US military. There's no reason we can't pay reserve firefighters to train "one weekend a month" and then use them as needed for fires in the summer - while protecting their civilian jobs. The name of the game is "flexible manpower" and it's just as important for fire as is it for the military. **[I hope you found this email interesting. If you liked it, feel free to forward it along. And if you support our issues-focused campaign to improve lives in the North State, consider making a contribution to my campaign today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45317011/345408666/-96927706?refcode=em-5.14.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDU1ZDU4NS1hYmQzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=flxuk1jI3s5_KuA15PhChg0brvtEEaz2uIXvuEoHRHM=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45317012/345408667/-96927706?refcode=em-5.14.22-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDU1ZDU4NS1hYmQzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=flxuk1jI3s5_KuA15PhChg0brvtEEaz2uIXvuEoHRHM=)

clean_body: | = Friend, Lately, the focus of our emails has been on our outreach efforts and on the outrageous conduct of Republicans -- ranging from Doug LaMalfa here or the Republican Supreme Court in Washington. Sometimes though, it's good to step back and take a longer-term view. So we're going to start sending out policy emails on Saturdays to talk about what I hope to accomplish for this district if elected. Today we'll talk about Fire Fighting. Rule #1 of fighting forest fires is that it's always cheaper to properly manage a forest than to fight a fire once it starts. Rule #2 of fighting forest fires is that we will always have fires, that climate change will make this worse, and that more people are going to be moving into rural areas and the Wildlands Urban Interface as remote-work becomes permanent. Rule #2 means that we're going to need firefighters, but the Forest Service is facing a critical lack of personnel willing to work the long, tough, and erratic hours for low pay. CalFire also pays more, billets fire crews in hotels, and has a more flexible hiring process. It's time for the US Forest Service, and other federal land management agencies, to change the way they staff crews. My plan calls for a significant reform of federal firefighting personnel, to one based less on trying to save money, and more on ensuring sufficient personnel numbers to do their job. In many ways, it copies the military personnel system: salaried work, with good benefits, and an Active/Reserve component split. #1: Salary. We need to shift away from the current system based on hourly pay to one based on salary. Yes, it's possible for firefighters to earn respectable wages if they do enough overtime, but it's hard to recruit or retain people for a job with a low hourly pay wage. Employees want the security of a middle-class wage. This is why the US military uses the salary system: because just like firefighters, we have highly-varying hours on little warning. The government doesn't know if it's going to have a war or a fire next month - but we've figured out that trying to nickle-and-dime soldiers with an hourly wage is a terrible approach. The same is true for firefighters. They deserve the security of a salary. #2: Benefits. It's time for the federal government to increase firefighter benefits. That means education grants (like the GI Bill) after a set period of service, better healthcare, and a generous retirement after 20-25 years of service. If this sounds like the military system, again, that is intentional. We are asking firefighters to risk their lives to protect us doing physically demanding work on irregular schedules. That wears on bodies and it wears on families. We can do better as a nation. And, when we do better, we'll be able to hire more firefighters as well. #3: Active and Reserve Systems. Federal firefighting forces have full-time firefighters, term firefighters for the summer, and ad hoc volunteers. Our federal fire agencies lack a dedicated reserve system, like the one that works so well for the US military. There's no reason we can't pay reserve firefighters to train "one weekend a month" and then use them as needed for fires in the summer - while protecting their civilian jobs. The name of the game is "flexible manpower" and it's just as important for fire as is it for the military. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks, Max Steiner Combat Veteran and Democrat for Congress | = Max Steiner is a combat veteran, foreign service officer, and Democrat running to flip California's 1st District from red to blue. body:
Nan Whaley has never wavered on her commitment to protecting the rights enshrined by Roe and the full range of reproductive care.

Hey folks,
**FIRST:** Mike DeWine – who prides himself on being one of the most anti-choice governors in the country – voiced his strong support for a bill banning abortion at six weeks – before many people know they are pregnant.
**THEN:** We made history together on primary night – nominating the first ever all-women gubernatorial ticket in Ohio history, and a ticket that will stand up for reproductive freedom.
**NOW:** With _Roe v. Wade_ in more danger than ever before of being overturned, it’s more important than ever that we elect a governor who will stand up for reproductive rights and the full range of care.
**[It’s more important than ever to stand with Nan Whaley and join the fight for a stronger Ohio. Can you contribute any amount to our mid-month goals?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45317187/345408719/704197326?refcode=nw_em_220514_1_t2&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjU1ZDU4NS1hYmQzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p3mGkhln0lBTgpWSbhUbZc5x70EXnnyppYy1GOvcfEc=)**
Mike DeWine is out-of-touch, corrupt, and has spent his career putting personal interests before what’s best for his constituents.
Even as a 60% majority of Ohioans agree that abortion should be legal, Mike DeWine ignores us, proudly endorsing one of the strictest abortion laws in the country. He’s been very clear that if _Roe_ is struck down, he’ll fight to bring that ban into effect, criminalizing abortion before most people even know they’re pregnant.
Nan Whaley has never wavered on her commitment to protecting the rights enshrined by Roe and the full range of reproductive care. As mayor of Dayton, she worked alongside community members to ensure safe care could continue when Ohio’s unnecessary transfer agreement policy threatened abortion access in Southwest Ohio.
**[We don’t know what will happen with Roe, but there’s one thing you can do today to help protect abortion access in Ohio: Chip in $5 towards our mid-month goals to help elect a proudly pro-choice governor.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45317188/345408720/704197326?refcode=nw_em_220514_1_t2&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjU1ZDU4NS1hYmQzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p3mGkhln0lBTgpWSbhUbZc5x70EXnnyppYy1GOvcfEc=)**
Thank you,
Team Nan

I can hardly express how much this means to me, and how much I know it means to young Latinos across California to be represented at the highest level.

I was raised by a single mother who taught me the value of hard work and commitment — _traits I’ve used as a community leader and will take to the halls of Congress._

That’s why I know CA-13 working families deserve a voice for them in Congress, not some corporate MAGA crony. **But I can’t get there without your support today, Peter.**

Phil Arballo is a Latino, a Central Valley native, a father, and a husband. And he's running for Congress in California. name: Sen. Patty Murray
subject: Sign on now to defend reproductive rights:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | This is not a drill -- _Roe v. Wade_ might only have a few weeks left.

**A leaked draft opinion shows that the Supreme Court has already voted to overturn _Roe_ and permanently end the constitutional right to safe, legal abortion.**

[**If you’re committed to protecting reproductive rights from this dire threat, please sign our Democratic petition demanding that the Supreme Court uphold _Roe v. Wade_ \-- there's not a moment to lose:**](https://go.dscc.org/go/7961?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-NM-20220514-SenPattyMurray-MurrayRoeSignOn-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-NM-20220514-SenPattyMurray-MurrayRoeSignOn-Pros-sl1&akid=4272%2E9716520%2EWMbMMI)

| | [Add My Name](https://go.dscc.org/go/7961?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-NM-20220514-SenPattyMurray-MurrayRoeSignOn-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-NM-20220514-SenPattyMurray-MurrayRoeSignOn-Pros-sl1&akid=4272%2E9716520%2EWMbMMI)
---

When he was Senate Majority Leader, Mitch McConnell made stacking the Supreme Court with anti-choice justices a top priority. And with McConnell's justices now set to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ entirely, **Senate Republicans just BLOCKED our bill to enshrine _Roe_ 's protections into federal law. **

**If _Roe_ is effectively nullified, a majority of U.S. states are expected to ban abortion immediately, and now Sen. McConnell is talking about passing a _nationwide_ ban if Republicans retake the Senate.**

An overwhelming majority of Americans want to keep abortion legal. Now is the time to step up and PROVE that we support _Roe v. Wade_ and that we’ll do whatever it takes to defend reproductive rights in the United States.

**[So I’m personally asking you to add your name to our petition defending _Roe v. Wade_ \-- don't let Republicans take away rights that Americans have counted on for nearly 50 years:](https://go.dscc.org/go/7961?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-NM-20220514-SenPattyMurray-MurrayRoeSignOn-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-NM-20220514-SenPattyMurray-MurrayRoeSignOn-Pros-sl1&akid=4272%2E9716520%2EWMbMMI)**
| [Add My Name](https://go.dscc.org/go/7961?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-NM-20220514-SenPattyMurray-MurrayRoeSignOn-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-NM-20220514-SenPattyMurray-MurrayRoeSignOn-Pros-sl1&akid=4272%2E9716520%2EWMbMMI)
---
Thank you for joining this fight,

Patty

Patty Murray
U.S. Senator, Washington

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/7961?ask=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-NM-20220514-SenPattyMurray-MurrayRoeSignOn-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-NM-20220514-SenPattyMurray-MurrayRoeSignOn-Pros-sl1&akid=4272%2E9716520%2EWMbMMI)

Senator Patty Murray first got involved in politics after a lawmaker told her she couldn’t make a difference in her community because she was “just a mom in tennis shoes.” Now, as a U.S. Senator from Washington, she fights for her state’s progressive values and for an economy and country that works for every family and community.

**[Join Patty in the fight to defend the Senate and keep our majority out of Mitch McConnell’s hands by splitting a $5 donation between her campaign and the DSCC >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/5999?amount=5&t=1&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-NM-20220514-SenPattyMurray-MurrayRoeSignOn-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-NM-20220514-SenPattyMurray-MurrayRoeSignOn-Pros-sl1&akid=4272%2E9716520%2EWMbMMI)**

| [Donate](https://go.dscc.org/go/5999?amount=5&t=2&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-NM-20220514-SenPattyMurray-MurrayRoeSignOn-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-NM-20220514-SenPattyMurray-MurrayRoeSignOn-Pros-sl1&akid=4272%2E9716520%2EWMbMMI)

The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. clean_body: Hey there Peter. I wanted to reach out because today is an incredibly important day. We are just 3 days away from the primary election, and it’s the final day to vote early in person! That means time is SHORT and I need all of the help I can get before tonight’s voting deadline. Can you chip in any amount to help me make this final push towards election day and get my message out before tonight’s early voting deadline? | | | = Hey there Peter. I wanted to reach out because today is an incredibly important day. We are just 3 days away from the primary election, and it’s the final day to vote early in person! That means time is SHORT and I need all of the help I can get before tonight’s voting deadline. = You’ve been on this journey with me for a long time now, and I can’t wait to celebrate with you when we emerge victorious in a few days. Especially when you’re one of the primary reasons why. If you haven’t already, please vote early today! We need every vote! clean_body: Our June 14th primary election is only one month away. | | , Our June 14th primary election is only one month away. We can't waste a single minute- can you make a donation of $10 so we have the resources to keep fighting in this final stretch of the campaign? We can replace ignorant, incompetent leadership with compassion, urgency, and boldness. With Mia as Governor, we can defend abortion rights, revitalize our public schools, expand voting rights and so much more. Mia has both the courage and the experience to not only win this race but get straight to work for ALL South Carolinians. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: We can't do this without you, Team Mia for SC About Senator Mia McLeod: Senator Mia McLeod is a working mom, small business owner, and seventh-generation South Carolinian from Bennettsville, South Carolina. She is a former State Representative, current State Senator representing District 22, and is running as a Democratic candidate for Governor. | | | Please, disregard if you are a registered lobbyist. body:
| | | Friend,

It's Herschel Walker, and I'm reaching out to you with an urgent message. Our Senate race in Georgia is one of the toughest races in the country, so I'm asking if you can help.

Early voting began May 2 for the Republican Primary, so we are ramping up our efforts to contact voters. _**[Senator Raphael Warnock (D) has outraised every candidate in the country- including our campaign, so we're doing everything we can to close the fundraising gap.](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyFkTtrwzAUhX-NvclIV37Eg4dCSad0KIWMQtEjFpFsoUdD_n3lJoF2KmiQDpdzdL4rJykkJ6I2E2AA3JGW0I520NAOU6G5bLEcehhp1WJuVUhNUD6frBF8STxe9BqEasTq6nnCuqUngaET4zjIrt8JAFoeMEqhRQ_18cAO3FiznN-5U1NImoXI0hdbouZozu5kb6xDpEUADGo7zSn5WNGXCvblRCVyUM3VLEHJLXPTNPdclMuV24sKKG2jdB-20VCCKvqaQlYV9Dk5Jrjz3JyXoj7qUnZ8Qx-f-4ZgPPQtm1WIYlYW3f1YImSHx3aHyAD9w8UpabIrHsqVNv6hxjUXFEX9Y_gMXpeklvQ7914XFYblm6hwRLfigGL2ft0wJ42eK6nDJP3VWGtiP5RFnLfcH-jpP4jfX1Ka8Q "Senator Raphael Warnock \(D\) has outraised every candidate in the country – including our campaign, so we’re doing everything we can to close the fundraising gap. ")**_

---
| | | [DONATE NOW](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyFkTtrwzAUhX-NvclIV37Eg4dCSad0KIWMQtEjFpFsoUdD_n3lJoF2KmiQDpdzdL4rJykkJ6I2E2AA3JGW0I520NAOU6G5bLEcehhp1WJuVUhNUD6frBF8STxe9BqEasTq6nnCuqUngaET4zjIrt8JAFoeMEqhRQ_18cAO3FiznN-5U1NImoXI0hdbouZozu5kb6xDpEUADGo7zSn5WNGXCvblRCVyUM3VLEHJLXPTNPdclMuV24sKKG2jdB-20VCCKvqaQlYV9Dk5Jrjz3JyXoj7qUnZ8Qx-f-4ZgPPQtm1WIYlYW3f1YImSHx3aHyAD9w8UpabIrHsqVNv6hxjUXFEX9Y_gMXpeklvQ7914XFYblm6hwRLfigGL2ft0wJ42eK6nDJP3VWGtiP5RFnLfcH-jpP4jfX1Ka8Q)
---

In the first three months of this year, my Democrat opponent raised a record-breaking $13.6 MILLION! That's $151,000 PER DAY or $105 PER MINUTE - both day and night!

_**[I know it may seem like a lot, but we can close the gap if enough PATRIOTS will stand with us. I'm humbly asking you to give a donation of $3 or more today.](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyFkTtrwzAUhX-NvclIV37Eg4dCSad0KIWMQtEjFpFsoUdD_n3lJoF2KmiQDpdzdL4rJykkJ6I2E2AA3JGW0I520NAOU6G5bLEcehhp1WJuVUhNUD6frBF8STxe9BqEasTq6nnCuqUngaET4zjIrt8JAFoeMEqhRQ_18cAO3FiznN-5U1NImoXI0hdbouZozu5kb6xDpEUADGo7zSn5WNGXCvblRCVyUM3VLEHJLXPTNPdclMuV24sKKG2jdB-20VCCKvqaQlYV9Dk5Jrjz3JyXoj7qUnZ8Qx-f-4ZgPPQtm1WIYlYW3f1YImSHx3aHyAD9w8UpabIrHsqVNv6hxjUXFEX9Y_gMXpeklvQ7914XFYblm6hwRLfigGL2ft0wJ42eK6nDJP3VWGtiP5RFnLfcH-jpP4jfX1Ka8Q "I know it may seem like a lot, but we can close the gap if enough PATRIOTS will stand with us. I’m humbly asking you to give a donation of $3 or more today.")**_

Democrats know we have the chance to flip this Senate seat in Georgia from BLUE to RED. They see that we're virtually TIED in the polls, so they are FREAKING OUT. They know that Republicans will fight tooth and nail to keep Georgia from going BLUE AGAIN, so they are pouring resources into the state like crazy.

**In fact, Chuck Schumer 's Super PAC just announced they are going to spend $23 million in attack ads against me! That proves how scared they are!**

If we're going to win the critical Senate race in Georgia, we need your help.

In the 60 seconds it has taken you to read this short email, my Democrat opponent has raised another $105! Can you believe that? _**[Would you be one of 5 people to give $21 this very minute (for a combined $105) and help us close the fundraising gap?](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyFkTtrwzAUhX-NvclIV37Eg4dCSad0KIWMQtEjFpFsoUdD_n3lJoF2KmiQDpdzdL4rJykkJ6I2E2AA3JGW0I520NAOU6G5bLEcehhp1WJuVUhNUD6frBF8STxe9BqEasTq6nnCuqUngaET4zjIrt8JAFoeMEqhRQ_18cAO3FiznN-5U1NImoXI0hdbouZozu5kb6xDpEUADGo7zSn5WNGXCvblRCVyUM3VLEHJLXPTNPdclMuV24sKKG2jdB-20VCCKvqaQlYV9Dk5Jrjz3JyXoj7qUnZ8Qx-f-4ZgPPQtm1WIYlYW3f1YImSHx3aHyAD9w8UpabIrHsqVNv6hxjUXFEX9Y_gMXpeklvQ7914XFYblm6hwRLfigGL2ft0wJ42eK6nDJP3VWGtiP5RFnLfcH-jpP4jfX1Ka8Q "Would you be one of 5 people to give $21 this very minute \(for a combined $105\) and help us close the fundraising gap?")**_

When you donate, you'll be helping us win in Georgia, take back the Republican majority in the U.S. Senate, stop the Biden-Harris agenda, and get America back on track!

To victory,

Herschel Walker

---

name: Tammy Duckworth
subject: 70% of Americans agree
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
Republicans are waging a war on fundamental reproductive rights.
#
Peter, a majority of Americans – and Illinoisans – already agree: _Roe v. Wade_ should remain the law of the land.
But the leaked Supreme Court opinion suggests that reproductive rights are at risk like never before, so Senator Durbin offered to let me reach out to you.
**[Protecting reproductive rights at the federal level is going to come down to Senate action, so I’m asking: will you split a $5 contribution now between Senator Durbin and I to help defend our pro-choice majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45318580/345409949/-508276213?refcode=dd_em_220514_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjIyZjE2Zi1hZmQzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0lla1cO6tdTBCbM2dMxxYHfeQTFOuD6qOz30wLtMwsY=)**
Just this week, Mitch McConnell signalled that a nationwide abortion ban might be in the cards if they retake the Senate in November.
And they’re not going to stop there. The extreme GOP is trying their hardest to dismantle reproductive care – from abortion access to birth control to vital Title X funding that helps provide life-saving emergency care for women across Illinois and this country. Even the types of IVF treatments that gave me my daughters could be at risk.
For the first time in our country’s history, women across the United States are at risk of having less rights than their mothers and grandmothers.
I’m not backing down. Not today, not tomorrow, not ever. But I need your help. **If we’re going to codify _Roe_ and defend reproductive rights at the federal level, we can’t waste any time. Please, Peter:**
**[Help me keep Illinois blue and defend our pro-choice majority in Congress. A contribution of $5, or whatever you can spare, is going to go a long way in this fight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45318581/345409950/-508276213?refcode=dd_em_220514_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjIyZjE2Zi1hZmQzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0lla1cO6tdTBCbM2dMxxYHfeQTFOuD6qOz30wLtMwsY=)**

clean_body: Like the majority of Americans, Deb McGrath knows that reproductive choice is an essential right. | | DERRICK VAN ORDEN believes abortion amounts to “genocide” and proudly calls himself “100% pro-life.” = Peter, this is CRITICAL: The Washington Post just reported that Republican lawmakers aren’t content with the end of Roe v. Wade. Now, they’re pushing for a federal BAN on abortion. Our opponent, the radical insurrectionist Derrick Van Orden, would do everything in his power to make it happen. He’s eager to strip us of our fundamental right to autonomy and ensure that politicians like him have power over our bodies. He’s already proved he has absolutely no respect for women: He actually admitted to sexually harassing female officers while in the Navy. With the Supreme Court set to overturn Roe v. Wade at any moment, it has never been more crucial to elect legislators who will fight for reproductive rights at the federal level. If Republicans retake power in Washington, they may even be able to ban abortion nationwide \- and they’re counting on Derrick Van Orden winning in the 3rd district to help. = As an advocate for women’s equality while in the military and the CIA, Deb understands that choosing your own reproductive future is key to ensuring women have an equal voice in our society. Deb is a mother of three, so she knows firsthand that the decision to have a family is a life-changing experience and a lifelong responsibility. And like the majority of Americans, Deb knows that reproductive choice is absolutely essential. In Congress, she’ll work hard to keep abortion safe, accessible, and legal. We cannot wait to protect reproductive rights at the federal level. We’ve already seen the harm radical abortion restrictions have done in states like Texas. We cannot allow Derrick Van Orden to join Washington Republicans in their attempt to ban abortion for all of us. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: **= | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = Thanks, Team McGrath | Deb McGrath is an Army Veteran, former CIA officer, and mother of three running for Congress in WI-03. She’s fighting for affordable health care, good-paying jobs, and common prosperity. Deb served our country for over four decades from all over the world. Now she’s being called to serve her hometown and western Wisconsin in Congress. name: Ron DeSantis
subject: I am furious.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I am furious.
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60390740:JjW69JoNY:m:1:3317145305:917965EBD1C7F47FC7F801357EC9550A:r)
I am furious.
After TWO ENTIRE YEARS, radical Democrats in blue states are "suddenly" coming around to ending lockdowns, mandates, and masking kids in schools. They claimed the science changed...
**But let me say this loud and clear: the science didn 't change -- THE POLITICS DID!**
Democrats are panicking as Joe Biden's approval ratings hit all-time lows. The polls are against them. And free states like Florida are thriving while lockdown states are still masking their kindergarteners.
_But I know you -- the American People -- see right through their lies. _
**If Democrats win in November, they will re-establish lockdowns, mandates and masks. **
I won't let them get away with it. They must be punished at the ballot box in November.
[**That 's why I'm rushing to you now. I need at least 2,500 Patriots to help hold these Democrats accountable for playing political games with our freedoms, our businesses, AND our children.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60390740:JjW69JoNY:m:1:3317145305:917965EBD1C7F47FC7F801357EC9550A:r)
**[STAND WITH RON DESANTIS >>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60390740:JjW69JoNY:m:1:3317145305:917965EBD1C7F47FC7F801357EC9550A:r)**
This is the most important thing any of us will ever do.
If these radical Democrats get away scot-free, they'll know they can walk all over the American People without suffering any political consequences.
**But today, you have the power to be their judge and jury.**
[**Will you join my mission to hold these radical Democrats to account, or will you give them a free pass?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60390740:JjW69JoNY:m:1:3317145305:917965EBD1C7F47FC7F801357EC9550A:r)
I hope you're with me on this.
For America,
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60390740:JjW69JoNY:m:1:3317145305:917965EBD1C7F47FC7F801357EC9550A:r)
**Ron DeSantis**
_Governor of the Free State of Florida_
