name: Trudy Busch Valentine
subject: To whom much is given, much is required.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trudy Busch Valentine for Senate
body:
I’m Trudy Busch Valentine – a nurse, mother, children’s advocate and proud Missourian.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45319001/345412090/-1843232826?code=jtk1-su-warmup2&refcode=jtk1-su-warmup2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzI5MDliOC1hZmQzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FcrFyyP6AGFTn3IH7qfkGW7ddfPktZRQJHdIRkBR0oU=)
---
Peter,

I’m Trudy Busch Valentine – a nurse, mother, children’s advocate, and proud Missourian. I’ve spent my life giving back and helping others, and now I’m running for U.S. Senate. I hope you’ll take just a moment to read about what’s at stake and why I launched this campaign.
As a young girl growing up in Missouri, I watched my parents live the American Dream. They always told me, “To whom much is given, much is required.” That sense of obligation to help others is what drove me to choose a life of service.

It’s why I volunteered as a candy striper when I was only 13 years old. It’s what led me to attend nursing school, work in hospitals, and later, work for the Salvation Army.
It’s also why I’ve decided to run for U.S. Senate – **because Missourians deserve a senator who will put politics aside, put people first, and work to make sure that everyone is able to live out their American Dream. As we launch this campaign, I’m gathering input from grassroots supporters to help shape our priorities – and I’d love to hear from you, Peter. **
[**So I need to ask a favor: Could you please take a few minutes to complete our campaign's first priorities survey? Your feedback is essential to helping me understand where to focus our efforts in our campaign to fix a broken Washington.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45319005/345412097/621711743?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1-su-warmup2&refcode=jtk1-su-warmup2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzI5MDliOC1hZmQzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FcrFyyP6AGFTn3IH7qfkGW7ddfPktZRQJHdIRkBR0oU=&emci=e50430de-01d3-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=6c2909b8-afd3-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=4450063)
As you probably know, Peter, I’ve never had to fight to get the healthcare I need. I’ve never seen an eviction notice on my door. I’ve never worried about paying my electric bill.

But too many Missourians have.
These days, the American Dream seems to come with a price tag – and that price is way too high. That’s why I’m ready to help lower the cost of basic necessities. I’m ready to expand access to affordable healthcare. I’m ready to fight for a woman’s right to choose. And I’m ready to put an end to our state’s tragic opioid epidemic.
Peter, we’ve known for too long that Washington is broken, with leaders dividing rather than uniting us. Missourians know that we need more compassion and less politics. To truly solve problems, we need leadership that puts politics aside and puts people first – and that’s exactly what I’m ready to do as your next U.S. Senator.
**But look: I believe leaders should talk less and listen more – and that’s why I’m reaching out to you as we kick off this campaign.[This is our campaign’s very first priorities survey, and your answers today will help guide the strategy to fix a broken Washington and rebuild our great state. I’d be so grateful for your input.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45319009/345412101/621711743?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1-su-warmup2&refcode=jtk1-su-warmup2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzI5MDliOC1hZmQzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FcrFyyP6AGFTn3IH7qfkGW7ddfPktZRQJHdIRkBR0oU=&emci=e50430de-01d3-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=6c2909b8-afd3-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=4450063)**
While working in the hospital, I cared for children, seniors, and people from all walks of life. It’s also where I learned the importance of quality healthcare. As a nurse, I believe that every person deserves access to the very best medical care, and as a mother, I believe that every woman should have access to contraception and abortion care – full stop.
You’ve no doubt seen the news. The U.S. Supreme Court reportedly intends to overturn Roe v. Wade, landmark legislation that has protected a woman’s right to choose for nearly 50 years. **We don’t know what will happen next, but here’s what I do know: You can count on me to fight for the rights of ALL Missourians.**
But I can only run a campaign that’s worthy of your support if grassroots input is at the center of our strategy. **[So, Peter, will you help our campaign get off to a strong start by answering our very first priorities survey? Your opinion means a lot to me.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45319013/345412105/621711743?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1-su-warmup2&refcode=jtk1-su-warmup2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzI5MDliOC1hZmQzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FcrFyyP6AGFTn3IH7qfkGW7ddfPktZRQJHdIRkBR0oU=&emci=e50430de-01d3-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=6c2909b8-afd3-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=4450063)**

clean_body: I’m Trudy Busch Valentine – a nurse, mother, children’s advocate and proud Missourian. | | | = Peter, I’m Trudy Busch Valentine – a nurse, mother, children’s advocate, and proud Missourian. I’ve spent my life giving back and helping others, and now I’m running for U.S. Senate. I hope you’ll take just a moment to read about what’s at stake and why I launched this campaign. As a young girl growing up in Missouri, I watched my parents live the American Dream. They always told me, “To whom much is given, much is required.” That sense of obligation to help others is what drove me to choose a life of service. It’s why I volunteered as a candy striper when I was only 13 years old. It’s what led me to attend nursing school, work in hospitals, and later, work for the Salvation Army. It’s also why I’ve decided to run for U.S. Senate – because Missourians deserve a senator who will put politics aside, put people first, and work to make sure that everyone is able to live out their American Dream. As we launch this campaign, I’m gathering input from grassroots supporters to help shape our priorities – and I’d love to hear from you, Peter. As you probably know, Peter, I’ve never had to fight to get the healthcare I need. I’ve never seen an eviction notice on my door. I’ve never worried about paying my electric bill. But too many Missourians have. These days, the American Dream seems to come with a price tag – and that price is way too high. That’s why I’m ready to help lower the cost of basic necessities. I’m ready to expand access to affordable healthcare. I’m ready to fight for a woman’s right to choose. And I’m ready to put an end to our state’s tragic opioid epidemic. Peter, we’ve known for too long that Washington is broken, with leaders dividing rather than uniting us. Missourians know that we need more compassion and less politics. To truly solve problems, we need leadership that puts politics aside and puts people first – and that’s exactly what I’m ready to do as your next U.S. Senator. But look: I believe leaders should talk less and listen more – and that’s why I’m reaching out to you as we kick off this campaign. While working in the hospital, I cared for children, seniors, and people from all walks of life. It’s also where I learned the importance of quality healthcare. As a nurse, I believe that every person deserves access to the very best medical care, and as a mother, I believe that every woman should have access to contraception and abortion care – full stop. You’ve no doubt seen the news. The U.S. Supreme Court reportedly intends to overturn Roe v. Wade, landmark legislation that has protected a woman’s right to choose for nearly 50 years. We don’t know what will happen next, but here’s what I do know: You can count on me to fight for the rights of ALL Missourians. But I can only run a campaign that’s worthy of your support if grassroots input is at the center of our strategy. | | Thanks for joining our campaign for a better Missouri, Trudy | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. | | 2022 | Paid for by Trudy Busch Valentine for Senate Contributions to Trudy Busch Valentine for Senate are not tax deductible. Trudy Busch Valentine for Senate PO Box 11826 Clayton, MO 63105 United States

clean_body: We’re all in to finish what we started in 2020. | | | Peter — early voting for the runoff starts on May 16th! We’re all in to finish what we started in 2020. And this time, we’re in a better position to win. Why? Because more people know Jessica and more people are ready for new representation in TX-28. They know about Henry Cuellar’s failed record in Congress and are questioning if he’s fit to continue to represent TX-28. Early voting starts soon, and that means we have 10 days left to reach as many voters as possible — and right now, we are putting everything on the table. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: We are en la lucha to make our government accountable to all of us and together we will bring change to South Texas. Let’s win this, Team Cisneros | To give by check: PO Box 660 Laredo, TX 78042

name: VetVoice Foundation
subject: Tell President Biden – Protect Castner Range Forever
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VET VOICE FOUNDATION
body:
Veterans and military families have long been central figures in efforts to create, expand, and safeguard our nation’s greatest treasures – our public lands and waters.
#
Derek,
The campaign to see Castner Range permanently protected as a national monument is gaining momentum, including a recent visit by Secretary of the Interior Deb Haaland. _
Earlier this year, [eight retired general and flag officers sent a letter](https://act.votevets.org/go/2631?t=1&akid=5842%2E3013755%2En51rZy) to President Biden urging him to designate Castner Range, which is part of the U.S. Army’s Fort Bliss, as a national monument. [Local El Paso veterans have made their voices heard as well.](https://act.votevets.org/go/2901?t=2&akid=5842%2E3013755%2En51rZy)
Will you join them?_
As Major General (Ret.) Paul Eaton said, _“Ensuring we permanently protect the irreplaceable landscape, history, and cultural sites at Castner Range for future generations is a civic and patriotic undertaking.”_
| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.votevets.org/signup/biden_castner_petition_may22?source=em220514-1-7&t=3&akid=5842%2E3013755%2En51rZy)
---
Campaigns like this are nothing new to us. We were there urging President Obama to create Bears Ears and Grand Staircase-Escalante National Monuments. We were there pushing back against President Trump’s efforts to sell off our public lands to the highest bidder. And we’re proud to be part of the ever-growing effort to see West Texas’s Castner Range permanently protected as a national monument.
This shouldn’t be surprising to anyone. As the letter states: _“Wherever one finds an effort to protect our wild spaces, one will find a veteran lending their voice to those efforts.”_
We’re proud to be part of this effort. Will you join us?
| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.votevets.org/signup/biden_castner_petition_may22?source=em220514-1-7&t=4&akid=5842%2E3013755%2En51rZy)
---
Last year, President Biden released his _America the Beautiful_ initiative which, among other things, calls for the conservation of 30% of America’s lands and waters by 2030. President Biden has made progress, but more must be done – by all of us. Designating Castner Range as a national monument will ensure this pristine landscape, along with military and cultural heritage sites, endangered species, and scientific wonders are permanently protected.
[**Tell President Biden to use the Antiquities Act to protect Castner Range as a national monument.**](https://act.votevets.org/signup/biden_castner_petition_may22?source=em220514-1-7&t=5&akid=5842%2E3013755%2En51rZy)
| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.votevets.org/signup/biden_castner_petition_may22?source=em220514-1-7&t=6&akid=5842%2E3013755%2En51rZy)
---
Thank you for reading and for your support,
Janessa
Janessa Goldbeck
CEO
Vet Voice Foundation

PAID FOR BY VET VOICE FOUNDATION
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here ](https://act.votevets.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=7&akid=5842%2E3013755%2En51rZy).

name: ICYMI News
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our presi
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4p6uthe4v83i0sf24aoikctdc4kvqqig4s6r65o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkir39tdkmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbpb3d31e2o74tr263im4p1ge5hr0o3i65or1o33mjhbct5lmermatjiemojcpbgcv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj666ob6p1ge8omcd70mdi3fc5lclp238h1e8he4933clh6apb4c9h6aoh5u)
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmlb99ahsdsn1nebvm59l6o51rle00jfgp2i5018_rp22sh2s8i66pb2clim8oj2clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zliv17508pmqamqbdf5e3ia8981lpbs68qtmghn0_rp22sh2s8i66pb2clim8oj2clh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zkvjumdrbippc7nh7s4vs60tl1jhgpokinpil710_rp22sh2s8i66pb2clim8oj2clh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

I can’t stress how urgent this time is, Friend.

We need to _cover every street with signs_ , **call every conservative in our district** , and _get our top fighting force ready_ to **win big next week.**

name: Team Budd
subject: Running Out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate
body:
|

I choose a leader who will get things done. If you agree, you are standing with me and Patty.

|

---
| | | *****URGENT MESSAGE FROM CONGRESSMAN JIM JORDAN*****
This is really important. My team reached out to let me know that we're in LOW SUPPLY of signed books. **[If you want your own signed copy of Do What You Said You Would Do, you need to act NOW!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60390576:61WJ9JoeN:m:1:3299561967:A9E6BC373BD5CB9FBEDA59F362F6A052:r "If you want your own signed copy of Do What You Said You Would Do, you need to act NOW!")**
---
| | | [REQUEST YOUR SIGNED COPY](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60390576:61WJ9JoeN:m:1:3299561967:A9E6BC373BD5CB9FBEDA59F362F6A052:r "Generic
Button")
---
If you wait even FIVE minutes, we could be totally sold out. Please, don't wait any longer. Make sure to reserve your copy IMMEDIATELY!

Thank you,

Jim Jordan

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Jim Jordan**
Date: (March 11th, 2022)
Subject: Do What You Said You Would Do

I signed a very limited number of copies of my new book, _Do What You Said You Would Do._

As an elite Conservative Patriot, I know you need to have one - so I set one aside for you until midnight tonight. _As I said, there are an extremely limited number of signed copies and this is your only chance to grab one_.
---
| | | [REQUEST YOUR SIGNED COPY](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60390576:61WJ9JoeN:m:1:3299561967:A9E6BC373BD5CB9FBEDA59F362F6A052:r "Generic Button")
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60390576:61WJ9JoeN:m:1:3299561967:A9E6BC373BD5CB9FBEDA59F362F6A052:r)
---

**This book is an essential must-read for any America First patriot who wants to understand Donald J. Trump 's successful four years as president.**

President Trump showed us how to win. He said he was going to cut taxes, he did. He said he was going to reduce regulations, he did. Do what you told them you were going to do. That's the model that works.

**[By ordering your copy now you will be receiving a great read and supporting critical efforts to take back our Conservative House Majority.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60390576:61WJ9JoeN:m:1:3299561967:A9E6BC373BD5CB9FBEDA59F362F6A052:r "By ordering
your copy now you will be receiving a great read and supporting critical efforts to take back our Conservative House Majority.")**

Pelosi's targeting conservatives across America and she has more money than she knows what to do with. Pelosi will do everything in her power to make sure we FAIL, including dragging conservatives in ALL 50 states through the mud.

Taking back the House is the key to saving America. Without the House, our country will be lost forever to Nancy Pelosi and the Radical Left.

**[So please don't pass up this opportunity to ensure Pelosi fails in her quest to retain the speaker's gavel AND get your hands on this LIMITED EDITION signed copy of my book! The copies I've signed won't last long, so order yours immediately.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60390576:61WJ9JoeN:m:1:3299561967:A9E6BC373BD5CB9FBEDA59F362F6A052:r "So please don't
pass up this opportunity to ensure Pelosi fails in her quest to retain the speaker's gavel AND get your hands on this LIMITED EDITION signed copy of
my book! The copies I’ve signed won’t last long, so order yours immediately.")**

I stand with House Conservatives who fight for freedom in the swamp and do what they said they would do.

**[Do you?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60390576:61WJ9JoeN:m:1:3299561967:A9E6BC373BD5CB9FBEDA59F362F6A052:r "Do you?")**

Thank you,

Jim Jordan

---
| |
* * *

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60390577:61WJ9JoeN:m:1:3299561967:A9E6BC373BD5CB9FBEDA59F362F6A052:r "Red Wave Image Link")

Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60390577:61WJ9JoeN:m:1:3299561967:A9E6BC373BD5CB9FBEDA59F362F6A052:r "Can we count on you to step up?")**

Thank you for your continued support and thank you for being a dedicated member of our team.

The copies I’ve signed won’t last long, so order yours immediately." I stand with House Conservatives who fight for freedom in the swamp and do what they said they would do. "Do you?" Thank you, Jim Jordan | | "Red Wave Image Link" Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER. Fellow conservative,

Right now we face **high gas prices** , **record-breaking inflation** , and **empty shelves**.

Thankfully, we have a solution to America’s lethargic economy... **VOTE REPUBLICAN**.

Joe Biden just shared that he believes MORE government spending will HELP our economy. **Biden and the Left DO NOT CARE about the taxpayers **who fuel their out-of-control spending!

**It’s time Republicans start WINNING so we can SAVE AMERICA.**

We must defend Mississippi as one of the LAST outposts of real Conservatism. We set an example of excellent Republican leadership nationwide and we need YOUR help to do so.

**Our mid-month deadline is TOMORROW NIGHT at 11:59 pm.****If conservatives are going to take back control of our country, we need to start right NOW. **

We set an example of excellent Republican leadership nationwide and we need YOUR help to do so. Thank You, Mississippi GOP | | Paid for by the Mississippi Republican Party | |

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MELANIE DARRIGO
body:
| | | | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuvrE3uYoMlSSKiL8kN3DrGHMq1vYWA9yWdrA6UCU_OFFwVTyksOkY-4_9IcdfVv0BRop7XU0z8oAErh9UV2zcydmQ_Dyqmvm9ftF9L2ddB7zYy5wU-MlTVbDAk-kneHdgRjaqL-IpSxTyifGW-VpkdlcYbHGDcQIZ0LTdl0_BujsR0sOEdz9MT7TzSxSeF9wlkFyFk0BzpcjiwbWk1_qCQHLcg4fJ7cZjqLTpYqSxOPBxIdekH3TGqyQz5jT0KXjEJa3Y1RLKZ7BFtSfxEiiDCa_rc7ncT7zdHyuRGWEvhyOtmiKJdCAciOLhxdO0LpfiVEyhQIXHZn3hkRAyBTZTbWuzImi4dKqjU-C_AAJb_is5Gn5AtBwMCUy7Fv45m9Q/3m1/o4XrYvjCQvuLr7gu-a1lNg/h0/exKtC92uhpk4loDs7mYZ8r18VTk-vhQN2oTfwNRZVFM)
---
Peter Willis, I know not everyone likes math, but I’ll make it easy, I promise.
As of March, the ten candidates in our race raised over $2 million. Let’s break that down a little more.
**[Before you read on, help us prove that big organizing can defeat big money by chipping in today >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuvrE3uYoMlSSKiL8kN3DrGHMq1vYWA9yWdrA6UCU_OFFwVTyksOkY-4_9IcdfVv0BRop7XU0z8oAErh9UV2zcUrzULTiEV_NgbaZJj6EUWh0iVt9EOQMelUxHmspOqgM8XtHSDrTYbMsbJvhr5iBnrDqJCorEQuvbAtzq-XwnWlDpIhHW2sUEjvuowFurbXZNWkFoglBAARqaP31TCRA8gfDgt53LTy8ZwgEfVPw4bvidGGFKN0bDgERQ7W5-H9wML4OOHbP2leDUwJkvfaj7EEAPwym9BV0uiVouLYoK5QblGnt2519qAddiqGd1UyszC7x9RAXcksMShXxiVuazdY1g3B_ht4LkrR-PHcitEFFV9S2Jev7Zao69jJtkZ3E/3m1/o4XrYvjCQvuLr7gu-a1lNg/h1/CqzokWJaByHyGpSneA0U94PqriNx_PawtqYpjTANNGc)**
[Donate](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuvrE3uYoMlSSKiL8kN3DrGHMq1vYWA9yWdrA6UCU_OFFwVTyksOkY-4_9IcdfVv0BRop7XU0z8oAErh9UV2zcNysiTsnBkK5VYqHkArWVyTEIs7ZylOmTlAvroYL6lBwM7GPJdMB94EhAsihdiBfEJoUUTaXpeLManiVaahbN2t78iONUBR-_NIXtAa-bgpNbHhTILkiAyCXYg9Z2UGUiXzdULs_tn8YlJBS1hbVhq7kcLRO-vwNlHMXxx17xA1AJhRfVD7LmxJK7JflT4dLH5y5ZpSNQgctmT6gBClb-EvpzA39qImttpVDMLjB6VGIJi9lpfEk_3LgrY-4sweCEqaWL-qQRViZSRvtaFlTctWDehauTwhwU7RPXLkg1jSw/3m1/o4XrYvjCQvuLr7gu-a1lNg/h2/9y2S-FduTbVYU3FwOJ5cc9YkUBEa_PIv0hM1f38d0FE)
---
Just on the Democrat side, we’re up against a candidate who loaned themselves $130,000, another who has taken a max donation from Bill Bratton, Rudy Guilliani’s police commissioner, and three candidates where less than 2.5% of their donations are small dollar donations.
The differences couldn’t be clearer: over 62% of our donations came from New York state and 87% of our donors were first-time donors to the campaign — **demonstrating that we’re bringing in new supporters every day _and_ building momentum locally.**
**While we don’t have ties to big donor networks, we do have the advantage on the ground.** For months, our campaign has been building a diverse coalition grounded in the idea that our government should work for _all of us_.
This seat belongs to our community — not lobbyists, billionaires, or special interest groups. We are ready to fight for universal healthcare, bold action on climate, voting rights and real relief for our communities — and we will win.
**But realistically, in order to prevail in this primary, we must keep building up our grassroots resources. With the recent move of the primary from June to August, we simply need more support than we first anticipated.[Please make a donation today to help us keep going through August and beyond!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuvrE3uYoMlSSKiL8kN3DrGHMq1vYWA9yWdrA6UCU_OFFwVTyksOkY-4_9IcdfVv0BRop7XU0z8oAErh9UV2zcDlDI-clnlF8s1OY9Of5JUxGhfQZd71rIvnwjUWRP_RqLKPlD_Q4Affq-IOz0Cryfl6MkFACRon1Ca9Ur1zZZMq7ywfWgNkDhxL7KyCstnvT-xhKDKnaKlTJAO03YvyVIMoCKgiWTnfAJmzOocnZ0YSL1gtzavRdf31jJVhy24tVUMJ02ICqVjHfR5pHhBqV5C-QrNdkHXPOaHjBndFIA96AfViBIxUawni_S4ZwsyxvAvC-FaylUr20nv5iuaU2d1JNFda2bA_euz5cKuq7qdilXfmijLNhLjCIKK2Ca13U/3m1/o4XrYvjCQvuLr7gu-a1lNg/h3/c2cpNTw21Irj9hSB_v-_EL7tCi2cV_uCNhdx7b5SG1U)**
[Donate](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuvrE3uYoMlSSKiL8kN3DrGHMq1vYWA9yWdrA6UCU_OFFwVTyksOkY-4_9IcdfVv0BRop7XU0z8oAErh9UV2zcXrkQ9u6rojdfZsc2QAoSexv31v2AeutdccBwlaEMYp8SkJv_k9kH6vdQ8dVDN1lXJFtRBc3Dk5LpfHvYuhhKnGtfPOCT1GI38Kmj6l_myrWlVkBU1Owld7cJmqjvIxE5eOg43wV2BKEiqcrCC9zUPtSL08lc14pk6bNHhThC1GXz56k76RN2999DcZM23bw7Spm8HF8EDguq2ajX0Rse_i73z2B0g34bBfZYH8fwghHJuYjPYg8c-TYYvCvKfuQCNnB4mesZ6n-K4Jgm2okVEuf1NH5qvwr_UiJjQ_rfEgE/3m1/o4XrYvjCQvuLr7gu-a1lNg/h4/phCyEXvhIIHzMnP8Jt_xqba1Pz3gjSealrZsiB6MM50)
---
My campaign will prove that an organized grassroots movement beats Big Money every time! Moving onward together is the only way forward.
Yours in the fight,
Melanie

Melanie D'Arrigo is a mother of three and healthcare advocate running for New York's 3rd District on Medicare for All and the Green New Deal. Our movement isn't taking a dime of corporate PAC money, which means we need your support. **[Chip in $10 or more to our campaign here.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuvrE3uYoMlSSKiL8kN3DrGHMq1vYWA9yWdrA6UCU_OFFwVTyksOkY-4_9IcdfVv0BRop7XU0z8oAErh9UV2zcalxN8Gp-3_HqgmNO3bNhFUb9RtCj_0gWNSJjT7hFE7ECgLnN9-BqH8M74xNVGuLrtzuAlnMEH9O6LBNF8FgSATq8Or98C1fGCzkFHnOHVQLW6U10FGx-BGy88lRRBimwpFfOuvNJK9lFplMInEjYMBPhgySIkw8uEEk3DheAivcEZcaZrlo2f0KDGCdvo7NJlOviFIU_v06W2w8rCmN_PrMHqVkNw66S1uVRlv3FcaHuajQVtmpSM8aWvDaLXuLl63Q9er_3-ZKCaQk5GWMcmzTjOP52BiEyHGL83tFTobc/3m1/o4XrYvjCQvuLr7gu-a1lNg/h5/6a_xiPXH-lLOvbc7MyjJPQk_J9y2f7nyla9viBfOHHA)**

clean_body: | | | | Peter Willis, I know not everyone likes math, but I’ll make it easy, I promise. As of March, the ten candidates in our race raised over $2 million. Let’s break that down a little more. Just on the Democrat side, we’re up against a candidate who loaned themselves $130,000, another who has taken a max donation from Bill Bratton, Rudy Guilliani’s police commissioner, and three candidates where less than 2.5% of their donations are small dollar donations. The differences couldn’t be clearer: over 62% of our donations came from New York state and 87% of our donors were first-time donors to the campaign — demonstrating that we’re bringing in new supporters every day and building momentum locally. While we don’t have ties to big donor networks, we do have the advantage on the ground. For months, our campaign has been building a diverse coalition grounded in the idea that our government should work for all of us. This seat belongs to our community — not lobbyists, billionaires, or special interest groups. We are ready to fight for universal healthcare, bold action on climate, voting rights and real relief for our communities — and we will win. But realistically, in order to prevail in this primary, we must keep building up our grassroots resources. With the recent move of the primary from June to August, we simply need more support than we first anticipated. My campaign will prove that an organized grassroots movement beats Big Money every time! Moving onward together is the only way forward. Yours in the fight, Melanie Melanie D'Arrigo is a mother of three and healthcare advocate running for New York's 3rd District on Medicare for All and the Green New Deal. Our movement isn't taking a dime of corporate PAC money, which means we need your support. | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MELANIE DARRIGO (not by corporations or lobbyists) Friends of Melanie D'Arrigo P.O. Box 312 Port Washington, NY 11050 | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Melanie D'Arrigo for NY-03, please .

I know you’ve been getting a lot of emails from my team lately, but I wanted to take a few minutes of your day to share something really important with you – why I decided to run for Congress.

[**If you don’t have time to read on, I hope you’ll consider making an $3 donation to my Democratic campaign to flip this ultra-competitive open seat »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45320129/345416634/161715760?amount=3&refcode=NBFC_20220514_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MGIwMmZlNi1iM2QzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZAg73kxVHFmFJNaQp4--orcz9fAcu63pfNUmb7ZAzE0=) | [$2,500 MIDNIGHT GOAL: CHIP IN $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45320132/345416637/161715760?amount=3&refcode=NBFC_20220514_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MGIwMmZlNi1iM2QzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZAg73kxVHFmFJNaQp4--orcz9fAcu63pfNUmb7ZAzE0=)

I was born in Peoria, Illinois to a family that taught me the importance of community, hard work, and service to others.

My grandpa was a union painter, and my grandma was a public-school teacher. They built honest, middle-class lives with those jobs.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45320134/345416640/161715760?amount=3&refcode=NBFC_20220514_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MGIwMmZlNi1iM2QzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZAg73kxVHFmFJNaQp4--orcz9fAcu63pfNUmb7ZAzE0=)
They inspired me to dedicate my career to fighting for working people – and I’ve never looked back.

I’ve traveled the country fighting to get hardworking people the pay and workplace safety conditions they deserve, and I’ve seen firsthand the challenges that today’s working families face.

So, I decided to run for Congress – _because I believe the risks these days to central and southern Illinoisans are too great to ignore._

I’m running to bring people together and get things done for working families. **That’s what I did in my career, and it’s what I’ll do in Congress.**

I vow to be a champion for you and your family in Washington, but I can’t win this race alone.

[**I’m running in one of the top most competitive swing-districts in the entire country, so I really need your support to equip my campaign with the resources needed to win. Can you chip in a $3 donation right now to help me take this fight to Washington? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45320137/345416642/161715760?amount=3&refcode=NBFC_20220514_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MGIwMmZlNi1iM2QzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZAg73kxVHFmFJNaQp4--orcz9fAcu63pfNUmb7ZAzE0=)

Democrat Nikki Budzinski is running for Congress in Illinois' 13th District. This district is currently in Republican hands, and is by far one of the most competitive in the entire country.

Nikki has spent her life fighting for workers and working families by strengthening unions nationwide, and she was instrumental in passing a $15 minimum wage in Illinois while working as a senior advisor for Governor JB Pritzker. Most recently, Nikki served in President Biden's administration in the office that implemented the American Rescue Plan.

Nikki believes in the American Dream and will bring people together to level the playing field and rebuild the middle class so families have a shot to get ahead.

name: Tobias Read
subject: Thank you
body:
The next few days are going to be hectic, so I want to tell you now: Thank you.
---
| | Dear Peter,

The next few days are going to be hectic, so I want to tell you now: **Thank you**. For your words of encouragement, thoughtful ideas, campaign contributions, and so much more. We’ve changed the conversation around the issues facing our state, and regardless of the outcome on Tuesday I know that we’ll do tremendous good for Oregonians everywhere.

Thank you as well for your vote. It’s hard to describe the feeling on election day. I’ve never gotten used to the idea of asking hundreds of thousands of people to exercise their most fundamental right to vote for me. We’ve come a long way together and, I hope, we’ll be doing this all again in the general election.

[**But first we’ve got to get through Tuesday. If you haven’t voted yet, please take a few minutes to find your nearest drop box and cast your vote before 8 PM on election day.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45320176/345416745/719410068?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDMyYzEwZS1iNGQzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l8ycGdB5SGAzQUIoRd9K6sgaLogUB-NNWPuFeUelF9g=&emci=fb008707-b4d3-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=6432c10e-b4d3-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=30662126)

I’ve met so many of you in the last few months. We’ve seen first hand the conditions people are living in when they’re forced to camp in our public spaces. We’ve seen the horrific impacts of the wildfires and the COVID-19 pandemic. I’ve spoken with families devastated by gun violence, business owners concerned for our economic future, and parents anxious about the state of our schools.

**It’s easy to lay out the problems, and much harder to bring people together not only to _find_ solutions but to carry them out. But we’re ready to get it done, together.**

Government is full of well intentioned people. As your Governor, I’ll bring the can-do attitude and experience from the Treasury to the Governor’s office. We’re all tired of delays and excuses. We deserve better.

I have a plan to build up transitional housing – right away – and help move homeless families off our streets and out of unsafe camps in our public spaces. I’ve put forward actionable proposals to support our public schools and make once in a generation investments in our kids. And I have the broadest, most detailed plan to bring down surging violent crime by working it from every direction.

Great ideas mean nothing if we can’t make them real. In government, like in any job, there has to be follow through. As Treasurer, I’m the only candidate for Governor who’s had to implement major initiatives, and my record speaks for itself.

[**This campaign has been a long one, and we’ve had quite a few last minute campaign expenses. Will you help keep our GOTV efforts funded through Tuesday?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45320177/345416746/1587611774?refcode=514&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDMyYzEwZS1iNGQzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l8ycGdB5SGAzQUIoRd9K6sgaLogUB-NNWPuFeUelF9g=)

Let’s get through this election so we can get back to work for the people of Oregon.

Thank you,

---

| Peter,

It’s Coby, Josh’s Campaign Manager.

Since we launched this campaign in November, a lot has changed, but the issues facing Upstate New Yorkers remain the same.

In fact, our favorite part of this campaign has been connecting with voters and supporters like you, Peter, to hear about what issues you care about most.

**That’s why Josh will make it a point to call every grassroots donor who chips in through this email to thank them and talk about the work it’ll take to win this race and the issues that matter most.**

We’re so hopeful for our future in Upstate New York because we’re so proud of our history. At a time when the country is so divided, our campaign is focused on bringing people together to find common ground on the issues that matter: revitalizing and strengthening the economy in a way that lifts everyone up and brings everyone along.

Peter, we need representatives in Congress who are willing to put people over politics — and that starts by listening to YOU, the supporters fueling our campaign.

**So, please, Peter, use the custom link below to pitch in what you’re able to contribute to our campaign, get a call from Josh, and talk about how we can work together to solve our biggest challenges:**

[_**https://JoshRileyforCongress.com/Call-From-Josh**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45320292/345417201/-968168996?refcode=BLU-JRFC-20220514-1-em&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTBlYzY0OC1iNmQzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jb7QCrg4ohmIcq70qe8hKSiADXwTzRUy_t68_sGxRlY=)

Thank you,

Coby Eiss

| | , **Joe Jaworski is Day One Ready.**

Ready to protect reproductive rights. Ready to end corruption in the AG's office. **Ready to stand up for Texans.**

That's why the [**Houston Chronicle**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=d4c26cba7e&e=5d8d80652b), the [**Dallas Morning News**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=21a3b5c1ab&e=5d8d80652b), and [**so many of our elected leaders in Texas**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=01c43da1f4&e=5d8d80652b) have endorsed Joe: they know he has what it takes to win and they trust him to do what's right for Texas.

[**So as we are just 10 days away from the May 24th runoff, will you chip in once again to help us win this election?**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=cb6416c08f&e=5d8d80652b) [](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=5a445e231d&e=5d8d80652b)
**_[Wa](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=d7333836ad&e=5d8d80652b)[tch our commercial, I Believe, today.](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=00672ca0da&e=5d8d80652b)_** The stakes are too high for us to stop now — we must elect Joe Jaworski in the runoff so we can defeat Ken Paxton this Fall.

[**Will you join Team Jaworski today and help us win?**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=48576b7b7c&e=5d8d80652b) — Team Jaworski
**If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:** [**Express Donate: $10**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=d7d63d9b89&e=5d8d80652b) [**Express Donate: $25**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=6ff1e14bab&e=5d8d80652b) [**Express Donate: $50**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=4fe27fae5b&e=5d8d80652b) [**Express Donate: $100**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=8b0683ea72&e=5d8d80652b) [**Express Donate: $250**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=2487f71b1d&e=5d8d80652b) [**Or, donate another amount**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=09453a600c&e=5d8d80652b)

name: American Action News
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7o0ln0btq4dhv9iu6ms37abai85pcflrvlbt430_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2ulomat75ehh3aspie1h60t5lm9ob8orjespr8s72ehojcolmmuordcpks6qm0o37q9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphhm2pm8c3i6hj3co5jc1jr1db5e8gq48bi4bh28or5c9imaob0s9g649fg)
This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z34rmerh497d36d2r455ddgt9n5udf2dsl5rm2q0_rp22sh2s8i66pb2clim2o72c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zk6195usgmbjfntjjcgkeuiufet52pu9dcr9plhg_rp22sh2s8i66pb2clim2o72c1h2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zidh4kjkbo0iqc0geeic4mgtkaci25nlbelb7868_rp22sh2s8i66pb2clim2o72c1h2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Action News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americanactionnews.com/prefs/9z2zagih1n81ud4q1oif3t6p4j19jc3piji4mtpqpk8).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2okrqu97qt54k7out0mn2o7r2jpp3piu999he30_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or5c9imaob0s9g649fg)

clean_body: The Former Guy got his wish in Ohio. J.D. Vance is the Republican nominee for U.S. Senate. Peter, It's official: The Former Guy got his wish in Ohio. J.D. Vance is the Republican nominee for U.S. Senate. The once "Never Trumper," who wrote a book scolding the poor and detailing how out-of-place he felt in Ohio, saw an opportunity to trade his principles for power, and he took it. With the help of nearly $20 million from his billionaire former boss, Peter Thiel, he moved home and bought the nomination. Fortunately, Congressman Tim Ryan is ready to stop him -- and we know where his loyalties are. Tim has been a fierce ally of families and working people in the House, and he's ready to flip a Senate seat Republicans have controlled for 23 years -- with your help. = If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = Tim is running a campaign that puts working people first, while voting alongside Bob to provide relief to millions of Ohio families. His opponent, on the other hand, is wildly out-of-touch. He openly stated, "I don’t really care what happens to Ukraine," even as Russian aggression has increased gas prices and inflation. He's also called for some of the most severe restrictions on reproductive rights imaginable. It's no wonder the Wall Street Journal called Tim Ryan "Democrats' Most Important 2022 Candidate." If we flip Ohio’s seat, we can help keep the Biden agenda on track. If we fail, we could backslide right into Trump 2024 with J.D. Vance helping lead the charge. = Thanks for taking action, Team Casey = PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC. Bob Casey for Senate PO Box 58746 Philadelphia, PA 19102 United States

name: Peggy Wood
subject: my daughter Maggie
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
Today, I want to talk about the progress we’ve made for women in this country over my lifetime and how Maggie fits into that story.
| | |
---
_Peggy Wood is Senator Hassan’s Mom. Her note below provides a compelling point of view on our country’s history and the role you can play in it. It’s a bit longer, but we think it’s worth the read. If you’re ready to do your part for freedom today without reading this message, you can donate to Senator Hassan’s campaign**[here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45320960/345420513/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk1060-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDEwY2VjYy1iOGQzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Nc_pKes_0oSnWu--e87BD3ad2zimft2FR4r3szh7-HI=)**._
Hello,
My daughter Maggie Hassan is a shining star (I know, all parents say that about their kids). Today, I want to talk about the progress we’ve made for women in this country over my lifetime and how Maggie fits into that story.
A number of “firsts” have stayed with me throughout my life, clear as day, as I’m sure they have for many women my age.
I remember when Sandra Day O’Connor broke the pattern of (dare I say old!) men only serving on the Supreme Court when she became the first woman Justice in 1981, and you bet I remember when Ruth Bader Ginsburg, Elena Kagan, and Sonia Sotomayor continued her legacy and made history with three women sitting on the Supreme Court.
I remember when _Griswold v. Connecticut_ was decided, giving women the right to access birth control and allowing them to freely and openly make health care choices for themselves.
And I remember when _Roe v. Wade_ was decided, protecting the right to a safe and legal abortion.
These victories felt personal, as if I had a real stake in them. That’s because I made a conscious choice to get involved. I served on the state board of the local Planned Parenthood when I lived in Connecticut, knocked doors for candidates I cared about, and donated to causes I believed in.
**What worries me - and why I’m writing today - is that these fundamental rights (and many others) are under attack.**
The nearly 50-year precedent set by _Roe v. Wade_ is on the precipice of being overturned by the Supreme Court's anti-choice majority. The repercussions that would follow this decision would be awful.
**I remember when women did not have access to safe and legal abortion: It was dangerous and, at times, deadly. We cannot go back. **
**That is why we have to fight twice as hard to protect our fundamental rights as we did to secure them in the first place.**
Across the country, partisan politicians are anticipating the end of _Roe_ and _ _ launching unprecedented efforts to eviscerate reproductive rights.
States like Texas and Ohio are implementing draconian abortion bans. New Hampshire Republicans have enacted the first abortion ban in modern New Hampshire history. Mitch McConnell is refusing to say whether he’d consider a Supreme Court nominee put forth by a Democratic president if Republicans take back the Senate majority. Threats like these are why my husband would sometimes start breakfast with this question to Maggie and her siblings: “What are you doing for freedom today?”
Well, here is something **you** can do for freedom right now! We know that many of you have already contributed to Maggie’s campaign, and we hope you can do it again. Just consider this:
She unseated a Republican in her last race by just 1,017 votes, and holding on to her New Hampshire Senate seat could be the difference between holding the Democratic majority or handing it back to Mitch McConnell. **Just think: If Maggie had LOST by 1,017 votes, the Affordable Care Act would’ve been repealed and millions would’ve lost critical health insurance!**
My daughter’s Senate seat has a history of being one of the most competitive in the country. Your involvement here is crucial. **[If you’re still reading, I’m asking you one last time to please do your part for freedom and rush $3 or any amount to help reelect Maggie.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45320961/345420514/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&amount=3&refcode=mh-jtk1060-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDEwY2VjYy1iOGQzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Nc_pKes_0oSnWu--e87BD3ad2zimft2FR4r3szh7-HI=)**
Thank you for reading,
Peggy Wood
Maggie’s Mom
| If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, **[donate now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45320962/345420515/-1829049351?refcode=mh-jtk1060-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDEwY2VjYy1iOGQzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Nc_pKes_0oSnWu--e87BD3ad2zimft2FR4r3szh7-HI=)**. name: Bernie Sanders
subject: I am supporting Summer Lee
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Hello Peter,

I am proud to support Justice Democrat Summer Lee in her election to
represent Pennsylvania's 12th Congressional district.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/106831?refcode=em20220514-23352&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=23352%2E1203867%2EsK_M8X ]Photo of Bernie and Summer embracing, smiling and laughing

Summer and I have a lot in common, from beginning our careers as activists
and organizers for working people, to getting involved at the local level
— I ran for Mayor of Burlington, Summer ran for State Legislature, and we
both did it to challenge a status quo that wasn’t delivering for working
families in our communities.

I spoke at a rally for Summer on Thursday in Pittsburgh because we are
both fighting to deliver for the working class of this country. We stand
together in the fight for justice.

We are working towards a shared vision of Medicare for All, a Green New
Deal, unions, good wages and safe conditions for every worker, to deliver
real progress towards racial, economic, and environmental justice, and to
do it all while refusing to accept corporate PAC money.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/106831?refcode=em20220514-23352&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=23352%2E1203867%2EsK_M8X ]Can you contribute $3 to Summer’s campaign today to
help send Summer to Congress to continue this fight for the families of
PA-12?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/106831?refcode=em20220514-23352&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=23352%2E1203867%2EsK_M8X ]Contribute $3

As an experienced community organizer, Summer Lee understands that working
people desperately need leaders in Congress who will stand up to big money
interests and fight for an agenda that puts poor and working people first.

From becoming the first Black woman ever to serve in the state legislature
from Western Pennsylvania, to defeating dangerous fracking proposals, to
passing urgently needed police accountability measures, to showing up on
picket lines across the Commonwealth — I know that Summer Lee is the
courageous movement-builder we need in Congress.

Progressive candidates, like Summer, recruited and endorsed by Justice
Democrats in 2022 are up against corporate-backed candidates with
unlimited sums of money. But we have something that they don't have, and
that is a powerful movement of people who are saying enough is enough. It
is time to elect candidates who will stand with working people, not the
corporate elite.

We are just 3 days away from Summer’s primary election and another
opportunity to elect a strong progressive to Congress. I've supported
Summer since her first run for the state legislature, so I hope you will
join me in supporting her now. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/106831?refcode=em20220514-23352&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=23352%2E1203867%2EsK_M8X ]I am asking — will you chip in what you
can to Summer's campaign to elect a true leader for working families to
Congress?

In solidarity,

Bernie Sanders

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1023&akid=23352%2E1203867%2EsK_M8X ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1024&akid=23352%2E1203867%2EsK_M8X ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220514-23352-footer&t=1025&refcode2=23352_1203867_sK_M8X&akid=23352%2E1203867%2EsK_M8X

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1026&akid=23352%2E1203867%2EsK_M8X

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226, Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: =?utf-8?q?Dave_Chase_=28Tim_Ryan=E2=80=99s_Campaign_Manager=29?=
subject: What's worse than this Saturday email?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=3716%2E3611125%2ELdpZ-h ][IMG]

Fundraising deadlines stink. We all know that. But you know what’s worse
than too many emails hitting your inbox?

JD Vance representing Ohio in the Senate for the next six years.

This race will decide Senate control and if JD pulls off a win, the next
six years will be a disaster for hardworking Ohioans. Raising the minimum
wage? Nope. Strengthening voting protections? HA. Protecting abortion
rights? Not a chance.

That’s why Tim needs your help to keep up with Vance’s dark-money-backed
campaign and hit his $200,000 goal before tomorrow’s Mid-Quarter deadline.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/12383?t=1014&amount=25&akid=3716%2E3611125%2ELdpZ-h ]So please, will you chip in any amount right away? Ohio—and the
country—is counting on us, and the stakes are simply too high to fall
short now.

name: =?utf-8?q?PA_GOV_ALERTS_=F0=9F=9A=A8?=
subject: Congressman Keith Rothfus endorses Barletta for Governor
body:
| | | |
---
---
**Congressman Keith Rothfus endorses Barletta for Governor**
---
Former mayor and congressman Lou Barletta, leading Republican candidate for governor of Pennsylvania, today announced the formal endorsement of former Congressman Keith Rothfus. Rothfus is the latest in a growing number of key endorsements coalescing behind Barletta's campaign over the last 72 hours including: Senate Pro Tempore and former gubernatorial candidate Jake Corman, former Congresswoman and gubernatorial candidate Melissa Hart, Congressman Fred Keller, former US Senator Rick Santorum, former governor Mark Schweiker, former Lt. Governor Jim Cawley, Senate Majority Whip John Gordner, Senator Tommy Tomlinson, Senator Bob Mensch, Senator John DiSanto, Representative Kurt Masser, Representative Doyle Heffley, and the Columbia County Republican Committee, amongst others.

"I encourage my fellow Republicans to vote for Lou Barletta for governor," said Congressman **Keith Rothfus**. "I saw first-hand Lou fight for our conservative principles in Congress. As Governor, Lou will continue the fight for a free and prosperous economy, PA energy, the right to life, and the 2nd Amendment. On election reform, Lou is the one to vote for. Lou did not vote for the mail-in voting law, which the PA Commonwealth Court recently found to be unconstitutional. Before you vote, check to see if your candidate voted for that unconstitutional law."
---

name: Team AOC
subject: We want to know more about you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
You’re on our email list and we want to know why.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20220514-3022-header&t=1&akid=3022%2E2526796%2EojcUSW)
As we strive to build and strengthen our movement, we want to know more about you. We spend a lot of time talking about what Alexandria is fighting for, but a movement’s not one-sided. We need to know more about you and why you’re here, so that we can better work together for a brighter future.
[We’d love to hear what made you interested in Alexandria. Can you please fill in this quick survey?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/may-22-supporter-survey/?source=em20220514-3022-P_ENG_SUR_GFM&t=2&akid=3022%2E2526796%2EojcUSW)
**[Start Your Supporter Survey](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/may-22-supporter-survey/?source=em20220514-3022-P_ENG_SUR_GFM&t=3&akid=3022%2E2526796%2EojcUSW)**
We are so grateful for how strong our movement has grown since Alexandria’s historic victory in 2018 — and it’s all been possible because of the grassroots support from people like you.
So, we want to hear from you. While other politicians pick up the phones for lobbyists, we don’t take a dime from special interests. So your opinion is the one that counts.
[We’ll use your responses to help inform our outreach as we strive to grow our movement of people who are ready to take action for a better future. ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/may-22-supporter-survey/?source=em20220514-3022-P_ENG_SUR_GFM&t=4&akid=3022%2E2526796%2EojcUSW)
Thank you for being in this fight,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ocasio-campaign?refcode=em20220514-3022-P_ENG_SUR_GFM&t=5&refcode2=3022_2526796_ojcUSW&akid=3022%2E2526796%2EojcUSW)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20220514-3022-P_ENG_SUR_GFM&t=6&akid=3022%2E2526796%2EojcUSW)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=7&akid=3022%2E2526796%2EojcUSW) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=8&akid=3022%2E2526796%2EojcUSW) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=9&akid=3022%2E2526796%2EojcUSW)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: been doing some thinking
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=254%2E5257348%2EkdkkQ2 ]Adam Schiff for Congress

Derek,

I’ve been thinking a lot lately about where we are in this historic
moment, and I wanted to share some thoughts with you.

I’ve thought about the fatigue that sets in during any long, protracted
campaign. Even one as consequential as the campaign we are waging for our
democracy.

And I wish I could tell you that defeating Donald Trump in 2020 would have
permanently shut him out of the political conversation about our nation’s
future.

After all that he put the nation through.

But that simply isn’t being realistic. And while wishful thinking can be a
temporary respite from the stress and the stakes of this present moment,
we must be clear-eyed about where we are today. And the stakes moving
forward.

After Trump’s election in 2016, we faced a massive challenge: Republican
majorities in the House and Senate, an open Supreme Court seat Mitch
McConnell had denied to Democrats, and the most corrupt presidency in
American history.

And for two years, we took it on the chin as Trump banned Muslims from
entering this country, banned transgender soldiers from serving in the
military, separated children from their parents, and sought to destroy the
institutions that have undergirded our democracy for centuries.

But we also fought back, and we won. It didn’t happen overnight — nothing
does in politics. But one victory at a time...

Defeating Trump’s effort to destroy the Affordable Care Act and saving
health care for millions.

The 2017 Alabama special election for U.S. Senate that Democrats won
against all odds.

The 2018 midterms that flipped the House.

The improbable victories in Georgia and Arizona that flipped four
Republican Senate seats in GOP strongholds, and delivered the White House
for President Biden.

These victories tell a story. A story of a people determined not to allow
Donald Trump and Republicans to run roughshod over our Constitution and
our country’s character.

So I want to tell you today that it’s alright if you’re feeling fatigued.
I get that. Completely. Because the beauty of being part of a grassroots
movement is that when we tire, others are there to pitch in until we have
caught our breath.

And when you’re ready, you can pick up again where you left off.

In 2018, millions of women led the way with marches that began during
Trump’s inauguration and carried the midterms to a historic victory. We
can do it again, and with the Supreme Court’s disastrous draft opinion
criminalizing health care — we must.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20220514_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&refcode2=254_5257348_kdkkQ2&akid=254%2E5257348%2EkdkkQ2 ]So no matter where you are today, Derek, I’m humbly asking if
you will make a contribution of any amount to our campaign — so that we
can continue our work together. Because staying together is the only way
forward.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20220514_AM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=10&t=1005&refcode2=254_5257348_kdkkQ2&akid=254%2E5257348%2EkdkkQ2 ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20220514_AM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=25&t=1006&refcode2=254_5257348_kdkkQ2&akid=254%2E5257348%2EkdkkQ2 ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20220514_AM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=50&t=1007&refcode2=254_5257348_kdkkQ2&akid=254%2E5257348%2EkdkkQ2 ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20220514_AM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=100&t=1008&refcode2=254_5257348_kdkkQ2&akid=254%2E5257348%2EkdkkQ2 ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20220514_AM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=250&t=1009&refcode2=254_5257348_kdkkQ2&akid=254%2E5257348%2EkdkkQ2 ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20220514_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&refcode2=254_5257348_kdkkQ2&akid=254%2E5257348%2EkdkkQ2 ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

We’ve made a lot of important progress in the last few years. We closed
the chapter on the Trump presidency, but the rest of the story has yet to
be written.

I hope you’ll remain by my side as we write it together.

Thanks,

— Adam

150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=1002&akid=254%2E5257348%2EkdkkQ2 ]www.adamschiff.com | [ mailto:contact@adamschiff.com ]contact@adamschiff.com | [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=1003&akid=254%2E5257348%2EkdkkQ2 ]Privacy Policy

PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.adamschiff.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=254%2E5257348%2EkdkkQ2

name: Chuck Schumer
subject: What $5 can accomplish:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | [ ](https://go.dscc.org/go/7555?t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&code=DPE-FD-20220514-Schumer-Schumer3-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220514-Schumer-Schumer3-Pros-sl1&akid=4253%2E9716520%2EIc4EOa)
---
If you knew that $5 could change the course of political history for a generation, would you make that contribution?

If you knew $5 could guarantee we **hold our Senate majority so we can pass President Biden’s bold agenda, prevent Mitch McConnell from blocking our progress, and keep America on the right track forward** , would you take that leap?

[**Now’s your chance: we’re running behind tomorrow’s $125,000 mid-month fundraising goal, and we need support from folks like you. Will you donate $5 now to help make up the difference and defend Democrats’ Senate majority?**](https://go.dscc.org/go/7555?t=5&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&code=DPE-FD-20220514-Schumer-Schumer3-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220514-Schumer-Schumer3-Pros-sl1&akid=4253%2E9716520%2EIc4EOa)

Here’s what I mean when I talk about $5, friend: President Biden's critical agenda _hinges_ on our Democratic Senate, and Mitch McConnell only needs ONE seat to regain power. **That’s a single seat preventing McConnell from completely blocking President Biden’s transformative agenda -- and a single seat could be decided by a single vote.**

Democratic champions like Mark Kelly, Maggie Hassan, Raphael Warnock, and Catherine Cortez Masto are all up for re-election this year -- and we’re looking at four _extremely close_ races. _One loss_ could be _devastating._

**I’m not exaggerating when I tell you that $5 from supporters like you could decide our political future.** But right now, we’re still waiting on a contribution from you today, and I know you wouldn’t miss out on a chance like this to be a real difference-maker.

**[If everyone reading this message contributed right now, we’d hit tomorrow’s mid-month goal in no time. But as it stands right now, Republicans are threatening to out-raise us AGAIN. We can’t let that happen -- and it all starts with $5. Please, contribute now:](https://go.dscc.org/go/7555?t=6&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&code=DPE-FD-20220514-Schumer-Schumer3-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220514-Schumer-Schumer3-Pros-sl1&akid=4253%2E9716520%2EIc4EOa)**

We need your help to defend our Senate majority. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.
| | [Donate $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/7555?t=7&amount=5&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&code=DPE-FD-20220514-Schumer-Schumer3-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220514-Schumer-Schumer3-Pros-sl1&akid=4253%2E9716520%2EIc4EOa)
---
| [Donate $10](https://go.dscc.org/go/7555?t=8&amount=10&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&code=DPE-FD-20220514-Schumer-Schumer3-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220514-Schumer-Schumer3-Pros-sl1&akid=4253%2E9716520%2EIc4EOa)
---
| [Donate $25](https://go.dscc.org/go/7555?t=9&amount=25&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&code=DPE-FD-20220514-Schumer-Schumer3-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220514-Schumer-Schumer3-Pros-sl1&akid=4253%2E9716520%2EIc4EOa)
---
| [Other Amount](https://go.dscc.org/go/7555?t=10&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&code=DPE-FD-20220514-Schumer-Schumer3-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220514-Schumer-Schumer3-Pros-sl1&akid=4253%2E9716520%2EIc4EOa)
---

Republicans _will_ outraise us again if we don’t rise up and challenge them. And they could take back the Senate -- maybe by a margin so thin that meeting tomorrow’s $125,000 goal would be enough to stop them.

But we’ll never know unless folks across the country band together and pitch in $5 to protect our Senate majority.

I know that $5 doesn’t sound like a lot in the face of the GOP megadonor machine, but think of it this way: **we have strength in numbers, and if we learned anything in 2020, it’s that our numbers are greater -- as long as everyone steps up to do their part.**

[**Friend, control of the Senate is in our hands, and I’m counting on YOU to keep it there. $5 just might make the difference -- so please chip in now.**](https://go.dscc.org/go/7555?t=11&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&code=DPE-FD-20220514-Schumer-Schumer3-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220514-Schumer-Schumer3-Pros-sl1&akid=4253%2E9716520%2EIc4EOa)

I'm so grateful to have you on our team,

Chuck

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/7555?t=12&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&code=DPE-FD-20220514-Schumer-Schumer3-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220514-Schumer-Schumer3-Pros-sl1&akid=4253%2E9716520%2EIc4EOa)
| |
* * *
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please **[click here](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-senate-democrats-2022-q2?refcode=DPE-footer&t=1&refcode2=4253_9716520_Ic4EOa&akid=4253%2E9716520%2EIc4EOa)**.

**[Click here](https://go.dscc.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=4253%2E9716520%2EIc4EOa)** to receive fewer emails. **[Click here](https://go.dscc.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=4253%2E9716520%2EIc4EOa)** to unsubscribe.
