name: Alvin Williams, President
subject: Democrats are desperate to SHUT him up!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Black America's PAC Action Fund
body:
-
I’m putting this at the TOP of your inbox.
| |
---
| | [](https://www.bampac.org/johnjamesbaf?info=2022%3Finfo%3D2022ER0502&recruiter_id=62451&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022er0502&n=1)
---
| Peter, There's nothing Democrats fear more than outspoken Black conservatives exposing their Liberal LIES about "racist" conservatives to Black voters... ...but a popular Black, Christian conservative, _Army combat veteran, and successful businessman_ like John James **running for Congress** is the **Democrats' worst nightmare**. **[I'm hoping you'll endorse John James for the U.S. House of Representatives, but first let me explain why the Democrats are so terrified of him.](https://www.bampac.org/johnjamesbaf?info=2022%3Finfo%3D2022ER0502&recruiter_id=62451&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022er0502&n=2)** The Democrats are gearing up for war, and they fully expect to maintain control of the House this election. **But behind the scenes,_they're terrified_ that John James is about to thwart their entire takeover plot.** And they have good reason to be afraid. | [](https://www.bampac.org/johnjamesbaf?info=2022%3Finfo%3D2022ER0502&recruiter_id=62451&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022er0502&n=3)
---
##### Captain John James will be the next U.S. Congressman from Michigan, but only with your help.
After all, they saw first-hand in previous elections what John is capable of - _watching in horror as he soared from a 21-point deficit to just 7 points within a few short months._
Shocked that their supposedly _"unbeatable"_ Senator was on the verge of losing to a _"nobody"_ political outsider...
...the panicked Democrats were forced to dump **over $15 million** into slowing down John's relentless surge just enough for well-known, deep-pocketed, and entrenched Democrat Senator Debbie Stabenow to narrowly squeak past.
# John James won more votes (1.9 million) than ANY Republican in Michigan in over a decade.
The Democrats are terrified because they know that if John can nearly topple one of the most powerful Democrats in the U.S. Senate...
**...then they don't stand a chance against John James this election!**
John is a successful, articulate, and intelligent Black conservative whose impeccable character is impossible for liberals to deface with slander and lies.
He's a West Point graduate, Ranger-qualified aviation officer, and retired Army Captain who served with distinction while leading two Apache helicopter platoons in Iraq.
He's also a successful businessman, having quadrupled his company's revenue and added 100 new employees in his first 5 years as President.
And through each step of his journey, John has led with courage, conviction, and a servant-first mentality that comes from his Christian faith.
[](https://www.bampac.org/johnjamesbaf?info=2022%3Finfo%3D2022ER0502&recruiter_id=62451&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022er0502&n=4)
---
##### "I am a conservative who happens to be black. I'm in the Republican Party because the platform most aligns with my values. I am pro-life. I am pro-Second Amendment. I am pro-family. I am pro-business."
John calls himself an _"unapologetic Christian, pro-life, pro-business, pro-Second Amendment, conservative outsider"_ but Fox News and others are calling him _**"The future of the GOP."**_
**[And if this isn't enough to make you want to help send John James to the U.S. House of Representatives...](https://www.bampac.org/johnjamesbaf?info=2022%3Finfo%3D2022ER0502&recruiter_id=62451&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022er0502&n=5)**
**...let me tell you what scares the Democrats most about John James.**
**John is on a mission to reclaim Black voters by exposing the Liberal LIE that conservatives like you and me are racists.**
He's opening their eyes to the _"Democratic brand of dependency that's being peddled"_ by unmasking Democrats as opportunistic, self-serving politicians who prey on Blacks with lies, empty promises, and failed policies.
And John's damning critiques of the Democrat Party and honest outreach to the Black Community are reclaiming Black voters to the Republican Party.
**John James is a serious threat to the Democrat Party, and they know it!**
_"He's SPECTACULAR. Rarely have I seen a candidate with such great potential. West Point graduate, successful businessman, and an African American leader...**He will be a star.** "_
-President Donald Trump
---
**To say the Democrats are panicking would be an understatement.**
They know John can reclaim enough Black voters to convert Michigan from a long-standing Democrat stronghold into the newest "red state."
And they know that winning a U.S. Congressional race will catapult John to national stardom, guaranteeing that millions of Black voters across America will hear his powerful message and begin fleeing the Democrat Party.
Once elected, Congressman John James will work tirelessly to:
* **EXPOSE** the Liberal Lies to the entire nation
* **RECLAIM** Black voters to the Republican Party
* **END** the Democrats' death-grip on the Black Community

**And Democrats know that if they lose just 12% of the Black vote, it'll be impossible for them to ever win another election.**
# That's why Democrats are terrified of John James and WILL STOP AT NOTHING TO SHUT HIM UP
**[That’s why I pray you'll also make an urgent, recurring donation of $10, $20.22, $28, $40, $75 or more to help John FIGHT BACK against the Democrats' vicious attacks!](https://www.bampac.org/johnjamesbaf?info=2022%3Finfo%3D2022ER0502&recruiter_id=62451&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022er0502&n=6)**
BAMPAC Action Fund played an ACTIVE roll helping John James shrink the margin between him and his opponent in the previous election.
With your help, we were able to place billboards in key areas throughout Michigan, like the one you see here:
[](https://www.bampac.org/johnjamesbaf?info=2022%3Finfo%3D2022ER0502&recruiter_id=62451&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022er0502&n=7)
---
We also ran radio ads in 3 of the largest black communities in Michigan and reached voters through online video ads in 10 key Michigan counties.
These online video ads were targeted towards Black Americans who’d voted in 2 of the last 4 elections up to that point.
And with your help... _we’ll do it again!_
John James really is _**"the future Republicans have been waiting for,"**_ but that future may never arrive without your committed support.
The Democrats are desperate to STOP John from taking this critical Congressional seat and END his campaign to recruit Black voters to the Republican Party.
And make no mistake about it: the future of our shared conservative values depends on our ability to reclaim Black voters from the Democrats.
**[That’s why your _monthly_ gift of $10, $20.22, $28, $40, $75 or more is so critical now more than ever!](https://www.bampac.org/johnjamesbaf?info=2022%3Finfo%3D2022ER0502&recruiter_id=62451&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022er0502&n=8)**
Real change takes time and commitment, and I know that you’re in this fight for the long-haul.
I know you won’t allow our conservative values to fall to the wayside by failing to build a conservative future.
That’s why I’m counting on your help TODAY.
**[So please help defend John James from Democrat attacks and DESTROY the liberal lies with your _monthly_ gift of $10, $20.22, $28, $40, $75 or more TODAY!](https://www.bampac.org/johnjamesbaf?info=2022%3Finfo%3D2022ER0502&recruiter_id=62451&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022er0502&n=9)**
Thank you, and God Bless.
| [](https://www.bampac.org/johnjamesbaf?info=2022%3Finfo%3D2022ER0502&recruiter_id=62451&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022er0502&n=10)
---
_For America,_ |
---
**Alvin Williams**
President & CEO
BAMPAC, BAMPAC Action Fund
[DONATE](https://www.bampac.org/johnjamesbaf?info=2022%3Finfo%3D2022ER0502&recruiter_id=62451&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022er0502&n=11)
---
**P.S.** John James is the **Democrats' worst nightmare** because he's reclaiming Black voters to the Republican Party by exposing the Liberal LIES about "racist" conservatives that keep Blacks voting for Democrats... **...and he's the ONLY ONE who can win this crucial House race and thwart their plans to retake the U.S. House of Representatives this election.** **That's why they'll stop at nothing to SHUT HIM UP!** **[That’s why I pray you'll make an urgent, monthly contribution of $10, $20.22, $28, $40, $75 or more to support John James up through Election Day.](https://www.bampac.org/johnjamesbaf?info=2022%3Finfo%3D2022ER0502&recruiter_id=62451&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022er0502&n=12)** **As a conservative leader in your community, your support is critical to beat back the Democrats' vicious attacks and propel John James to victory.[So please give what you can today.](https://www.bampac.org/johnjamesbaf?info=2022%3Finfo%3D2022ER0502&recruiter_id=62451&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022er0502&n=13)**
---

If you're giving up on this critical fight, then please [click here](https://www.bampac.org/unsubscribe?e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022er0502&n=14) to stop receiving emails.

| | Peter, We can't afford 3 more years of Joe Biden.

Republicans MUST rally in the 2022 upcoming midterms to stop Biden and Pelosi.

In case you missed it, Biden is the racist who says "You ain't black" if you vote for a Republican.

You can watch my response to that here, or by following the image below.
[](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=06693fd9c0&e=af4b86f5c6)
**[It is CRITICAL that a Republican majority is gained in the U.S. House. Only five seats are needed to make this happen](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=ecd46766f3&e=af4b86f5c6). **

I am running to unseat a far-Left Democrat in Virginia. With your support, I can defeat Biden’s puppet, Rep. Elaine Luria.

A red majority is exactly what Americans need right now. With a Conservative majority, Republicans can:
* **FIX Biden’s soaring inflation**
* **Push back against Big Tech’s tyranny**
* **Secure our border security**
* **Pass legislation that will strengthen American energy**

[**Will you take action against the Democrat establishment by donating to my campaign today**](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=d5145a646f&e=af4b86f5c6)?

My next fundraising deadline is rapidly approaching and with your help, I can prove to the Democrats and fake news media that Americans have had enough of their agenda.

Without a Republican majority, there will be absolutely nothing stopping Biden and Pelosi from continuing to undermine the safety and security of American families!

[Rise up and ensure your voice is heard by chipping in as much as you can to my campaign fund](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=33f3de405b&e=af4b86f5c6).

**I will _never_ stop fighting for free speech, the Second Amendment, an end to unconstitutional mandates, increased border security, and the Christian Conservative agenda**.

Let’s work together to take [**BACK**](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=476e73603c&e=af4b86f5c6) America from the dirty hands of the Left!
**[$15 TO TAKE BACK AMERICA

$25 TO TAKE BACK AMERICA

$50 TO TAKE BACK AMERICA

$75 TO TAKE BACK AMERICA

$100 TO TAKE BACK AMERICA

DONATE ANYTHING TO TAKE BACK AMERICA](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=e83c26e923&e=af4b86f5c6)**
Thank you for your support!

Respectfully,

**
Jarome Bell
Chief Petty Officer, Ret'd.
Republican Candidate for Congress**

P.S.: With Biden having three years left in office, it is instrumental that Republicans rally together to restore a Republican majority in the House. **[Support me as I run to defeat the far-Left Elaine Luria. It is time to get this country back on track before it’s too late](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=7d9c6e4c5f&e=af4b86f5c6)**!

With a Conservative majority, Republicans can: FIX Biden’s soaring inflation Push back against Big Tech’s tyranny Secure our border security Pass legislation that will strengthen American energy ? My next fundraising deadline is rapidly approaching and with your help, I can prove to the Democrats and fake news media that Americans have had enough of their agenda. Without a Republican majority, there will be absolutely nothing stopping Biden and Pelosi from continuing to undermine the safety and security of American families! . I will never stop fighting for free speech, the Second Amendment, an end to unconstitutional mandates, increased border security, and the Christian Conservative agenda. Let’s work together to take America from the dirty hands of the Left! Thank you for your support! Respectfully, Jarome Bell Chief Petty Officer, Ret'd. Republican Candidate for Congress P.S.: With Biden having three years left in office, it is instrumental that Republicans rally together to restore a Republican majority in the House. ! | | | | PAID FOR BY JAROME BELL FOR CONGRESS | Copyright © 2022 Jarome Bell, All rights reserved.

| | **I keep re-reading the Supreme Court draft opinion overturning**** _Roe v. Wade... looking for a glimmer of hope...trying to read between the lines. But I'm coming up short. There's no sugar-coating this._** This decision would undo nearly 50 years of precedent for safe and legal abortions for Americans. Full stop! So where do we go next? We've got to get out the vote and elect more pro-choice fighters to Congress, so they can codify reproductive rights into law. **We have an opportunity to fight back right here in Oregon with the new Sixth Congressional District by supporting pro-choice leader Andrea Salinas.****[Will you chip in $6 to her campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45309041/345387863/-1371356772?refcode=2022-05-14-rosenblum&recurring=0&amount=6&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=a35ff136-9dd3-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzVmZjEzNi05ZGQzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iW78nPQV2NLnxdt9-zTV8jI-ZWG6tqKj_g-edkOSAtQ=)** **Thanks in large part to Andrea, Oregon has the most progressive reproductive rights legislation in the country.** And she's the only candidate in the race endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund. name: Pablo, Julie, me
subject: Fwd: I wanted to personally write you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Jacobs for Congress
body:
Making sure you saw this!| | |
---
Peter—I wanted to make sure you saw the note below from Julie, Matt’s wife. The June 7 Primary Election is fast approaching, and vote by mail ballots arrived last week. As voters make up their minds, will you help us spread Matt’s message one final time – and get us across the finish line?
---

name: Team Welch
subject: Prescription drugs
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
Breaking the iron grip Big Pharma has on drug prices is crucial for Vermonters.

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=394%2E61531%2EE_1ToI)
Health care is a human right. But Big Pharma is constantly raising prices at a pace patients can’t keep up with. That means many American adults who need medication don’t take it because it’s too expensive. No family should be forced to choose between their medicine and putting food on the table.
****[Please add your name to our petition telling Congress to finish the job and lower the cost of prescription drugs. Peter’s fighting back against Big Pharma, but he can’t do it alone.](https://act.welchforvermont.com/signup/em-lower-prescription-drugs?source=em_20220514_p_t_rxdrugs&t=4&akid=394%2E61531%2EE_1ToI)**
Peter has long led the fight to lower prescription drug costs, and he’s helped pass legislation in the House. But Big Pharma is doing everything it can to make sure it fails.
That hasn’t stopped Peter from fighting for common-sense solutions that would lower the prices of prescription drugs for hard working folks across the country. Some of those measures include capping the out-of-pocket cost of insulin at $35 a month, limiting Big Pharma from raising prices beyond the rate of inflation, and allowing the federal government to negotiate lower drug prices through Medicare, directly lowering out-of-pocket costs for seniors.
These plans will make a direct difference, but we need to keep fighting to get them done.
**[It’s long past time to deliver for seniors and families across the country. Add your name right away: Congress must lower prescription drug prices.](https://act.welchforvermont.com/signup/em-lower-prescription-drugs?source=em_20220514_p_t_rxdrugs&t=6&akid=394%2E61531%2EE_1ToI)**
There’s a lot of work to do, but together, we can get it done.
Thanks for being a part of the team,
Team Welch

clean_body: Breaking the iron grip Big Pharma has on drug prices is crucial for Vermonters. Health care is a human right. But Big Pharma is constantly raising prices at a pace patients can’t keep up with. That means many American adults who need medication don’t take it because it’s too expensive. No family should be forced to choose between their medicine and putting food on the table. ** Peter has long led the fight to lower prescription drug costs, and he’s helped pass legislation in the House. But Big Pharma is doing everything it can to make sure it fails. That hasn’t stopped Peter from fighting for common-sense solutions that would lower the prices of prescription drugs for hard working folks across the country. Some of those measures include capping the out-of-pocket cost of insulin at $35 a month, limiting Big Pharma from raising prices beyond the rate of inflation, and allowing the federal government to negotiate lower drug prices through Medicare, directly lowering out-of-pocket costs for seniors. These plans will make a direct difference, but we need to keep fighting to get them done. There’s a lot of work to do, but together, we can get it done. Hello,
When I retired from the U.S. Navy after nearly 4 decades of military service, I felt called to continue to serve my country in a meaningful way. **But never did I expect running for the U.S. Senate that a Super PAC would run $1 million in TV ads attacking me for serving in the United States military.**
They ran ads saying that because my service moved my family and I all over the country, that we weren’t Iowans anymore. They said because I was called upon to work for President Barack Obama that I somehow lost the ability to represent Iowa. _Really?_
It was offensive to everyone who signs up to serve our nation – an overseas teacher, a diplomat, a Peace Corps volunteer, or a military member. I was particularly appalled at what Gold Star families who gave the ultimate sacrifice must have thought.
Now I’m taking on Republican Senator Chuck Grassley, and Mitch McConnell’s Super PACs are already readying millions to run even more ridiculous ads against me. I’m a hard target for a GOP hit job, but I’m sure it is coming. We can and must keep the Senate blue and win this seat in Iowa.
We're facing a federally-manded FEC fundraising deadline at midnight on Wednesdaay, and if the Super PACs see even one shred of weakness in our fundraising report, they’ll pounce with attacks to try to bury us.
**We’re just $112,934 away from our $400,000 goal and what we need to defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue. But I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give now if I’m going to hit this goal and have the resources I need to fight back against the incoming attacks:**
[**Please, will you chip in $5 or more right now – every dollar you can afford before our federally-mandated FEC fundraising deadline – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic Senate majority? Democrats have been actually getting things done.

| [](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/EqrVC4X38ZsR/Q1ptbVQ4bDVoMkJuT2VLOXpJODUxZ1RTTkNGUnBQMktOQXJtSnhvQ2tFeWhPNVlMK1NIR0prMzJvVm1uSFp3QTd6SzVvcWVBREZHNkVSOUNRdmFKdXc4Y1FLUDVtNHpaNW5UWC9aS0hCSXc9S0/bEdtL3ZCTmJPQ0ZoMzA4VEdwWG9TYlNqdzFhbGJEdXVMc3pTR3RSY2hNOD0S1) Friend -- While Washington Republicans have been focusing on attacking our teachers and our scientists, Democrats have been actually _getting things done_ to build safer communities for us all. That's right. We just passed a historic $300 million investment to reduce homelessness and paired it with funding for community policing reform AND behavioral health. Just some of these big-ticket investments include building new housing, rental and utility assistance, and raising wages for homeless service workers. subject: Financial Deadline Tomorrow!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Baugh for Congress
body:
|
---
| | [ ](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=415d2c18d3&e=8a657725d1)
---
| | Peter,
Orange County has frequently been a Republican stronghold in an otherwise liberal state, but with radicals like Katie Porter representing Orange County in Congress now, that reputation is at risk.

It’s not just about optics, though. By allowing pro-socialism radicals like Katie Porter to represent us in Congress, we are putting control of the entire House of Representatives at risk. Flipping just a few seats from blue to red will put Republicans in control and fire Nancy Pelosi. If we fail, Republicans nationwide fail.

The stakes simply couldn’t be higher. It all comes down to Orange County.

That’s why it’s absolutely critical that we make up the current budget deficit we are facing before our financial deadline tomorrow. clean_body: Here’s what we need to win. | Peter, My election in 2020 cost over $3 million. Now, as one of Pelosi’s top targets, my campaign team has estimated we’ll need to spend at least $5 million this cycle if we want to hold this all-important seat. That’s why we set carefully planned fundraising goals twice a month to ensure we stay on track to hit our $5 million budget by Election Day. Our next deadline is Monday at 11:59 P.M., and we still must raise another $8,230 to hit our goal. After all the work we’ve put in, I’d hate for us to fall behind now. My team and I have a lot of work to do between now and Election Day. We need to identify and train grassroots volunteers, design mailers and campaign literature, create hard-hitting TV and digital ads, engage with likely conservative voters to shore up our base, and more. All of these elements are key to any successful campaign. We’ve got to persuade, mobilize, and turn out thousands of voters. That’s not an easy task, and it isn’t cheap. If we can’t raise the funds we need, we’ll have to cut back somewhere – and in a close election, that could prove to be the difference between victory and defeat. Will you step up and ensure our campaign has the necessary resources to defeat Nancy Pelosi and her liberal special interest groups? I promise you, Peter, that your contribution will be put to good use, and by supporting me, you'll play a critical role in the battle to retake the House majority. name: =?utf-8?q?PA_GOV_ALERTS_=F0=9F=9A=A8?=
subject: Representative Dawn Keefer endorses Barletta for Governor
body:
| | | |
---
---
**Representative Dawn Keefer endorses Barletta for Governor**
---
Former mayor and congressman Lou Barletta, leading Republican candidate for governor of Pennsylvania, today announced the formal endorsement of State Representative Dawn Keefer (R-York). Keefer's endorsement is the latest in a growing number of key endorsements coalescing behind Barletta's campaign over the last 72 hours including: Senate Pro Tempore and former gubernatorial candidate Jake Corman, former Congresswoman and gubernatorial candidate Melissa Hart, Congressman Fred Keller, former US Senator Rick Santorum, former governor Mark Schweiker, former Lt. Governor Jim Cawley, former Congressman Keith Rothfus, Senate Majority Whip John Gordner, Senator Tommy Tomlinson, Senator Bob Mensch, Senator John DiSanto, Representative Kurt Masser, Representative Doyle Heffley, and the Columbia County Republican Committee, amongst others.

"The Pennsylvania governor’s race is getting national attention because it’s a key opportunity to reject the failed liberal policies of Gov. Wolf and President Biden,” said **State Rep. Dawn Keefer.** “We have a chance to accomplish great things, but as Republicans we must nominate a candidate who can bring us all together and lead us to victory in November. Lou Barletta is the best candidate to do that, and I endorse him. I encourage all Republicans to support Lou Barletta on Tuesday."

clean_body: | | | | Representative Dawn Keefer endorses Barletta for Governor Former mayor and congressman Lou Barletta, leading Republican candidate for governor of Pennsylvania, today announced the formal endorsement of State Representative Dawn Keefer (R-York). Keefer's endorsement is the latest in a growing number of key endorsements coalescing behind Barletta's campaign over the last 72 hours including: Senate Pro Tempore and former gubernatorial candidate Jake Corman, former Congresswoman and gubernatorial candidate Melissa Hart, Congressman Fred Keller, former US Senator Rick Santorum, former governor Mark Schweiker, former Lt. Governor Jim Cawley, former Congressman Keith Rothfus, Senate Majority Whip John Gordner, Senator Tommy Tomlinson, Senator Bob Mensch, Senator John DiSanto, Representative Kurt Masser, Representative Doyle Heffley, and the Columbia County Republican Committee, amongst others. "The Pennsylvania governor’s race is getting national attention because it’s a key opportunity to reject the failed liberal policies of Gov. Wolf and President Biden,” said State Rep. Dawn Keefer. “We have a chance to accomplish great things, but as Republicans we must nominate a candidate who can bring us all together and lead us to victory in November. Lou Barletta is the best candidate to do that, and I endorse him. I encourage all Republicans to support Lou Barletta on Tuesday." | | | | ==

Chuck Schumer and his radical allies want to go against the reported ruling of the highest court in the land and codify abortion rights into federal law _FOR GOOD._

There are even threats from some Democrats to __scrap the filibuster__ in order to see this through. They don’t care about playing by the rules - only that their radical, late-term abortion agenda NEVER gets impeded.

body:
Don’t forget to vote in the North Carolina Primary. Read more >>>
| | | Peter, The North Carolina Primary Election is just three days away, and I need your help to WIN! The future of our great state is in your hands, so if you want a conservative senator with a backbone and a proven record of standing up for North Carolina values, I need you to get out and vote. [**72 HOURS TO GO! FIND YOUR POLLING PLACE >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/c2a3e6d0fd08b55f/a08703ee52ac503bc3d6b838967d376c/35903) The decisions we make this Tuesday will determine how we protect what we love about our great state. Don’t forget to remind your friends, family, neighbors, and co-workers that the Primary is THIS TUESDAY, and that their voice matters. [**CAN YOU PITCH IN $10 OR $20 TO HELP US WITH THE FINAL PUSH?**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/c2a3e6d0fd08b55f/9b299749ac8b1472c3d6b838967d376c/35903) We need every single supporter to get to the polls before they close on Tuesday at 7:30PM, so that we can win big and start focusing on defeating the Democrats this November. Mark Walker

clean_body: Don’t forget to vote in the North Carolina Primary. Read more >>> | | | Peter, The North Carolina Primary Election is just three days away, and I need your help to WIN! The future of our great state is in your hands, so if you want a conservative senator with a backbone and a proven record of standing up for North Carolina values, I need you to get out and vote. The decisions we make this Tuesday will determine how we protect what we love about our great state. Don’t forget to remind your friends, family, neighbors, and co-workers that the Primary is THIS TUESDAY, and that their voice matters. We need every single supporter to get to the polls before they close on Tuesday at 7:30PM, so that we can win big and start focusing on defeating the Democrats this November. Thank you for your vote. name: 3X match
subject: Freedom to Choose
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Majority PAC, http://www
body:
|
---

| | [Rep. Jamie Raskin talked with Rachel Maddow about the draft Supreme Court opinion overturning Roe v. Wade, and he hit the nail right on the head.

During the interview, Rep. Raskin, who is a constitutional lawyer, called the draft “astonishing and appalling”, and went further to say “It situates the trajectory of the American right where Fox News and Tucker Carlson want to go, which is to make us in the image of Hungarian ‘illiberal’ democracy now.”

name: Sarah Palin
subject: Why I'm running for Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand for America PAC
body:
| | | Peter,

I am running for Congress because I am sick and tired of what's happening in D.C. My special election is in less than 1 month, and I'm facing 47 other candidates!

Yes, you read that right...47 other candidates!

That's why I'm reaching out to you right now. I need your help; I need your family's help; I need your neighbor's help. I've seen firsthand the power of grassroots support, and that's why I'm reaching out to you today. _**[I'm not afraid to put up a fight. Wade is the most significant and glorious news of our lifetime.”** President Biden just called on Congress to codify reproductive rights. At a time when those rights are under unprecedented attack, we can’t afford to have people like Marjorie Taylor Greene in Congress getting in the way. **Luckily, Marcus Flowers, a Democrat and Army Veteran, is running against her. With so much on the line, our country needs you to step up. Marjorie Taylor Greene is a danger to our democracy, our rights, and our future. It’s up to us to stop her at the ballot box. [**Click here to split a donation now and defeat her once and for all.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45322137/345428742/2005998736?refcode=20220513_MF_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Nzk1MWYxNS1jNWQzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sVdR1kDbh9Axy7onFbiAkY49TRBYxUL2BnvDlfJlyM0=) Thank you, Marcus Flowers for Congress [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45322138/345428743/-238118833?refcode=20220513_MF_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Nzk1MWYxNS1jNWQzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sVdR1kDbh9Axy7onFbiAkY49TRBYxUL2BnvDlfJlyM0=)

name: Nicole Lopez
subject: Knock, Knock
body:
We are 24 days out from the election, and we need your help to knock on as many doors as possible before then. This weekend we are speaking
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/fbO30T_K-/c?w=KKC-ga8jPxvRkzbLLZjTL46UfOaLo5uEhpZ540W8Vss.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zaG91dG91dC53aXguY29tL3NvL2ZiTzMwVF9LLT9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjRhZWQ3NDRlLWRjM2EtNGUwYi1hYWY1LTZhZmMxNzc0ZGZlMyJ9)_**
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | ¡OPEN THE DOOR TO PROGRESS!
---
| |
---
| | We are 24 days out from the election, and we need your help to knock on as many doors as possible before then. This weekend we are speaking with voters across South LA to let them know about our campaign and ask them to vote for true representation by mailing in their ballots ahead of election day or by heading to the polls on June 7th to cast their vote in person. Want to join us? Hit that button below and sign up!
---
| | | [**JOIN**](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/fbO30T_K-/c?w=J-_jkZBVMkh_uBKnsKexA3sSLSFHkcYiwN2FvGOhM6Q.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9mb3Jtcy53aXguY29tLzYyZmFiYTg4LTBhODEtNDAxYS1iOGM5LTFmNjE0NGE1NGIxZjo0YzY3MzNjOS0wZWU0LTRmZWYtODY4OC0yMWY3MWJmNmJmNGMiLCJyIjoiMTkyMTE4ZDYtM2JjNy00ODg5LTE1YzctYjlhMDIxMjNlNzRiIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiNGFlZDc0NGUtZGMzYS00ZTBiLWFhZjUtNmFmYzE3NzRkZmUzIn0)
---
| | |
---
| | Look, I'll be honest. Winning the primary isn't going to be easy, but it is not impossible. Establishment, 'machine' Democrats may have the money, but I have you, mi gente. If there's one thing I know, it's that when our back is up against the wall, we make do with what we have. And the more folks we have out on the streets talking to voters, the better chance we will have of winning real change for our families, neighbors, and communities. So join us Sunday morning as we canvass the cities of Bell, Bell Gardens, and Huntington Park. Then join us again in the afternoon as we talk to voters in Long Beach. Confirm your participation by clicking on the button below and we will send you additional information about where we will meet this weekend to get out the vote! See you there!, Nicole P.S. Know someone who would love to join us this weekend? Forward this email to them and let them know we would love to have them on board!
---

We are working tirelessly on the campaign trail, traveling to every corner of our state to visit with hardworking Alabamians, answer questions, and share our conservative message. It is clear that Alabamians want fresh blood to defend our Christian conservative values, fight for the America First agenda, and preserve the country that we know and love for our children and our children’s children. We will continue to work nonstop through the May 24 primary to earn the vote of people across Alabama!

| | | Peter,
The time is right for Republicans to **RESCUE AMERICA**.

_We have the American people behind us, and we have the momentum to take back control of our great country from the radical Left._

**My 11-Point Plan to RESCUE AMERICA is a road map to taking back our great country, and I need every single patriot to read it if we’re going to defeat the radical Left’s infiltration of our institutions once and for all.**

This plan isn’t for the faint of heart - but it is **our best chance to take back America before it’s too late.**

name: Tammy Duckworth
subject: The Senate needs more trailblazing moms
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
#

I’m reaching out to ask you to support Cheri Beasley’s campaign to flip North Carolina’s open Senate seat and my reelection this November.
You know as well as I do that it’s so important that we protect and expand Democrats’ majority, and North Carolina is one of our best opportunities to do that. But the truth is that who we elect also matters, and I firmly believe we need more moms like Cheri and me in the Senate.
If we’re going to continue making real progress for our military and working families, then I need Cheri Beasley working alongside me in the Senate. So I am asking:
[**Can you split a donation between Cheri’s campaign in North Carolina and my re-election today? These are must-win races for Democrats if we’re going to stop Mitch McConnell and his cronies from retaking the Senate.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-duckworth-split?refcode=em220514-2-subs&refcode2=870.357359.FA8EMk&t=1&akid=870%2E357359%2EFA8EMk)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your split contribution between Tammy Duckworth and Cheri Beasley instantly:_

****
| | **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-duckworth-split?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em220514-2-subs&refcode2=870.357359.FA8EMk&t=24&akid=870%2E357359%2EFA8EMk)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-duckworth-split?express_lane=true&refcode=em220514-2-subs&refcode2=870.357359.FA8EMk&t=25&akid=870%2E357359%2EFA8EMk)**
---
****
Members of my family have served this nation in uniform during every period of conflict since the Revolution. I followed in their footsteps to become one of the first handful of women to serve as a helicopter pilot in Iraq.
But 18 years ago, an RPG explosion took down my Black Hawk over Iraq, costing me both of my legs. But even as I was drifting in and out of consciousness, my buddies were doing all they could to bring me to safety. I would not be in the U.S. Senate today without their heroism.
What I’ve learned serving this nation — on the battlefield and in the Senate — is that no individual person can overcome every obstacle alone. To take on tough challenges, it takes a team of people working together. That’s why Cheri and I are both counting on folks like you to help us win our races.
It would mean a lot to me, on a personal level, to know you have my and Cheri’s backs during what is sure to be a difficult campaign.
[**If you can, please split a contribution between Cheri Beasley’s campaign and my re-election today to help us protect and expand the Senate majority. There’s too much on the line this year to take anything for granted.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-duckworth-split?refcode=em220514-2-subs&refcode2=870.357359.FA8EMk&t=26&akid=870%2E357359%2EFA8EMk)**

I’ve gotten to know Cheri personally, and I know she will be a fierce advocate for you and your families. She’s dedicated her life to serving others and we’d be lucky to have such an incredible champion for our military and working families in the U.S. Senate.
All my best,
Tammy Duckworth
U.S. Senator, Illinois

name: VPP POLLING TEAM
subject: do you approve of Susan Collins?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
your response due at midnight >>
| _To make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8073?t=1&akid=2438%2E878179%2EHMFrwZ)._
---
**FIRST:** Senator Susan Collins promised to protect abortion rights.

**THEN:** She voted to confirm THREE Trump-picked MAGA Justices who are hell-bent on destroying the right to choose.

We won’t let that happen! = | | | = | | = = While House leadership continues to campaign for anti-choice “Democrats” like Henry Cuellar and Kurt Schrader, our coalition is campaigning for bold change and working hard to elect Doyle Canning to lead our fight in Congress to codify Roe , Repeal the Hyde Amendment , and ensure every person has unfettered access to reproductive healthcare and our rights to privacy protected by law! Doyle is running to be the first woman ever to represent OR-04. We need her progressive leadership on Capitol Hill now more than ever. = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for helping to send a strong progressive woman to Congress! Canning HQ | | = | | We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: Voting Rights Action via DASS
subject: D.C. statehood all comes down to this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25]
Team, did you see this Washington Post opinion piece? it makes a crucial argument: that D.C. Statehood isn’t just a D.C. issue. It’s a voting rights issue.
https://action.demsofstate.org/a/dc-statehood [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/dc-statehood]
The nation’s 51st state would come with two new Senators, who could turn the tide of vital legislation in Congress and help us end the filibuster.
Right now, close to 700,000 tax-paying residents are being denied full representation, just so Republicans can maintain power.
We need to keep the pressure on, team!
If you think Congress should finally make Washington, D.C. a state take action TODAY and sign our petition immediately! >>> [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/dc-statehood]
ADD MY NAME >>> [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/dc-statehood]
Responses required by 12:00:00am
DASS is a national organization supporting the election of Democratic Secretaries of State who are committed to protecting and preserving voting rights and ballot access for all Americans through fair, honest, open, and accurate elections.
Help us fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda by pitching in today!
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=footer-button&amount=25]

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jeanine=20Lawson?=
subject: Only one week to go
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Lawson for Congress]( "Paid for and authorized by Lawson for Congress")
body:
I need your help in this final push to secure the nomination - we're poised to defeat Jennifer Wexton this November, but I can't do it without you ... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/11b4e6fc45a4/only-one-week-to-go?e=fc83fb200d)
---
| |
---
|
---
| [Donate](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=f58ebca564&e=fc83fb200d "Donate")
---
|
,

With just one week left until our May 21st primary, I'm reaching out to ask for your help in the final stages of this nomination contest.

Having served on the Board of Supervisors in Prince William County for nearly eight years, I've demonstrated my commitment to our conservative values.

I've opposed countless Democrat tax increases on hard-working families in my district. I've fought for the Second Amendment and opposed Governor Northam's unconstitutional gun control laws. I've backed our law enforcement by providing funding for more law enforcement officers, pay increases, and supporting Prince William's program to work with ICE to deport illegal immigrants convicted of violent crimes. I've taken a stand to protect unborn babies my entire life, including as a founding board member for a crisis pregnancy center.

The radical left has come after me for it, but I've won re-election twice in my Northern Virginia district.

Now I'm running for Congress because Virginia's 10th district deserves a representative who stands up for our values. Not a representative like Jennifer Wexton who votes for Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi's progressive agenda every single time.

In just one week, voters will select their Republican nominee. While any candidate in this race would be better than Jennifer Wexton, I believe that I am the only candidate who can beat her this November. I've beat the Democrats before here in Northern Virginia, and I'll do it again this year.

[With just one week to go, please consider making](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=d8204a18a1&e=fc83fb200d)[ a contribution of $100, $50, $25, or even just $10 ](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=b15e6fda3d&e=fc83fb200d)[to help us secure the nomination and turn our attention to defeating Jennifer Wexton.](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=62535c9166&e=fc83fb200d)

---
| [Contribute $10](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=3356baecb1&e=fc83fb200d "Contribute $10")
---
| [Contribute $25](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=82b9a7c897&e=fc83fb200d "Contribute $25")
---
| [Contribute $50](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=e77bf09cb8&e=fc83fb200d "Contribute $50")
---
| [Contribute $100](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=7bf04a53c7&e=fc83fb200d "Contribute $100")
---
| [Contribute any amount](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=914b015247&e=fc83fb200d "Contribute any amount")
---
|
Please make a contribution today to help us get across the finish line and turn our attention to defeating Jennifer Wexton and taking back Virginia's 10th district..

Thank you for your support. I'm looking forward to working side-by-side to take back our district this November!

For love of country,

Jeanine Lawson
Candidate for Virginia's 10th Congressional District
---
|
---
|
---
| [JeanineLawson.com](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=981b242731&e=fc83fb200d "JeanineLawson.com")
---
| | **_FIND YOUR MAY 21ST VOTING LOCATION_**
On May 21st, voting will be open from 9am-4pm. Your voting location is determined by where you live, and you will not be allowed to vote anywhere other than your designated voting location. You can find a full list of voting locations at [www.JeanineLawson.com/Voting](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=60250df7d5&e=fc83fb200d)

For additional help determining your voting location, please call 571-484-4425 or email [info@jeaninelawson.com](mailto:info@jeaninelawson.com) and we can help you determine where to vote.

**Prince William County: **your voting location will be determined by your magisterial district.

If you live in **Brentsville District represented by Supervisor Jeanine Lawson** , your voting location will be Gainesville Middle School located at 8001 Limestone Drive, Gainesville.

If you live in **Gainesville District represented by Supervisor Pete Candland**, your voting location will be Bull Run Middle School located at 6308 Catharpin Road, Gainesville.

If you live in **Coles District represented by Supervisor Yesli Vega or in Occoquan District**, your voting location will be Lake Jackson Fire Station located at 11310 Coles Drive, Manassas.

**Loudoun County: **Your voting location will be determined by your magisterial district _unless you live in Blue Ridge District represented by Supervisor Tony Buffington._

If you live in **Blue Ridge district** , your district is split between two voting locations. Find your precinct by visiting the [State Board of Elections website](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=487072ea8d&e=fc83fb200d).
Blue Ridge precincts 301, 302, 303, 305, 308, 310, 311, and 315 vote at Loudoun Valley High School.
Blue Ridge precincts 307, 309, 312, 313, 314, 316, 318, 319, 320, 321, and 322 vote at Mercer Middle School.

If you live in **Catoctin, Leesburg, or portions of Blue Ridge** districts, your voting location will be Loudoun Valley High School located at 340 N. Maple Avenue, Purcellville.

If you live in **Algonkian, Ashburn, or Broad Run** districts, your voting location is Broad Run High School located at 21670 Ashburn Road, Ashburn.

If you live in **Sterling, Dulles, or portions of Blue Ridge **districts, your voting location is Mercer Middle School located at 42149 Greenstone Drive, Aldie.

**Fauquier County:** Your county-wide voting location will be Fauquier High School located at 705 Waterloo Road, Warrenton.

**Rappahannock County** : Your county-wide voting location will be Rappahannock County Elementary School located at 34 Schoolhouse Road, Washington.

**Fairfax County** : Your voting location for all voters in the 10th district will be the Clifton Town Hall located at 12641 Chapel Road, Clifton.

**Manassas City** : Your city-wide voting location will be Grace E. Metz Middle School located at 9950 Wellington Road, Manassas.

**Manassas Park City** : Your city-wide voting location will be the Manassas Park Community Center located at 99 Adams Street, Manassas Park.

If you have any questions, please call 571-484-4425 or email [info@jeaninelawson.com](mailto:info@jeaninelawson.com)and we can help you determine where to vote.

---

name: Jake Evans
subject: The DC Swamp
body:
The DC Swamp is doing everything they can to try to stop...
---
| | | | | |
---
| | Dear Friend,

The fake news media and lying politicians are targeting my campaign because they know I can’t be bought.When I get to the halls of Congress, I’ll fight for you just as hard as I did when I served as an Army Ranger. Please, Thank you, Jesse Jensen Jesse Jensen is an Army Ranger, small-businessman, father, and husband. In the Army, he led troops in combat and took out high-value targets. Now, he’s taking on the politicians in D.C. USE OF HIS MILITARY RANK, JOB, TITLES, AND PHOTOGRAPHS IN UNIFORM DOES NOT IMPLY ENDORSEMENT FROM THE DEPARTMENT OF DEFENSE OR THE DEPARTMENT OF THE ARMY. Paid for by Jesse Jensen for Congress | |

clean_body: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. | | | | | | | | We’re in a critical moment. SIX Republicans are targeting our Democrat Dr. Raul Ruiz’s House seat to flip our majority from BLUE to RED. And they’re spending hundreds of dollars to DEFEAT HIM. That’s why we’ve come up with an S-M-A-R-T plan to blanket Coachella Valley with YARD SIGNS on every corner to re-elect Dr. Ruiz and protect our Democratic majority! | | | | | | We won’t beat around the bush -- our Democratic Majority is fragile. Kevin McCarthy predicted Republicans could flip 60 seats this year... If they flip the House, it will RUIN any chance we have at protecting the voting rights, abortion rights, LGBTQ+ equality, and so much more. We can’t let Republicans take over our Valley. So we must do all we can to fund the resources we need to reach voters in our district. | | | | | | Thanks for your support, Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. name: Marcus Flowers
subject: My opponent Marjorie Taylor Greene calls joining the military is“throwing your life away”

body:
|

[](https://www.marcusforgeorgia.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzsn0D366fuE1hyM8nYo_dxU2Yk9K9ks3yyuP-rSmlG2kItkAqZZUitZQ2UcQ7WSGFs&e=3c0efca69a2e76c4868c82f23dff8b2a&utm_source=marcusflowers&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=220514_lifeaway&n=1)
_**Marjorie Taylor Greene Says Joining Military is 'Throwing Your Life Away'**_ Hi, it's Marcus Flowers, Democrat and Army Veteran running for Congress against Marjorie Taylor Greene. My opponent, Marjorie Taylor Greene, just said that joining the military is "throwing your life away." **Really? I proudly served this country overseas on multiple continents --****_protecting the democracy and freedoms that you and your radical-right cronies are trying to destroy from within!_** It’s mind-boggling that someone who calls herself a “patriot” can be so brazenly disrespectful to the over 600,000 veterans across Georgia (including me) who know what it means to put service above self. **You have my word: When I defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene and am elected to Congress I will ALWAYS have the backs of our brave men and women in uniform.** [**Will you support my campaign to replace Marjorie Taylor Greene with a Democratic veteran who will stand up for our democracy by DONATING today? Every little bit helps.**](https://www.marcusforgeorgia.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzsn0D366fuE1hyM8nYo_dxU2Yk9K9ks3yyuP-rSmlG2kItkAqZZUitZQ2UcQ7WSGFs&e=3c0efca69a2e76c4868c82f23dff8b2a&utm_source=marcusflowers&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=220514_lifeaway&n=2)[****](https://www.marcusforgeorgia.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzsn0D366fuE1hyM8nYo_dxURZihuI65DzQCtFxyiNxs_ZGpy4xBmiR7upFlBZUqCDA&e=3c0efca69a2e76c4868c82f23dff8b2a&utm_source=marcusflowers&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=220514_lifeaway&n=3)[****](https://www.marcusforgeorgia.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzsn0D366fuE1hyM8nYo_dxUpK502-UmyxkF5rgLI3JAnMhqd8Cgm2s3iwDLDPWKpwY&e=3c0efca69a2e76c4868c82f23dff8b2a&utm_source=marcusflowers&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=220514_lifeaway&n=4) | [](https://www.marcusforgeorgia.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzsn0D366fuE1hyM8nYo_dxU2Yk9K9ks3yyuP-rSmlG2kItkAqZZUitZQ2UcQ7WSGFs&e=3c0efca69a2e76c4868c82f23dff8b2a&utm_source=marcusflowers&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=220514_lifeaway&n=5 "CHIP IN >>") [CHIP IN >>](https://www.marcusforgeorgia.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzsn0D366fuE1hyM8nYo_dxU2Yk9K9ks3yyuP-rSmlG2kItkAqZZUitZQ2UcQ7WSGFs&e=3c0efca69a2e76c4868c82f23dff8b2a&utm_source=marcusflowers&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=220514_lifeaway&n=5)

subject: can you chip in $1?

name: Erica Smith
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ERICA FOR US
body:
#
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/55150?refcode=em20220514-1190&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=1190%2E3698%2EaLIvN8)
Hi, it's Erica Smith.
I’m a mom and a pro-choice Black pastor with a plan for a Rural New Deal to uplift family farmers, raise the minimum wage, unionize the South, and ensure healthcare and broadband for all. I’m running to represent NC’s 1st District in Congress — and I’m up against the most anti-choice elected Democrat in the state.
**Our primary election is in 3 days.** Our team is hard at work to get out the vote across all 19 counties in these final days, but we urgently need the financial support to take on the nearly **$2 million** my anti-choice opponent and his Republican-funded super PAC friends have spent against us.
[**Will you please add a donation of $5 from your city to our campaign? Election Day is just three days away, and a donation from you will help us double down on our efforts to win this primary.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/55150?refcode=em20220514-1190&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=1190%2E3698%2EaLIvN8)
**[Donate $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/55150?refcode=em20220514-1190&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=1190%2E3698%2EaLIvN8)**
We’ve come a long way since we launched this campaign for working people and small farmers — like my family — in NC’s 1st District and beyond.
Together, we’ve grown incredible support from neighbors and local elected officials to progressive powerhouse organizations and members of Congress, past and present.
But we can’t let off the gas now, and every donation matters. I refuse to accept corporate PAC contributions because we’re fighting for the people, NOT corporations.
Sadly, we’re up against a well-funded, corporate Democrat who voted with Republicans to restrict reproductive freedom and pass an unconstitutional anti-voting rights law that targeted Black voters. Now, he’s lining his pockets with donations from a right-wing PAC that’s supporting insurrectionist Republicans.
[**We’ve got just 3 days, and we need to give this everything we’ve got. Please make a donation of any amount to run more ads, knock on more doors, and talk to more voters.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/55150?refcode=em20220514-1190&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=1190%2E3698%2EaLIvN8)
Thank you from the bottom of my heart,
Erica Smith ❤️

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20220514-1190-footer&t=23&refcode2=1190_3698_aLIvN8&akid=1190%2E3698%2EaLIvN8)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=24&akid=1190%2E3698%2EaLIvN8)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=1190%2E3698%2EaLIvN8)

PAID FOR BY ERICA FOR US

body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter, we just got
a new shipment of Charles Booker for Senate yard signs in our office.
Check them out! ⬇️

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220514?refcode=em20220514-1917&amounts=16&t=1001&refcode2=1917_346206_aaocEs&akid=1917%2E346206%2EaaocEs ][IMG]

Peter, if we
want to make sure that every home in Kentucky has one of these signs, we
have to make it happen. We’re so excited to fill up ALL the yards,
gardens, fields, and windows in Kentucky with our sign, and remind people
that better leadership is possible in our Commonwealth — but we can’t do
it without your help.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220514?refcode=em20220514-1917&amounts=16&t=1002&refcode2=1917_346206_aaocEs&akid=1917%2E346206%2EaaocEs ]Please chip in $16 — the price of producing one yard sign — to our
campaign today and help us reach our goal of raising another $16,000
before our mid-month deadline on May 16th. Together, we can blanket
Kentucky with Charles Booker yard signs and show the strength of our
grassroots movement to replace Rand Paul.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220514?refcode=em20220514-1917&amounts=16&t=1003&refcode2=1917_346206_aaocEs&akid=1917%2E346206%2EaaocEs ]Contribute $16

Our movement is only possible with the help of every Kentuckian uniting
for a brighter future, from the hood to the holler.

We’re fighting to make sure every single voter in Kentucky knows that
Charles is the candidate that will transform Kentucky’s future. That means
doing outreach in all forms: online, offline, yard signs, and more.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220514?refcode=em20220514-1917&amounts=16&t=1004&refcode2=1917_346206_aaocEs&akid=1917%2E346206%2EaaocEs ]We have big plans for voter outreach this year — yard signs are one of
them — but we can’t execute on them without your help. Please chip in $16
or more and help us invest in our voter outreach efforts today.

Thank you,

Team Booker

name: Team MLG
subject: Bumping this update about abortion access
disclaimer_text: Paid for by New Mexicans for Michelle, John Wertheim, Treasurer
body:
Peter, did you see Gov. Lujan Grisham's message?
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45323417/345435341/-1540418300?refcode=jtk1255-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWRhMmRlZS1kMWQzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v3azt4s_Lg9o1lHflix3Yb01GrdSjJtTMw1Ljwm9gdk=)
---
Peter, did you see Gov. Lujan Grisham's message? When the Supreme Court overturns Roe v. Wade, **New Mexico will be one of the only pro-choice states in our region.**
Patients across the Southwest will depend on New Mexico to have access to safe, legal abortion. But if Gov. Lujan Grisham loses reelection this November, the GOP will try to ban it here, too.
That's why it's so important that grassroots supporters like you help Gov. subject: Snyder County Commissioner Joe Kantz endorses Barletta for Governor
body:
| | | |
---
---
**Snyder County Commissioner Joe Kantz endorses Barletta for Governor**
---
Former mayor and congressman Lou Barletta, leading Republican candidate for governor of Pennsylvania, today announced the formal endorsement of Snyder County Commissioner Joe Kantz. Kantz's endorsement comes as a headwind of conservative support is rallying behind Barletta's campaign over the last 72 hours as Pennsylvania conservatives from the local, state, and federal level have begun to coalesce behind Barletta as the best candidate to defeat Josh Shapiro in November.
“Lou Barletta got his start in public service by being a mayor, which means a lot to me," said **Snyder County Commissioner Joe Kantz**. "We need a governor who understands what our counties and towns go through, and one who will give us a seat at the table. We need a governor who will stop the economy-draining policies coming out of Harrisburg. And as Republicans, we also want a candidate who can win, and that’s Lou Barletta.”
###

clean_body: | | | | Snyder County Commissioner Joe Kantz endorses Barletta for Governor Former mayor and congressman Lou Barletta, leading Republican candidate for governor of Pennsylvania, today announced the formal endorsement of Snyder County Commissioner Joe Kantz. Kantz's endorsement comes as a headwind of conservative support is rallying behind Barletta's campaign over the last 72 hours as Pennsylvania conservatives from the local, state, and federal level have begun to coalesce behind Barletta as the best candidate to defeat Josh Shapiro in November. “Lou Barletta got his start in public service by being a mayor, which means a lot to me," said Snyder County Commissioner Joe Kantz. "We need a governor who understands what our counties and towns go through, and one who will give us a seat at the table. We need a governor who will stop the economy-draining policies coming out of Harrisburg. And as Republicans, we also want a candidate who can win, and that’s Lou Barletta.” | | | | =

Peter – thanks for not scrolling away. I know this isn't my first time in your inbox, but I wanted to make sure you understand exactly how important our campaign here in Iowa is.
**You see, Sen. Grassley has been my senator for my entire life. I've watched as, under his "leadership," families like mine were left behind and the good-paying jobs that were once in abundance trickled away.** That's what happens when the people in Washington don't fight for the people they were elected to serve. **[If you want the change you deserve, you can donate to our grassroots campaign before our most important FEC fundraising deadline so far.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45323436/345435418/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk990-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGRhMmRlZS1kMWQzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cTC8pPVv3luxVxXmgHkKG6s6UnwYU6rMtoRogltQHhE=)**
**Iowa needs to show Sen. Grassley the door, and Democrats need to expand our Senate majority if we want any chance of moving our country forward for working class families. **
Luckily, this election year, we have a real shot to do both. Right now, Sen. Grassley is showing weakness in his poll numbers, per a top Iowa pollster. He's facing record-low approval ratings, and only 27% of likely Iowa voters want to reelect him.
This is our chance to flip this seat blue and expand our Senate majority, but I can't defeat Sen. Grassley without you. The GOP is sitting on a war chest of more than $44 MILLION dedicated to defeating Democrats like me and taking back the Senate. It'll take massive grassroots resources to compete with their funds.
**[We still need to raise $51,542 to keep pace with our major fundraising goal before this public FEC deadline. So, Peter, that's why I have to ask you to make a donation of $5 to our must-win Senate race: Will you please donate right now to defeat Sen. clean_body: I wanted to make sure you understand ... | | | = Peter – thanks for not scrolling away. I know this isn't my first time in your inbox, but I wanted to make sure you understand exactly how important our campaign here in Iowa is. You see, Sen. Grassley has been my senator for my entire life. I've watched as, under his "leadership," families like mine were left behind and the good-paying jobs that were once in abundance trickled away. That's what happens when the people in Washington don't fight for the people they were elected to serve. = Iowa needs to show Sen. Grassley the door, and Democrats need to expand our Senate majority if we want any chance of moving our country forward for working class families. Luckily, this election year, we have a real shot to do both. Right now, Sen. Grassley is showing weakness in his poll numbers, per a top Iowa pollster. He's facing record-low approval ratings, and only 27% of likely Iowa voters want to reelect him. This is our chance to flip this seat blue and expand our Senate majority, but I can't defeat Sen. Grassley without you. The GOP is sitting on a war chest of more than $44 MILLION dedicated to defeating Democrats like me and taking back the Senate.
