name: Our Revolution
subject: REV REPORT: Major News on M4A & much more!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
| | Insider News from the Political Revolution!

* * *
**HEADLINES: Bernie’s Senate Fight for M4A | Rashida vs. Dark Money | Fort for Congress in GA | Reject the Recall in SF | Palmer for DC Council | Attica Scott Rally in KY | Election Day in NC | Pro-Choice Actions | Levin & House Labor | Ellison on Student Debt | & MORE!**

★ ★ ★

**WAGING THE FIGHT FOR MEDICARE FOR ALL IN THE SENATE AND BEYOND**

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5515?t=11&akid=2901%2E5885482%2EXU-qxU)

**Our Revolution** members rallied at the Capitol Thursday with Bernie, who as Budget Committee Chairman held the first-ever Senate hearing on **Medicare for All** and reintroduced the bill!

**This is how we wage the fight** , and our movement showed up to show our strength and make the demand — needed more than ever as 1 million Americans have died in the pandemic.

“This is an issue not just of healthcare but of what kind of nation _we are_ ,” Bernie said. “**Medicare for All will become the law of the land — if not now, in the future — because this is what the American people want**.”

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5515?t=12&akid=2901%2E5885482%2EXU-qxU)

Bernie welcomed doctors and nurses to testify before the committee and make the case for a Medicare for All single-payer system. He emphasized that it would **save $650B a year** over our current dysfunctional system.

“In our corrupt political system, the private healthcare sector has spent more than $10.6B on lobbying and $1.7B on campaign contributions to maintain the status quo,” Bernie wrote in an op-ed in [Fox](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5516?t=13&akid=2901%2E5885482%2EXU-qxU). “**They own many of the politicians in both the Democratic and Republican parties**.”

Later that same evening, he [rallied](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5517?t=14&akid=2901%2E5885482%2EXU-qxU) with Our Revolution-endorsed **Summer Lee** for her run for Congress in PA-12! “We need a strong progressive like Summer in Congress, we need to tell these billionaires we won’t allow them to buy our elections and control our democracy.”

★ ★ ★

[Become a RECURRING DONOR to Our Revolution right now to fund critical action campaigns to defend our rights and communities against the far right of both parties. Our movement must stand united in the fight for Medicare for All, climate action, reproductive freedom and so much more.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-newsletter-22&amount=10&refcode=OR_EM_NEWS_1MO_20220514_1_1&recurring=true?t=15&refcode2=2901_5885482_XU-qxU&akid=2901%2E5885482%2EXU-qxU)

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5515?t=16&akid=2901%2E5885482%2EXU-qxU)

Join us Monday, May 23rd, at **8:30p ET** /7:30 CT for our **National ‘Organize-to-Win’ Call** with Our Revolution Board Member and Minnesota Attorney General **Keith Ellison** on the state of the progressive fight in 2022!

These bi-weekly meetings are key to building our movement, so be sure to mark your calendar!

[RSVP HERE](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=17&akid=2901%2E5885482%2EXU-qxU)

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5515?t=18&akid=2901%2E5885482%2EXU-qxU)

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5515?t=19&akid=2901%2E5885482%2EXU-qxU)

**Our Revolution** is committed to re-electing US Rep. **Rashida Tlaib** to her third term representing Michigan’s 13th District in Congress!

AIPAC and right-wing money is pouring in against her, but **Rashida knows the power of grassroots organizing** that helped her beat the forces of the establishment in 2018.

“With your help and people-power on the ground, we’ll do it again,” she told our members. “**We’ll outwork the hate, the lies, the gaslighting**. I refuse to sell out and when they can’t control you, they’ll do anything.”

“They profit off of our broken systems, they want the status quo while our residents struggle. **We need a Congress of working-class folks with lived experiences** ,” Rashida stated. “It is corporate greed which is, in many ways, killing our people.”

“On a [Monday evening call](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5518?t=20&akid=2901%2E5885482%2EXU-qxU) hosted by **Our Revolution** , Rep. **Rashida Tlaib** (...) told supporters Democrats must elect more lawmakers who support abortion rights to Congress in the midterms,” [Politico](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5519?t=21&akid=2901%2E5885482%2EXU-qxU) reported.

“**Everything is calling us to bold action** — our right to reproductive freedom and privacy could be pulled out from under us,” she said. “The movement on the ground is real and we must use that pressure.”

[Become a sustaining member of Our Revolution to help re-elect Rashida and grow our power inside and outside of Congress!](http://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4893?t=22&akid=2901%2E5885482%2EXU-qxU)

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5515?t=23&akid=2901%2E5885482%2EXU-qxU)

**VINCENT FORT FOR CONGRESS**

**Our Revolution** joins Bernie and Killer Mike in the fight to elect Sen. **Vincent Fort** to US Congress in GA-13!

Vincent is taking on the right-wing Democratic incumbent, and this is a huge opportunity to swing another blue district for the working class. **Early voting has started — Election Day is May 24**.

“With a strong field operation, **we can kick out this Blue Dog** , elect a progressive, and send shockwaves across the country,” Vincent told us on our [Monday Night Call](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5518?t=24&akid=2901%2E5885482%2EXU-qxU). “When we talk to people, they run from David Scott in droves and **turn to our progressive, proactive, community-based politics**.”

Vincent’s top priorities include Medicare for All, a living wage, the Green New Deal, and free college and apprenticeships. “I’ve been an educator and a State Senator, but **first and foremost I’m an activist** — and that’s how I legislate,” he said.

Vincent grew up in a union household and became a professor of African-American History. He served in the Georgia Senate for 20 years, where **he passed major reforms for public education and the first hate crimes anti-predatory lending legislation**.

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5515?t=25&akid=2901%2E5885482%2EXU-qxU)

**REJECT THE RECALL IN SF**

**Our Revolution** stands with San Francisco District Attorney **Chesa Boudin** against a vicious right-wing recall attempt — Prop H. Chesa is one of our country’s great criminal justice reformers, and he joined our [National Organizing Call](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5518?t=26&akid=2901%2E5885482%2EXU-qxU) Monday night.

Chesa promised three things during his run for DA:
1. Fight mass incarceration
2. Increase victim advocacy services
3. Enforce the law equally — billionaires & corporations included

He’s delivering, and now right-wing powers are scrambling to get rid of him. “If you support this recall, you’re joining sides with Republicans, billionaires, Ted Cruz, Tucker Carlson,” Chesa said. “**They’re taking features of the failed tough-on-crime approach and trying to blame those on me**.”

Chesa is right. It’s taken decades to build up a terrible system, and we need him to continue his work to fix it. “We’re creating a worker protection unit to prosecute companies for wage theft, ending cash bail, expanding drug and mental health programs,” he reported.

“**This is about building safety now and in the long run** ,” Chesa said. “Vote NO on the death penalty, NO on police violence and impunity, NO on using sexual survivors' DNA against them, **Vote NO on Proposition H**.”

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5515?t=27&akid=2901%2E5885482%2EXU-qxU)

Chesa is part of Our Revolution’s endorsed **California 2022 Slate** , which includes State Assembly candidates **Jennifer Esteen** (D-20), **James Coleman** (D-22), **Fatima Iqbal-Zubair** (D-65), and **Alex Lee** for re-election to District 24.

Also on the slate are two candidates for District Attorney **Pamela Price** For Alameda County and **Alana Mathews** for Sacramento County, and **Dave Myers** for San Diego County Sheriff.

**Ballots should start arriving this week and election day is June 28th!** [Join Our Revolution to help power our endorsed slate to victory!](http://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4893?t=28&akid=2901%2E5885482%2EXU-qxU)

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5515?t=29&akid=2901%2E5885482%2EXU-qxU)

**PALMER FOR DC COUNCIL**

**Our Revolution** is proud to endorse working mom and true progressive **Erin Palmer** for DC Council Chairwoman!

Erin is a grassroots leader taking on a corporate-funded incumbent who puts the interests of gambling bosses and big developers ahead of DC residents and locally-owned businesses.

"**Housing is a human right**. It’s a values statement, but it's also rooted in personal experience,” she said on our [Monday Night Call](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5518?t=30&akid=2901%2E5885482%2EXU-qxU). “I have a family member who died while homeless. I'm running for DC Council because **every person is entitled to safe, secure, and affordable housing**."

Erin has deep roots in the community and has served in critical local positions closest to the people and the problems. She knows the solutions residents need, and we need to make sure she gets elected!

[Sign up to volunteer to make calls to help Erin and our other endorsed progressive champions take power up and down the ballot!](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4972?t=31&akid=2901%2E5885482%2EXU-qxU)

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5515?t=32&akid=2901%2E5885482%2EXU-qxU)

**ATTICA SCOTT EARLY VOTE KICK-OFF**

**Our Revolution** kicked off early voting in Kentucky on Thursday with a rally for **Attica Scott** at the Mammoth Art Space in Louisville, followed by a canvass where we knocked on doors to get out the vote!

**Election Day is Tuesday** and Attica is the progressive choice to represent Kentucky’s 3rd District in Congress.

“We are working to change the face of Kentucky politics, and we’ve got to organize,” Attica said. “**A shift is happening all over our country, and now is the time to choose bold leadership over complacency**.”

Attica has a long history of leadership and activism in Louisville, defeating a 34-year incumbent in 2016 to be the first Black woman elected to the Kentucky General Assembly this century. Attica fought for the **Green New Deal** at the State House and **raised the minimum wage** on Louisville Metro Council.

[Become a member of Our Revolution TODAY to fund our on-the-ground field operations for candidates like Attica around the country this primary season!](http://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4893?t=33&akid=2901%2E5885482%2EXU-qxU)

★ ★ ★

**NC VOTES TUESDAY!**
2 POWERFUL PROGRESSIVES ON THE BALLOT

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5515?t=34&akid=2901%2E5885482%2EXU-qxU)

Tuesday is Election Day in North Carolina, and Our Revolution has two powerful progressive allies running for Congress — **Erica Smith** and **Nida Allam**!

Both are dedicated partners to our movement and would be strong voices in Washington for Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, the PRO Act, and more.

State Sen. Erica Smith is running on a Rural New Deal in NC’s 1st District. “**Our communities deserve more than a GoFundMe healthcare system and a Dollar Store economy** ,” Erica said.

Nida Allam was the first Muslim woman ever elected to public office in the state, now running in NC’s 4th District. She’s an outspoken progressive who served as a **political director for Bernie’s 2016 presidential campaign**.

Bringing home these wins would make a huge statement for our movement in the South and across the country. [Sign up to VOLUNTEER to give these allies a huge push going into Election Day!](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4972?t=35&akid=2901%2E5885482%2EXU-qxU)

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5515?t=36&akid=2901%2E5885482%2EXU-qxU)

**VOLUNTEER FLIPPING VOTERS FOR ERICA SMITH**

**Our Revolution Phonebank Force** activist **Taylor Pinckney** shared her volunteer experience with us last week of turning a voter from a corporatist Democrat to people’s champion **Erica Smith** for Congress in NC-1.

Taylor was thrilled to hear how grateful the voter was to learn he had a progressive option on the ballot in North Carolina — which he learned from her phone call and an Our Revolution mailer.

“He thanked us for opening his eyes that **Erica Smith** was the most progressive candidate and said that’s what his district needs,” Taylor relayed. “**It was cool to see the impact in real-time — when I make these connections with voters, it motivates me to keep the work going**.”

**Our candidates rely wholly on the power of the movement — which means we need as many volunteers as possible** to help lift the voice of working people and drown out the big money.

[Making calls is easy and fun, and you can earn rewards along the way. JOIN THE PHONE BANK FORCE](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4972?t=37&akid=2901%2E5885482%2EXU-qxU)

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5515?t=38&akid=2901%2E5885482%2EXU-qxU)

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5515?t=39&akid=2901%2E5885482%2EXU-qxU)

**TAKE ACTION FOR REPRODUCTIVE JUSTICE**

The far-right is laser-focused on dismantling reproductive and privacy rights in America, and right-wing Democrats like Joe Manchin helped kill a vote last week to codify **Roe v. Wade** , proving why we must fight against the right-wing in both parties.

**Our Revolution** is working hard to elect pro-choice candidates like **Jessica Cisneros** vs. anti-choice Dems like **Henry Cuellar** — even against the endorsement of Nancy Pelosi — all while **ramping up our activism to make our power felt inside _and outside_ the halls of power**.

**Our Revolution** has been in rapid response since the Supreme Court leak, organizing actions and events around the country with allies like **Ultra Violet** and **Planned Parenthood**.

Now, we’re scaling up our impact and launching an [action page](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5520?t=40&akid=2901%2E5885482%2EXU-qxU) where you can sign up to host your own demonstration! We can send you t-shirts, printable signs, assist with turnout, and more. **The majority must be heard on reproductive rights!**

[HOST OR JOIN AN ACTION NEAR YOU!](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5520?t=41&akid=2901%2E5885482%2EXU-qxU)

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5515?t=42&akid=2901%2E5885482%2EXU-qxU)

**ANDY LEVIN AIDS HOUSE LABOR WIN**

**Our Revolution** -endorsed US Rep. **Andy Levin** worked with House staffers on a Resolution that passed this week, giving them the right to form a union, [The Washington Post](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5521?t=43&akid=2901%2E5885482%2EXU-qxU) reports.

“I could not be prouder of the members of the **Congressional Workers Union** and their organizing force. I offer my solidarity and full support as they begin to organize their workplaces in the coming weeks,” Andy said.

**CWU won because they organized** and mounted public pressure on Dem leadership to hold the vote. And, Speaker Pelosi announced a $45k/year minimum annual pay (up from $25k/year, an absurdly unlivable wage in D.C.).

Hopefully, this will put pressure on the 10 Republicans who would have to vote for a similar resolution for staffers in the Senate to be able to unionize. “**Workers, we’ll see you in the Senate** ,” Andy said.

Andy is one of our best in Congress, and **Our Revolution** is going all-out to make sure he’s re-elected in Michigan-11 against corporate Dem Haley Stevens.

[Become a sustaining member of Our Revolution to help us build worker power and help working-class champions like Andy beat the establishment.](http://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4893?t=44&akid=2901%2E5885482%2EXU-qxU)

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5515?t=45&akid=2901%2E5885482%2EXU-qxU)

**PRESSURING BIDEN TO CANCEL STUDENT DEBT**

Our Revolution Board Member and Minnesota Attorney General **Keith Ellison** is organizing pressure on President Biden to eliminate “the crushing burden of $1.7 trillion in federal student loan debt.”

Keith joined state attorneys general from New York, Hawaii, Illinois, Michigan, New Mexico, Washington, and Puerto Rico to [urge Biden](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5522?t=46&akid=2901%2E5885482%2EXU-qxU) to use his power to cancel the debt, [MSN](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5523?t=47&akid=2901%2E5885482%2EXU-qxU) reports.

“**Such action would benefit millions of borrowers and be one of the most impactful racial and economic justice initiatives in recent memory** ,” the attorney's general wrote.

[Momentum is building for Dems to CANCEL STUDENT DEBT. Become a member of Our Revolution today to power Democrats into action before the midterms.](http://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4893?t=48&akid=2901%2E5885482%2EXU-qxU)

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5515?t=49&akid=2901%2E5885482%2EXU-qxU)

**2022 MEMBERSHIP REWARDS!**

To show our gratitude to members joining at higher donation levels, we’re sweetening the deal! For **$10 a month** , we’ll throw in our **sticker 6-pack** , and at **$15** , you’ll get the stickers _and_ a **poster**. For **$27** , get _both_ and a **tote bag** , or join at the **$50** level to **get it all _and_ a T-shirt**.

As _committed_ **Movement Builders** , we know **the real reward is taking action to make a better world** , but we want to share these fun items as a way of thanks.

[BECOME A MOVEMENT BUILDER](http://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4893?t=50&akid=2901%2E5885482%2EXU-qxU)

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5515?t=51&akid=2901%2E5885482%2EXU-qxU)

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5515?t=52&akid=2901%2E5885482%2EXU-qxU)

**BATTLING INSURRECTIONISTS**

A few setbacks this week from right-wing judges show exactly why we need to bar insurrectionists from the ballot and stop the far-right extremism corroding our systems.

**Our Revolution** members and our partners at **Free Speech For People** are still battling the likes of **Marjorie Taylor Greene** and **Madison Cawthorn** in the courts, and we need your support more than ever to bring them to justice.

A judge ruled this week in favor of MTG last week, but we’re appealing and Georgia plaintiff and Army Veteran **Mike Rasbury** — who worked with **Our Revolution** to put her under oath — won’t lay down that easily. [WATCH HIM IN OUR NEW VIDEO HERE.](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5524?t=53&akid=2901%2E5885482%2EXU-qxU)

In Arizona, our members are taking on US Reps. **Paul Gosar** and **Andy Biggs** — and State Rep. **Mark Finchem** who joined the mob and breached the Capitol on January 6th!

**TAKE ACTION:** [Sign our petition to your state elections official demanding they uphold the Constitution and bar insurrectionists from the ballot.](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5525?t=54&akid=2901%2E5885482%2EXU-qxU)

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5515?t=55&akid=2901%2E5885482%2EXU-qxU)

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5515?t=56&akid=2901%2E5885482%2EXU-qxU)

**MASSACHUSETTS DEMS REJECT PARTY MODERNIZATION**

**Our Revolution Massachusetts** is working hard to make the state Democratic Party much more democratic.

Last week, 68 delegates submitted a resolution to **eliminate 120 lifetime positions** that make the majority of the Democratic State Committee unelected and unaccountable to the grassroots base.

“Eliminating unelected lifetime members is only a first step in democratizing our Party,” said **Martha Karchere** , Our Revolution Massachusetts Co-Chair.

“The committee lacks a sense of urgency to address a broken political system and a rigged economy,” said Our Revolution Somerville Leader **Rand Wilson** , an elected convention delegate.

We are working to get 500 delegate signatures by May 21 to bring the resolution for a vote at the convention. If you’re interested in helping reform the state party contact [HERE](mailto:MassDemsForReform@gmail.com).

“**The Democratic Party is losing membership. Folks are growing disillusioned and alienated by promises of change that go unfulfilled** ,” said Jared Hicks, a DSC member. “We need to build a state party that responds to the needs of the majority and encourages participation to meet the urgent challenges we face.”

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5515?t=57&akid=2901%2E5885482%2EXU-qxU)

**PUSHING FOR PARTY MODERNIZATION**

Our Revolution Board Member **Jane Kleeb** was featured in an op-ed in [The New York Times](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5526?t=58&akid=2901%2E5885482%2EXU-qxU) this week, calling for smarter investment by the Democratic Party in local parties and the grassroots.

“In Nebraska, the monthly allotment went from $25,000 to $2,500. That 90 percent cut in party funding,” Jane was quoted. As a result, she says, Republican talking points often go unchallenged and Dems lose ground. “**We need to invest more resources at the party levels closest to the issues, closer to the solutions**.”

Ultimately, **a _democratic_ party requires a reversal of the DNC’s top-down power structure** — driven by a greedy consultant class and corporate elites. That’s why Jane and Our Revolution Board Member **Larry Cohen** are organizing a push for party modernization and a fighting chance against a total right-wing takeover, but the party is resisting.

So we’re asking you, the grassroots, to send [this link](http://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5026?t=59&akid=2901%2E5885482%2EXU-qxU) to your state and local party chairs and other DNC members and kindly ask them to **join this necessary, constructive effort**.

[TRANSFORM THE PARTY](http://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5026?t=60&akid=2901%2E5885482%2EXU-qxU)

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5515?t=61&akid=2901%2E5885482%2EXU-qxU)

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5515?t=62&akid=2901%2E5885482%2EXU-qxU)

Join us Monday, May 23rd, at **8:30p ET** /7:30 CT for our **National ‘Organize-to-Win’ Call** with **Keith Ellison** on the state of the progressive fight in 2022! These bi-weekly meetings are key to building our movement, so be sure to mark your calendar!

[RSVP HERE](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=63&akid=2901%2E5885482%2EXU-qxU)

★ ★ ★

**PHONEBANK TO FIGHT BACK AGAINST BIG MONEY**

“**They have money, but we have the people!** ” Bernie said on Thursday speaking about the dark money targeting progressive candidates in races around the country.

AIPAC spending figures [show](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5527?t=64&akid=2901%2E5885482%2EXU-qxU): $1.2M for Henry Cuellar against **Jessica Cisneros** (TX-28), $2.3M for Steven Irwin against **Summer Lee** (PA-12), $2.3M for Don Davis against **Erica Smith** (NC-1), and $2M for Valerie Foushee against **Nida Allam** (NC-4).

We can overcome these insidious financial forces, but **our movement must coalesce and rise up as a unified front**. If we each do what we can and commit ourselves to this collective project, we can outmatch corporate power.

One way to exert our people-power is through [Phonebanking](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4972?t=65&akid=2901%2E5885482%2EXU-qxU) — and we have several happening now — where you can talk to voters directly and circumvent the dark money ads slandering our movement. **Money can’t win if we turn out the vote!**

Help us make calls any day of the week for **Our Revolution** partners like **Alexi Giannoulias** for Illinois Secretary of State, and congressional candidates **Junaid Ahmed** (IL-8), **Mike Ortega** (CA-46), **Andy Levin** (MI-11), **Brittany Ramos DeBarros** (NY-11), and **David Segal** (RI-2).

[SIGN UP TO MAKE CALLS](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4972?t=66&akid=2901%2E5885482%2EXU-qxU)

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5515?t=67&akid=2901%2E5885482%2EXU-qxU)

This week, we’re ramping up calls to elect **Amy Vilela** to Congress. She is a progressive champion who is a powerful Medicare for All ally.

[We'll be calling thousands of voters in Nevada CD-1 which includes Las Vegas — SIGN-UP HERE to make calls for Amy!](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5503?t=68&akid=2901%2E5885482%2EXU-qxU)

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5515?t=69&akid=2901%2E5885482%2EXU-qxU)

Help us defend democracy by electing progressive Secretary of State candidate **Alexi Giannoulias** in Illinois!

[MAKE A DIFFERENCE — SIGN UP TODAY!](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5504?t=70&akid=2901%2E5885482%2EXU-qxU)

clean_body: | | Insider News from the Political Revolution! HEADLINES: Bernie’s Senate Fight for M4A | Rashida vs. Dark Money | Fort for Congress in GA | Reject the Recall in SF | Palmer for DC Council | Attica Scott Rally in KY | Election Day in NC | Pro-Choice Actions | Levin & House Labor | Ellison on Student Debt | & MORE! ★ ★ ★ WAGING THE FIGHT FOR MEDICARE FOR ALL IN THE SENATE AND BEYOND Our Revolution members rallied at the Capitol Thursday with Bernie, who as Budget Committee Chairman held the first-ever Senate hearing on Medicare for All and reintroduced the bill! This is how we wage the fight , and our movement showed up to show our strength and make the demand — needed more than ever as 1 million Americans have died in the pandemic. “This is an issue not just of healthcare but of what kind of nation we are ,” Bernie said. “Medicare for All will become the law of the land — if not now, in the future — because this is what the American people want.” Bernie welcomed doctors and nurses to testify before the committee and make the case for a Medicare for All single-payer system. He emphasized that it would save $650B a year over our current dysfunctional system. “In our corrupt political system, the private healthcare sector has spent more than $10.6B on lobbying and $1.7B on campaign contributions to maintain the status quo,” Bernie wrote in an op-ed in . “They own many of the politicians in both the Democratic and Republican parties.” Later that same evening, he with Our Revolution-endorsed Summer Lee for her run for Congress in PA-12! “We need a strong progressive like Summer in Congress, we need to tell these billionaires we won’t allow them to buy our elections and control our democracy.” ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ Join us Monday, May 23rd, at 8:30p ET /7:30 CT for our National ‘Organize-to-Win’ Call with Our Revolution Board Member and Minnesota Attorney General Keith Ellison on the state of the progressive fight in 2022! These bi-weekly meetings are key to building our movement, so be sure to mark your calendar! ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ Our Revolution is committed to re-electing US Rep. Rashida Tlaib to her third term representing Michigan’s 13th District in Congress! AIPAC and right-wing money is pouring in against her, but Rashida knows the power of grassroots organizing that helped her beat the forces of the establishment in 2018. “With your help and people-power on the ground, we’ll do it again,” she told our members. “We’ll outwork the hate, the lies, the gaslighting. I refuse to sell out and when they can’t control you, they’ll do anything.” “They profit off of our broken systems, they want the status quo while our residents struggle. We need a Congress of working-class folks with lived experiences ,” Rashida stated. “It is corporate greed which is, in many ways, killing our people.” “On a hosted by Our Revolution , Rep. Rashida Tlaib (...) told supporters Democrats must elect more lawmakers who support abortion rights to Congress in the midterms,” reported. “Everything is calling us to bold action — our right to reproductive freedom and privacy could be pulled out from under us,” she said. “The movement on the ground is real and we must use that pressure.” ★ ★ ★ VINCENT FORT FOR CONGRESS Our Revolution joins Bernie and Killer Mike in the fight to elect Sen. Vincent Fort to US Congress in GA-13! Vincent is taking on the right-wing Democratic incumbent, and this is a huge opportunity to swing another blue district for the working class. Early voting has started — Election Day is May 24. “With a strong field operation, we can kick out this Blue Dog , elect a progressive, and send shockwaves across the country,” Vincent told us on our . “When we talk to people, they run from David Scott in droves and turn to our progressive, proactive, community-based politics.” Vincent’s top priorities include Medicare for All, a living wage, the Green New Deal, and free college and apprenticeships. “I’ve been an educator and a State Senator, but first and foremost I’m an activist — and that’s how I legislate,” he said. Vincent grew up in a union household and became a professor of African-American History. He served in the Georgia Senate for 20 years, where he passed major reforms for public education and the first hate crimes anti-predatory lending legislation. ★ ★ ★ REJECT THE RECALL IN SF Our Revolution stands with San Francisco District Attorney Chesa Boudin against a vicious right-wing recall attempt — Prop H. Chesa is one of our country’s great criminal justice reformers, and he joined our Monday night. Chesa promised three things during his run for DA: 1. Fight mass incarceration 2. Increase victim advocacy services 3. Enforce the law equally — billionaires & corporations included He’s delivering, and now right-wing powers are scrambling to get rid of him. “If you support this recall, you’re joining sides with Republicans, billionaires, Ted Cruz, Tucker Carlson,” Chesa said. “They’re taking features of the failed tough-on-crime approach and trying to blame those on me.” Chesa is right. It’s taken decades to build up a terrible system, and we need him to continue his work to fix it. “We’re creating a worker protection unit to prosecute companies for wage theft, ending cash bail, expanding drug and mental health programs,” he reported. “This is about building safety now and in the long run ,” Chesa said. “Vote NO on the death penalty, NO on police violence and impunity, NO on using sexual survivors' DNA against them, Vote NO on Proposition H.” Chesa is part of Our Revolution’s endorsed California 2022 Slate , which includes State Assembly candidates Jennifer Esteen (D-20), James Coleman (D-22), Fatima Iqbal-Zubair (D-65), and Alex Lee for re-election to District 24. Also on the slate are two candidates for District Attorney Pamela Price For Alameda County and Alana Mathews for Sacramento County, and Dave Myers for San Diego County Sheriff. Ballots should start arriving this week and election day is June 28th! ★ ★ ★ PALMER FOR DC COUNCIL Our Revolution is proud to endorse working mom and true progressive Erin Palmer for DC Council Chairwoman! Erin is a grassroots leader taking on a corporate-funded incumbent who puts the interests of gambling bosses and big developers ahead of DC residents and locally-owned businesses. "Housing is a human right. It’s a values statement, but it's also rooted in personal experience,” she said on our . “I have a family member who died while homeless. I'm running for DC Council because every person is entitled to safe, secure, and affordable housing." Erin has deep roots in the community and has served in critical local positions closest to the people and the problems. She knows the solutions residents need, and we need to make sure she gets elected! ★ ★ ★ ATTICA SCOTT EARLY VOTE KICK-OFF Our Revolution kicked off early voting in Kentucky on Thursday with a rally for Attica Scott at the Mammoth Art Space in Louisville, followed by a canvass where we knocked on doors to get out the vote! Election Day is Tuesday and Attica is the progressive choice to represent Kentucky’s 3rd District in Congress. “We are working to change the face of Kentucky politics, and we’ve got to organize,” Attica said. “A shift is happening all over our country, and now is the time to choose bold leadership over complacency.” Attica has a long history of leadership and activism in Louisville, defeating a 34-year incumbent in 2016 to be the first Black woman elected to the Kentucky General Assembly this century. Attica fought for the Green New Deal at the State House and raised the minimum wage on Louisville Metro Council. ★ ★ ★ NC VOTES TUESDAY! 2 POWERFUL PROGRESSIVES ON THE BALLOT Tuesday is Election Day in North Carolina, and Our Revolution has two powerful progressive allies running for Congress — Erica Smith and Nida Allam! Both are dedicated partners to our movement and would be strong voices in Washington for Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, the PRO Act, and more. State Sen. Erica Smith is running on a Rural New Deal in NC’s 1st District. “Our communities deserve more than a GoFundMe healthcare system and a Dollar Store economy ,” Erica said. Nida Allam was the first Muslim woman ever elected to public office in the state, now running in NC’s 4th District. She’s an outspoken progressive who served as a political director for Bernie’s 2016 presidential campaign. Bringing home these wins would make a huge statement for our movement in the South and across the country. ★ ★ ★ VOLUNTEER FLIPPING VOTERS FOR ERICA SMITH Our Revolution Phonebank Force activist Taylor Pinckney shared her volunteer experience with us last week of turning a voter from a corporatist Democrat to people’s champion Erica Smith for Congress in NC-1. Taylor was thrilled to hear how grateful the voter was to learn he had a progressive option on the ballot in North Carolina — which he learned from her phone call and an Our Revolution mailer. “He thanked us for opening his eyes that Erica Smith was the most progressive candidate and said that’s what his district needs,” Taylor relayed. “It was cool to see the impact in real-time — when I make these connections with voters, it motivates me to keep the work going.” Our candidates rely wholly on the power of the movement — which means we need as many volunteers as possible to help lift the voice of working people and drown out the big money. ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ TAKE ACTION FOR REPRODUCTIVE JUSTICE The far-right is laser-focused on dismantling reproductive and privacy rights in America, and right-wing Democrats like Joe Manchin helped kill a vote last week to codify Roe v. Wade , proving why we must fight against the right-wing in both parties. Our Revolution is working hard to elect pro-choice candidates like Jessica Cisneros vs. anti-choice Dems like Henry Cuellar — even against the endorsement of Nancy Pelosi — all while ramping up our activism to make our power felt inside and outside the halls of power. Our Revolution has been in rapid response since the Supreme Court leak, organizing actions and events around the country with allies like Ultra Violet and Planned Parenthood. Now, we’re scaling up our impact and launching an where you can sign up to host your own demonstration! We can send you t-shirts, printable signs, assist with turnout, and more. The majority must be heard on reproductive rights! ★ ★ ★ ANDY LEVIN AIDS HOUSE LABOR WIN Our Revolution -endorsed US Rep. Andy Levin worked with House staffers on a Resolution that passed this week, giving them the right to form a union, reports. “I could not be prouder of the members of the Congressional Workers Union and their organizing force. I offer my solidarity and full support as they begin to organize their workplaces in the coming weeks,” Andy said. CWU won because they organized and mounted public pressure on Dem leadership to hold the vote. And, Speaker Pelosi announced a $45k/year minimum annual pay (up from $25k/year, an absurdly unlivable wage in D.C.). Hopefully, this will put pressure on the 10 Republicans who would have to vote for a similar resolution for staffers in the Senate to be able to unionize. “Workers, we’ll see you in the Senate ,” Andy said. Andy is one of our best in Congress, and Our Revolution is going all-out to make sure he’s re-elected in Michigan-11 against corporate Dem Haley Stevens. ★ ★ ★ PRESSURING BIDEN TO CANCEL STUDENT DEBT Our Revolution Board Member and Minnesota Attorney General Keith Ellison is organizing pressure on President Biden to eliminate “the crushing burden of $1.7 trillion in federal student loan debt.” Keith joined state attorneys general from New York, Hawaii, Illinois, Michigan, New Mexico, Washington, and Puerto Rico to to use his power to cancel the debt, reports. “Such action would benefit millions of borrowers and be one of the most impactful racial and economic justice initiatives in recent memory ,” the attorney's general wrote. ★ ★ ★ 2022 MEMBERSHIP REWARDS! To show our gratitude to members joining at higher donation levels, we’re sweetening the deal! For $10 a month , we’ll throw in our sticker 6-pack , and at $15 , you’ll get the stickers and a poster. For $27 , get both and a tote bag , or join at the $50 level to get it all and a T-shirt. As committed Movement Builders , we know the real reward is taking action to make a better world , but we want to share these fun items as a way of thanks. ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ BATTLING INSURRECTIONISTS A few setbacks this week from right-wing judges show exactly why we need to bar insurrectionists from the ballot and stop the far-right extremism corroding our systems. Our Revolution members and our partners at Free Speech For People are still battling the likes of Marjorie Taylor Greene and Madison Cawthorn in the courts, and we need your support more than ever to bring them to justice. A judge ruled this week in favor of MTG last week, but we’re appealing and Georgia plaintiff and Army Veteran Mike Rasbury — who worked with Our Revolution to put her under oath — won’t lay down that easily. In Arizona, our members are taking on US Reps. Paul Gosar and Andy Biggs — and State Rep. Mark Finchem who joined the mob and breached the Capitol on January 6th! TAKE ACTION: ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ MASSACHUSETTS DEMS REJECT PARTY MODERNIZATION Our Revolution Massachusetts is working hard to make the state Democratic Party much more democratic. Last week, 68 delegates submitted a resolution to eliminate 120 lifetime positions that make the majority of the Democratic State Committee unelected and unaccountable to the grassroots base. “Eliminating unelected lifetime members is only a first step in democratizing our Party,” said Martha Karchere , Our Revolution Massachusetts Co-Chair. “The committee lacks a sense of urgency to address a broken political system and a rigged economy,” said Our Revolution Somerville Leader Rand Wilson , an elected convention delegate. We are working to get 500 delegate signatures by May 21 to bring the resolution for a vote at the convention. If you’re interested in helping reform the state party contact mailto:MassDemsForReform@gmail.com. “The Democratic Party is losing membership. Folks are growing disillusioned and alienated by promises of change that go unfulfilled ,” said Jared Hicks, a DSC member. “We need to build a state party that responds to the needs of the majority and encourages participation to meet the urgent challenges we face.” ★ ★ ★ PUSHING FOR PARTY MODERNIZATION Our Revolution Board Member Jane Kleeb was featured in an op-ed in this week, calling for smarter investment by the Democratic Party in local parties and the grassroots. “In Nebraska, the monthly allotment went from $25,000 to $2,500. That 90 percent cut in party funding,” Jane was quoted. As a result, she says, Republican talking points often go unchallenged and Dems lose ground. “We need to invest more resources at the party levels closest to the issues, closer to the solutions.” Ultimately, a democratic party requires a reversal of the DNC’s top-down power structure — driven by a greedy consultant class and corporate elites. That’s why Jane and Our Revolution Board Member Larry Cohen are organizing a push for party modernization and a fighting chance against a total right-wing takeover, but the party is resisting. So we’re asking you, the grassroots, to send to your state and local party chairs and other DNC members and kindly ask them to join this necessary, constructive effort. ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ Join us Monday, May 23rd, at 8:30p ET /7:30 CT for our National ‘Organize-to-Win’ Call with Keith Ellison on the state of the progressive fight in 2022! These bi-weekly meetings are key to building our movement, so be sure to mark your calendar! ★ ★ ★ PHONEBANK TO FIGHT BACK AGAINST BIG MONEY “They have money, but we have the people! ” Bernie said on Thursday speaking about the dark money targeting progressive candidates in races around the country. AIPAC spending figures : $1.2M for Henry Cuellar against Jessica Cisneros (TX-28), $2.3M for Steven Irwin against Summer Lee (PA-12), $2.3M for Don Davis against Erica Smith (NC-1), and $2M for Valerie Foushee against Nida Allam (NC-4). We can overcome these insidious financial forces, but our movement must coalesce and rise up as a unified front. If we each do what we can and commit ourselves to this collective project, we can outmatch corporate power. One way to exert our people-power is through — and we have several happening now — where you can talk to voters directly and circumvent the dark money ads slandering our movement. Money can’t win if we turn out the vote! Help us make calls any day of the week for Our Revolution partners like Alexi Giannoulias for Illinois Secretary of State, and congressional candidates Junaid Ahmed (IL-8), Mike Ortega (CA-46), Andy Levin (MI-11), Brittany Ramos DeBarros (NY-11), and David Segal (RI-2). ★ ★ ★ This week, we’re ramping up calls to elect Amy Vilela to Congress. She is a progressive champion who is a powerful Medicare for All ally. ★ ★ ★ Help us defend democracy by electing progressive Secretary of State candidate Alexi Giannoulias in Illinois! ★ ★ ★ Sign up for phone banking as we organize to elect progressive Democrat and Our Revolution member and endorsed candidate David Segal to Congress. We will be calling thousands of Our Revolution supporters in Rhode Island’s First Congressional District, which includes much of the city of Providence. ★ ★ ★ Sign up for phone banking as we organize to re-elect progressive Democrats and Our Revolution endorsed Rep. Andy Levin to Congress. We will be calling thousands of Our Revolution supporters in Michigan’s 11th congressional district, which includes Detroit area communities such as Bloomfield and Pontiac. ★ ★ ★ Are you a member of Our Revolution? For $5 a month , you’ll be part of choosing our candidate endorsements and crafting our platform and strategy. Plus, we’ll send you our new 2022 Membership Card. My potential opponent, Herschel Walker (R), just announced that he's raised nearly $15 MILLION to defeat me and take back the Senate for Republicans.
| | |

Friend, I have an urgent update:
**My potential opponent, Herschel Walker (R), just announced that he's raised nearly $15 MILLION to defeat me and take back the Senate for Republicans.**
**Even worse, Mitch McConnell's super PAC is gearing up to _blanket the airwaves_ in Georgia with a new, MULTIMILLION dollar ad buy. You can bet the GOP will attack me with everything they have.**
With recent polls showing me 1 point down, this surge in Republican spending could put us at a major disadvantage. Senate control is at stake in this race – and if we fail to fight back now, we could fall even further behind.
**That's why I set a rapid-response goal to raise $50,000 by midnight to pull ahead and WIN. But time is running out, and we're still coming up short. Please, friend, I'm counting on you:**

I have something simple but urgent to ask you, friend: **_[Will you contribute to my campaign’s $50,000 mid-month goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45323621/345436142/1828376163?amount=25&refcode=20220514_f_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmVkODBiOS1kNGQzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KE5lDNjRkh3bMPBRASGfCoXKNu44DTlpEnvOS9Yrzz0=)_**

To be frank, I don’t like asking for money, and I wish I didn’t have to. But unlike Gov. DeSantis, I’m not bankrolled by far-right, billionaire donors.

I’m proud of that fact, but it does mean I rely on this grassroots team to hit important goals like this one — **and with each goal we hit, we move closer to defeating DeSantis.**

And we _must_ defeat Ron DeSantis.

Over the last few months, he’s ...
(1) Signed an extreme 15-week abortion ban into law, and doubled down on his anti-choice stance after recent reports indicated that the US Supreme Court is about to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ ...
(2) Signed the reprehensible “Don’t Say Gay” bill, and ...
(3) Handed out _**$600 million**_ in tax refunds to Florida’s biggest corporations.
We have _**one chance**_ to deny DeSantis a second term, and that’s on Election Day 2022.

**_[Recently,_POLITICO_ reported that Florida Democrats who are desperate to beat DeSantis believe I have the best chance of doing it. If you believe that too, please contribute to my $50,000 mid-month goal. I’d sincerely appreciate it!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45323622/345436143/1828376163?amount=25&refcode=20220514_f_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmVkODBiOS1kNGQzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KE5lDNjRkh3bMPBRASGfCoXKNu44DTlpEnvOS9Yrzz0=)_**

name: South Bay CRA
subject: Don't forget these events
body:
South Bay Republican Assembly News South Bay CRA News Special announcement! We have 3 Amazing events coming up. We are dedicated to keeping our are
| |
---
|
---
## South Bay Republican Assembly News
---
|
---
# **South Bay CRA News**
**Special announcement!**
We have 3 Amazing events coming up. We are dedicated to keeping our area deeply rooted in the fight for our State and Nation. Let me know if you have any ideas moving forward or if you would want to participate with us on the front lines.
**Remember our club meets the 4th Monday of every month.**
Blessed and Free
**Nena Gates**
President
nenarenae2@gmail.com
## May 19th Meet & Greet with Derrick Gates
---
---
|
---
# May 19th Meet and Greet with CRA Endorsed Congressional Candidate for the 36th District (former 33rd) Derrick Gates and several other exciting speakers. Come get some great food and find out how you can help save California and the Nation. 7pm Pyramid Office & Medical Park 22939 Hawthorne Blvd, Torrance
[CLICK TO LEARN MORE ABOUT DERRICK](https://sable.madmimi.com/c/436516?id=23663.42.1.307e1049c106388ccb6c9b4d977bc850)
## May 20th LA County-wide CRA candidate Forum.
---
**This will be an incredible night with our future leaders in California and the Nation. Come with your questions and an attitude to help change the Nation. 7pm Pyramid Office & Medical Park 22939 Hawthorne Blvd, Torrance**
---
|
---
# **Cordie Williams for US Senate**
Dr. Cordie Williams is a former United States Marine and has built a successful chiropractic business in San Diego County with his wife Dr. Tania Williams. Dr. Williams co-founded an organization as an expression of his desire to protect Californians’ right to make important decisions for themselves and their families due to the pandemic eroding freedom to make individual choices. Therefore, the time is now to elect leaders who have more faith in the citizenry than in government.
Cordie Williams will be challenging controversial appointed incumbent Alex Padilla in the June 2022 Open California Primary Election. Vice President Kamala Harris held the seat prior to the 2020 election.
[Click to visit Cordie website](https://sable.madmimi.com/c/436516?id=23663.43.1.38fb08ae92be5c206de7f445209c26e7)
|
---
# **Jenny Rae Le Roux for CA Governor**
Jenny Rae is an accomplished business owner, author, and strategic advisor with a B.A. in Economics from the University of Virginia and an MBA from Columbia Business School.Jenny Rae co-built tech companies in the energy and financial services industries before purchasing Management Consulted, a private tech-enabled services company. She knows the limitations our state has placed on the American Dream – and she’s ready for us to do better.
Jenny Rae is a frequent presenter at Harvard Business School, the Wharton School of Business, and over 60 other top institutions, and has been quoted in Forbes, Business Insider, and other business publications. [Click to Learn more](https://sable.madmimi.com/c/436516?id=23663.44.1.c31dc76348969255e8e8d7eb0241dda2)
|
---
# Derrick Gates for US Congress CA-36
Derrick has 15 years of experience in corporate mediation, revitalizing churches, starting ministries, equipping leaders, and helping the less fortunate around the United States.
Derrick has conservative values and an ability to see them reestablished in our communities.
Derrick Mentors multicultural leaders from around the United States.
Derrick desires to raise Bold, Moral, Men, and Women of Integrity to lead our country. [Learn More](https://sable.madmimi.com/c/436516?id=23663.45.1.fa13083f9be6b51a6f0a1a956124fbb9)
|
---
# Eric Early for CA Attorney General
Eric Early is a husband, father, small businessman and attorney who is running for California Attorney General in 2022.
In the 2020 election cycle, Eric came in the top two in the June 2020 Primary, becoming the official Republican candidate against Adam Schiff for Congress for California’s 28th Congressional District. His great campaign was fueled by thousands of volunteers and supporters from around the country. Before that, in the 2018 election cycle, Eric entered his first campaign for public office running against Xavier Becerra for California Attorney General and received almost 1 million votes statewide.
Eric is the co-owner and Managing Partner of a 25 lawyer nationally recognized law firm which litigates in courts throughout America, handling constitutional, contract, fraud, real estate and general business disputes. [Learn More](https://sable.madmimi.com/c/436516?id=23663.46.1.d1102032381d591a7c2624b186596fcf)
|
---
# Jack M. Guerrero CA Treasurer
Jack Guerrero brings a unique combination of public and private sector experience, with a quintessential American story. Jack’s experience as Mayor, City Councilmember, Certified Public Accountant (CPA), Stanford economics graduate, Harvard MBA, Bank Vice President, Treasury professional, auditor of municipalities and government agencies, investment banker, and M&A due diligence advisor to Fortune 500 companies (with professional stints in New York, San Francisco, Los Angeles, London, and Zurich) – establishes him as the candidate with BOTH Treasury experience AND a public service record of fighting for taxpayers and working people. [Learn More](https://sable.madmimi.com/c/436516?id=23663.47.1.dc9506fffe86b736064a4f8ff4932fcd)
|
---
# JOIN THE SBCRA TODAY
**On the 23rd** we have our Monthly South Bay Republican Assembly Meeting. We have some exciting speakers lined up That will be announced next week. We meet currently at the Walteria Business Club 24004 Neece Ave, Torrance, CA 6:30 pm
**Correction from our last Newsletter:**
**I mistakenly said that we meet on the last Monday of every month and it is the 4th Monday of every month. And currently, we meet at the Walteria Business Club 24004 Neece Ave, Torrance, CA 6:30 pmI apologize for the confusion**
If you want to Join the fight, you can get started at this link!
[CLICK TO JOIN THE SOUTH BAY CRA](https://sable.madmimi.com/c/436516?id=23663.48.1.6f749dcb10aa569895d909bfc921139c)
---
©2022 South Bay CRA | South Bay CRA
---

Blessed and Free Nena Gates President nenarenae2@gmail.com May 19th Meet & Greet with Derrick Gates | May 19th Meet and Greet with CRA Endorsed Congressional Candidate for the 36th District (former 33rd) Derrick Gates and several other exciting speakers. Come get some great food and find out how you can help save California and the Nation. 7pm Pyramid Office & Medical Park 22939 Hawthorne Blvd, Torrance May 20th LA County-wide CRA candidate Forum. This will be an incredible night with our future leaders in California and the Nation. Come with your questions and an attitude to help change the Nation. 7pm Pyramid Office & Medical Park 22939 Hawthorne Blvd, Torrance | Cordie Williams for US Senate Dr. Cordie Williams is a former United States Marine and has built a successful chiropractic business in San Diego County with his wife Dr. Tania Williams. Dr. Williams co-founded an organization as an expression of his desire to protect Californians’ right to make important decisions for themselves and their families due to the pandemic eroding freedom to make individual choices. Therefore, the time is now to elect leaders who have more faith in the citizenry than in government. Cordie Williams will be challenging controversial appointed incumbent Alex Padilla in the June 2022 Open California Primary Election. Vice President Kamala Harris held the seat prior to the 2020 election. | Jenny Rae Le Roux for CA Governor Jenny Rae is an accomplished business owner, author, and strategic advisor with a B.A. in Economics from the University of Virginia and an MBA from Columbia Business School.Jenny Rae co-built tech companies in the energy and financial services industries before purchasing Management Consulted, a private tech-enabled services company. She knows the limitations our state has placed on the American Dream – and she’s ready for us to do better. Jenny Rae is a frequent presenter at Harvard Business School, the Wharton School of Business, and over 60 other top institutions, and has been quoted in Forbes, Business Insider, and other business publications. | Derrick Gates for US Congress CA-36 Derrick has 15 years of experience in corporate mediation, revitalizing churches, starting ministries, equipping leaders, and helping the less fortunate around the United States. Derrick has conservative values and an ability to see them reestablished in our communities. Derrick Mentors multicultural leaders from around the United States. Derrick desires to raise Bold, Moral, Men, and Women of Integrity to lead our country. | Eric Early for CA Attorney General Eric Early is a husband, father, small businessman and attorney who is running for California Attorney General in 2022. In the 2020 election cycle, Eric came in the top two in the June 2020 Primary, becoming the official Republican candidate against Adam Schiff for Congress for California’s 28th Congressional District. His great campaign was fueled by thousands of volunteers and supporters from around the country. Before that, in the 2018 election cycle, Eric entered his first campaign for public office running against Xavier Becerra for California Attorney General and received almost 1 million votes statewide. Eric is the co-owner and Managing Partner of a 25 lawyer nationally recognized law firm which litigates in courts throughout America, handling constitutional, contract, fraud, real estate and general business disputes. | Jack M. Guerrero CA Treasurer Jack Guerrero brings a unique combination of public and private sector experience, with a quintessential American story. Jack’s experience as Mayor, City Councilmember, Certified Public Accountant (CPA), Stanford economics graduate, Harvard MBA, Bank Vice President, Treasury professional, auditor of municipalities and government agencies, investment banker, and M&A due diligence advisor to Fortune 500 companies (with professional stints in New York, San Francisco, Los Angeles, London, and Zurich) – establishes him as the candidate with BOTH Treasury experience AND a public service record of fighting for taxpayers and working people. | JOIN THE SBCRA TODAY On the 23rd we have our Monthly South Bay Republican Assembly Meeting. We have some exciting speakers lined up That will be announced next week. We meet currently at the Walteria Business Club 24004 Neece Ave, Torrance, CA 6:30 pm Correction from our last Newsletter: I mistakenly said that we meet on the last Monday of every month and it is the 4th Monday of every month. And currently, we meet at the Walteria Business Club 24004 Neece Ave, Torrance, CA 6:30 pmI apologize for the confusion If you want to Join the fight, you can get started at this link! ©2022 South Bay CRA | South Bay CRA | == "Web Version" == "Preferences" == "Forward" "Unsubscribe" |

And that’s who she’ll always fight for in the State Assembly — us. Georgette is running for AD-80, but corporate PACs and special interests are pouring hundreds of thousands of dollars into attacking her. That's why the support of grassroots donors like you can make all the difference in this race. That's why the support of grassroots donors like you can make all the difference in this race. = Paid for by Georgette Gomez for Assembly 2022 Special Election, #1443884 Georgette Gómez 5445 Madison Avenue Sacramento, CA 95841 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

| Peter,

We wanted to make sure you didn't miss an important message from Abigail in the wake of the leaked Supreme Court decision on _Roe v. Wade_.

We must defend seats like Abigail's because _**we need voices like hers advocating for progress.**_

[_**We need your support to ensure Abigail can continue moving our society forwards in Congress. Will you contribute to our campaign today?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/iK5MSVvUx1t_KEKVDiEGZ8THVC2-RN9nSNcU3aRrVqY=/hfmsOYYdkvNgwkabG27xsi81nyq3O5bWaO39lQjmTNo=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20220514-1-EM&amount=25)

* * *
Peter,

We know that we are facing the impending loss of a woman's right to choose and the complete assault on our constitutional right to privacy. The ramifications of this draft Supreme Court opinion are profound, and every right and ruling rooted in our Constitutional right to privacy is fully under threat.

For those who woke up this morning despairing or dizzied by the reality of this impending ruling, please join us in taking action. Please join us in finding common cause with friends and neighbors who want to see progress and a brighter future for all Americans. Please join us in asserting that moving our society backwards is not the way forward.

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Peter, I'm asking if you can help. 🙏
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand for America PAC
body:
| | Peter,

It's Herschel Walker, and I'm reaching out to you with an urgent message. Our Senate race in Georgia is one of the toughest races in the country, so I'm asking if you can help.

Early voting began May 2 for the Republican Primary, so we are ramping up our efforts to contact voters. _**[Senator Raphael Warnock (D) has outraised every candidate in the country- including our campaign, so we're doing everything we can to close the fundraising gap.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60388237:6YidFJoNL:m:1:3253819041:A94EA22ED2304FFD0D905FF955118AB4:r "Senator Raphael Warnock \(D\) has
outraised every candidate in the country – including our campaign, so we’re doing everything we can to close the fundraising
gap. ")**_

---
| | | [DONATE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60388237:6YidFJoNL:m:1:3253819041:A94EA22ED2304FFD0D905FF955118AB4:r)
---

In the first three months of this year, my Democrat opponent raised a record-breaking $13.6 MILLION! That's $151,000 PER DAY or $105 PER MINUTE - both day and night!

_**[I know it may seem like a lot, but we can close the gap if enough PATRIOTS will stand with us. I'm humbly asking you to give a donation of $3 or more today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60388237:6YidFJoNL:m:1:3253819041:A94EA22ED2304FFD0D905FF955118AB4:r "I know it may seem like a lot, but we
can close the gap if enough PATRIOTS will stand with us. I’m humbly asking you to give a donation of $3 or more today.")**_

Democrats know we have the chance to flip this Senate seat in Georgia from BLUE to RED. They see that we're virtually TIED in the polls, so they are FREAKING OUT. They know that Republicans will fight tooth and nail to keep Georgia from going BLUE AGAIN, so they are pouring resources into the state like crazy.

**In fact, Chuck Schumer 's Super PAC just announced they are going to spend $23 million in attack ads against me! That proves how scared they are!**

If we're going to win the critical Senate race in Georgia, we need your help.

In the 60 seconds it has taken you to read this short email, my Democrat opponent has raised another $105! Can you believe that? _**[Would you be one of 5 people to give $21 this very minute (for a combined $105) and help us close the fundraising gap?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60388237:6YidFJoNL:m:1:3253819041:A94EA22ED2304FFD0D905FF955118AB4:r "Would you be one of 5 people to
give $21 this very minute \(for a combined $105\) and help us close the fundraising gap?")**_

When you donate, you'll be helping us win in Georgia, take back the Republican majority in the U.S. Senate, stop the Biden-Harris agenda, and get America back on track!

To victory,

Herschel Walker

---
| | | [DONATE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60388237:6YidFJoNL:m:1:3253819041:A94EA22ED2304FFD0D905FF955118AB4:r)

name: Giffords
subject: Milwaukee last night - can you imagine this?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Imagine taking your kids to a playoff basketball game and leaving the stadium to a stampede as an active shooter starts firing in the area
#

Friends -
Imagine taking your kids to a playoff basketball game, having the time of your life, and leaving the stadium to a stampede as an active shooter starts firing in the area.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-may22?refcode=em220514-1-15&t=1&refcode2=2003_3935704_ip5xZ9&akid=2003%2E3935704%2Eip5xZ9)
Twenty people injured.
Nine guns recovered.
That was downtown Milwaukee last night, and it’s barely making the news.
There is no other country in the world where this kind of thing happens. None. And it’s a choice our elected officials make through their inaction.
We can’t become numb to this crisis. Nothing will change unless we change our gun laws. But we cannot do it alone.
Gabby needs your help:
[**Please make a $3 contribution to Giffords PAC today to help us elect a Congress that will take action to make our communities safer from gun violence.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-may22?refcode=em220514-1-15&t=2&refcode2=2003_3935704_ip5xZ9&akid=2003%2E3935704%2Eip5xZ9)**

I hate coming to you with this news just 3 days from Election Day, but I have no other choice.

Placing our final TV buy to fight against the billionaire-funded Super PAC’s final $523,420 ad buy has left my campaign bank account close to empty. [**_I need to raise $12,475 IMMEDIATELY or risk having to cease crucial campaign operations at the moment it matters most. I’m devastated that it’s coming down to this after all our hard work, but I know I can still win this race with your help. So I’m humbly asking, can you chip in $27 to get us over this finish line? >>_**](http://clicksp.nidaallam.com/f/a/TT7JtlteaIPCinBL9FzqNw~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRkYn0yP0TMaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2dhLWVtLW5pZGE_cmVmY29kZT0yMDIyMDUxNF9lbV9mcl9iMV9wZW9wbGVsaWtlX29wJmFtb3VudD0yNyZjZG1jPTI5QU1Ed1FmRXFYcWZFcnRabFllYzViZjVteSZyZWZjb2RlMj0yOUFNRHdRZkVxWHFmRXJ0WmxZZWM1YmY1bXkmcmVmY29kZWNkbWM9MjlBTUR3UWZFcVhxZkVydFpsWWVjNWJmNW15VwNzcGNCCmJxMvh_YnGZjndSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAABw) _With just 3 days to go until Election Day, I’ve found it important to look back and remember why I decided to run in the first place._

I’m running because the GOP is willing to ignore hatred in order to maintain power. People deserve better.

**People like my mother and father, who immigrated here.** They worked tirelessly and prioritized my sisters’ and my public education. Even in the face of racism and hate, they stayed firm in their values to serve and cherish those around us.

I could not have become the first Muslim woman ever elected to office in NC without their sacrifices. I refuse to let the GOP destroy the America that made my family’s story possible.

**People like my three friends Deah, Yusor, and Razan.** In 2015 they were murdered in a hate crime for being Muslim, a faith that I share.

It was their parents’ strength and love that pushed me to look for ways to defeat the hate that took my friends, to make sure no other family or community would have to live through the pain we endured.

I began organizing. Elevating marginalized voices and connecting communities with progressive policy, and ultimately serving as a political director for the Bernie Sanders campaign. I came to realize that running for office myself is how I can best fight for justice and continue their legacy.

**People in my community who are struggling just to make ends meet.** Congress has the power to improve our lives. We can’t wait any longer for a living wage, Medicare for All and a Green New Deal. [**_Please, I need to raise $12,475 to win this race for my loved ones and yours, but only with the support of grassroots donors like you to get us across the finish line. Before it’s too late, will you chip in $27 or whatever you can? >>_**](http://clicksp.nidaallam.com/f/a/TT7JtlteaIPCinBL9FzqNw~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRkYn0yP0TMaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2dhLWVtLW5pZGE_cmVmY29kZT0yMDIyMDUxNF9lbV9mcl9iMV9wZW9wbGVsaWtlX29wJmFtb3VudD0yNyZjZG1jPTI5QU1Ed1FmRXFYcWZFcnRabFllYzViZjVteSZyZWZjb2RlMj0yOUFNRHdRZkVxWHFmRXJ0WmxZZWM1YmY1bXkmcmVmY29kZWNkbWM9MjlBTUR3UWZFcVhxZkVydFpsWWVjNWJmNW15VwNzcGNCCmJxMvh_YnGZjndSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAABw) | | [Chip in $15 immediately >>](http://clicksp.nidaallam.com/f/a/qreIhO5Um9iZWr8ic3iOTQ~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRkYn0yP0TMaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2dhLWVtLW5pZGE_cmVmY29kZT0yMDIyMDUxNF9lbV9mcl9iMV9wZW9wbGVsaWtlX29wJmFtb3VudD0xNSZjZG1jPTI5QU1Ed1FmRXFYcWZFcnRabFllYzViZjVteSZyZWZjb2RlMj0yOUFNRHdRZkVxWHFmRXJ0WmxZZWM1YmY1bXkmcmVmY29kZWNkbWM9MjlBTUR3UWZFcVhxZkVydFpsWWVjNWJmNW15VwNzcGNCCmJxMvh_YnGZjndSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAABw)

I could not have become the first Muslim woman ever elected to office in NC without their sacrifices. I refuse to let the GOP destroy the America that made my family’s story possible. People like my three friends Deah, Yusor, and Razan. In 2015 they were murdered in a hate crime for being Muslim, a faith that I share. It was their parents’ strength and love that pushed me to look for ways to defeat the hate that took my friends, to make sure no other family or community would have to live through the pain we endured. I began organizing. Elevating marginalized voices and connecting communities with progressive policy, and ultimately serving as a political director for the Bernie Sanders campaign. I came to realize that running for office myself is how I can best fight for justice and continue their legacy. People in my community who are struggling just to make ends meet. Congress has the power to improve our lives. We can’t wait any longer for a living wage, Medicare for All and a Green New Deal. | | | | | ~~ | ~~ | ~~ Thank you for your support, Nida | 6409 Fayetteville Rd Ste 120-378 Durham, NC 27713 Paid for by Nida for NC Our campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. The ONLY way Nida will win this race is with small grassroots donations. If you'd like to donate to our campaign, please click . Thanks for fighting alongside Nida! | | ~~ | Email is an important way for us to communicate with our supporters. You can .

body:
There's only a little time left before Trump begins his speech in Austin.
#
Donald Trump is about to take the stage in Austin, Texas.
Trump is in Texas for one reason: To spread hate, division, and lies. **At this urgent moment, we must reject Trump and Greg Abbott's agenda of chaos and cruelty.**
[**Please, will you add a $3 donation right now to help hit our $250,000 fundraising goal before Trump takes the stage?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-20220514-1?refcode=ema20220514-189310&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&refcode2=189310_444211_E8wy4B&akid=189310%2E444211%2EE8wy4B)
Here's what you need to know:
**This is the THIRD time Trump has visited Texas this year.** He was in Dallas earlier this week for a major GOP fundraiser, and you can bet that Trump will rally his supporters — and corporate donors — behind Greg Abbott.
We're preparing for attack ads against Beto to flood every single media market in Texas. **Abbott already spent _$4 million_ on ads earlier this year and is planning to spend over _$100 million_ before Election Day.**
It's clear that we've got our work cut out for us in order to go up against Abbott and his $50 million in campaign cash — and that's not counting any money that comes in tonight from Trump's mega-donors.
There's only a little time left before Trump begins his speech in Austin. And we're falling short of our goal to raise $250,000, _so we're hoping to see a lot more online donations come in immediately_.
[**We're counting on grassroots supporters like you. Please, chip in $3 or more before Trump takes the stage to help elect Beto and defeat Abbott's divisive, cruel, and hateful vision for Texas.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-20220514-1?refcode=ema20220514-189310&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=189310_444211_E8wy4B&akid=189310%2E444211%2EE8wy4B)

And in the end, the Democrats always resort to their most predictable and pathetic tactic... ...Calling anything and everything they disagree with “racist.” Let me be clear, as a Trump-endorsed black conservative, it would be my honor to be the final nail in the coffin of Pelosi’s majority. Thank you, Wesley Hunt Former U.S. Army Captain Republican for Congress 1707 1/2 Post Oak Blvd. #525 Houston, TX 77056 Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Couples may make contributions from a joint account, but each contributor must sign the check (or other written instrument) or a statement that accompanies the contribution. Qualified federal PACs may contribute a maximum of $5,000 for the primary election and $5,000 for the general election. Non-qualified federal PACs may contribute a maximum of $2,900 for the primary election and $2,900 for the general election. Contributions from federal government contractors and corporations are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in an election cycle.

| Salt Lake County Council member Aimee Winder Newton has publicly endorsed Ally Isom for U.S. Senate. [Watch her video on YouTube here.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kQW_6ZIAbgJmApiewossrVG-aRZ3hgSXtBsEawiUFZmpXH-gq8ismAM2xW_WV7_zHm-RivQtHkoOe1q3ElHLsHIIBRDULbxIAT0AA7ZCBlLe6831ZvsYzrE_UdYhA-gsFSu7V-MnLIP-eQTic7KtBw==&c=IIWAlnw719Cv1iaBcRC74eM9TEjB9uG3eZnKJmhqkSpPGMhoxrjcUg==&ch=KENY2icIvBUl3_UMZbkIZdoVpjaPy6OgSvdMgu5UaudNuXTIJAerWA==) Aimee has known Ally for over 25 years and knows Ally's integrity, her work ethic, and the uniquely valuable experience she brings to the U.S. Senate.
"Ally has conservative values and principles that will help her lead."
Ally is a leader who solves problems and gets things done:
* Executive for a Utah tech company
* Director for The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints
* Deputy Chief of Staff to Utah Governor Gary R. Herbert

Ally speaks the language of business. She brings people together. She really listens.
Ally stands for fiscal discipline, local control, and limited government. She works hard to get things done.
It's time to replace D.C.'s career politicians and elites with someone who knows Utah, someone who fights for the right things.
Ally Isom is the right voice for Utah!

clean_body: Only 3 days left | Friend, Lying Pat McCrory is doing everything he can to pull ahead in the polls... The attacks are coming at me and my campaign from all different angles. On top of all of the attacks, THERE ARE ONLY 3 DAYS UNTIL ELECTION DAY. I am concerned Pat could take the lead in the polls. To fight back against Lying Pat McCrory’s attacks and lies, I need you to contribute any amount you can before our DEADLINE TONIGHT. | The North Carolina Senate Primary has never been this nasty, and we can WIN this. But it all comes down to YOU and what you’ll do. Thank you for everything you do. Let’s win this, Ted Budd P.S. We've got a lot to do and not much time nor the funds to do so. | Ted Budd is a father, small business owner, and conservative leader running for Senate in North Carolina. He is the ONLY candidate who is endorsed by President Trump and the only candidate who will fight for the America First Agenda in Washington. subject: We Cannot Afford to Move Backwards 50 Years!
body:
We Have to Fight to Keep and Expand Our Rights! | |
---
| | | [ ](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=77859c00fb&e=4712f71bea)

| [Give Today!](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=c56073480e&e=4712f71bea "Give Today!")
---
| This morning I spoke at the Panhandle Women's March in Amarillo. I met dozens of amazing people, all fighting for our rights.

Unlike my opponent Ronny Jackson (aka the "Walking Scandal"), I support a woman's right to choose. I promise I will fight to protect and expand human rights. We cannot afford to go back in time 50 years! We must move forward!

It is not hard to imagine what's next if far right-wing radical conservatives take back power in Washington. We will continue to witness our hard-fought rights being repealed.

Please join me today to flip this seat blue and keep the House!

Thank you,
Kathleen

name: Alek Skarlatos
subject: I’m not even sure if this will work
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alek For Oregon
body:
My primary is in FOUR days and we're throwing things at a wall to see what sticks right now. We're running out of time and we need help. I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | [](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=67d65ce1ec82477e970e15e0958545cf&_e=NEV4rJVb3nxQe5UiSF5ZHLacPYxpN1qudxhqyDTTqZsMvTl61To37GvYchAKS8He6CnyayKX-4YR6yIOwk-F47tY2TNeOu6vZXCnsxA2vtbnU_Vjgvki66NK0ZNE3Qa_8F-xjqZ9_KNoetvi90qMJSbrT5OiiV7lLb7s3LvCuIquws_HwWXboJyewEPBQzOWXBj4lbnsLIL5yMSNPDowJB78dujOb-r3opRgibZ4TBwTuGyoz073iyNej18RaWCMVIkdcwZAkqlOFQRb4A4ozBNUsEOmnb6yYNW6J5Suu-ujeH35C1nhde7TIglPDICW-qRbR9m_KqpA-4oE2FTM6Ae0wskrjsLCarWUNxGhYBU96fXB-7oAsyc2F6yqW_177XltAx-6aVY_Vlkm_jhMVRx6Vc5zJskM2mLmwoVRmRTgirixlxDdNZAmc_D6iBbqNHuTsPT2z_OotRawH8q3QKUqUbxBsYHSzK8IXFdzdxRrwGqk1bRw8CDcBpA7Dw-m)
---
Peter,

Over the weekend I was sorting through old(er) emails that I’ve sent out to you over the past year and came across one message that seemed to resonate particularly well with you – so I wanted to take this opportunity, FOUR days from Primary Day here in Oregon, to remind you just exactly what is at stake here.

In March I was officially inducted into the “Young Guns” program, run by the National Republican Congressional Committee. In an email in September, I wrote to you that “ _**membership is exclusive and serves to recognize candidates who have proven that they can raise enough money online to sustain their campaigns without help from Washington, D.C**_.”

Well, you probably know that once something is given it can just as easily be taken away – and I’m worried that if our fundraising doesn’t pick up soon, I’m going to lose this top tier candidate status. Our fundraising has been extremely sluggish the last several months. **I’m not sure how to get us out of the bind that we’re in, so I’m coming to you once again asking for help**.

I don’t even know if this will work, but it’s worth a try: **[will you be one of two donors to contribute $6 before the top of the next hour?](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=67d65ce1ec82477e970e15e0958545cf&_e=NEV4rJVb3nxQe5UiSF5ZHLacPYxpN1qudxhqyDTTqZsMvTl61To37GvYchAKS8He6CnyayKX-4YR6yIOwk-F47tY2TNeOu6vZXCnsxA2vtbnU_Vjgvki66NK0ZNE3Qa_8F-xjqZ9_KNoetvi90qMJSbrT5OiiV7lLb7s3LvCuIquws_HwWXboJyewEPBQzOWXBj4lbnsLIL5yMSNPDowJB78dujOb-r3opRgibZ4TBwTuGyoz073iyNej18RaWCMVIkdcwZAkqlOFQRb4A4ozEcWl_JT0YVSzic96m6_ESSYvywgxwcFnct6fTJCObaxTquNL9r-FAQJuWyXenLKNekZYvRY8KLJtQtOH_FkE268_2NYW-wHJjIjzzWJPIcjU4u_oNuqkdPZFGuMGp1Pt4AN1M-TxyZ0hP_Vh-eCSf-Yu1W18LfnkKBDHMR0w84z6duaKKTopJ6UaHYNs5NOBF_aP0T9R4rdXhLj8VTqx3o9DynUJzEsRzKLmuTziMkd)** I don’t know when you’ll see this, but whenever you do, please know that I’ll most likely still be looking for two donor contributions.

clean_body: My primary is in FOUR days and we're throwing things at a wall to see what sticks right now. We're running out of time and we need help. I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | Peter, Over the weekend I was sorting through old(er) emails that I’ve sent out to you over the past year and came across one message that seemed to resonate particularly well with you – so I wanted to take this opportunity, FOUR days from Primary Day here in Oregon, to remind you just exactly what is at stake here. In March I was officially inducted into the “Young Guns” program, run by the National Republican Congressional Committee. In an email in September, I wrote to you that “ membership is exclusive and serves to recognize candidates who have proven that they can raise enough money online to sustain their campaigns without help from Washington, D.C.” Well, you probably know that once something is given it can just as easily be taken away – and I’m worried that if our fundraising doesn’t pick up soon, I’m going to lose this top tier candidate status. Our fundraising has been extremely sluggish the last several months. I’m not sure how to get us out of the bind that we’re in, so I’m coming to you once again asking for help. I don’t even know if this will work, but it’s worth a try: I don’t know when you’ll see this, but whenever you do, please know that I’ll most likely still be looking for two donor contributions. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | | | | We’ve got a couple of competing internal goals going right now that we sure could use help hitting. 1. I’m $3,600 short of our $10,000 pre-primary goal 2. We are one week away from the Republican Primary on Saturday, May 21st from 9 AM - 4 PM.

We have a rare opportunity to Take Back The Tenth with a strong, conservative candidate who can appeal to a broad base and stand for our values in Washington. If you nominate me on May 21st, we will beat Wexton together and I will be a champion for you in Congress.
